what: 2026-06-23 — Planned issue #73 Part 2: user-configurable species overrides via the config file (Session 184)
title: Changelog
text: Deliverable (owner pick, single item, PLANNING session): wrote docs/planning/issue73-part2-user-configurable-plan.md — plan making species minimum-breeding-age / gestation / absent-species-fallback values user-configurable (issue #73 Part 2). implementation (FM #18/#25; plan deliverable, implementation separate session per slice). TDD code-phases N/(planning doc, R/ change). 0 stakeholder corrections. Two owner decisions taken orientation (AskUserQuestion): mechanism = config file (extend ~/.nprcgenekeepr_config, loaded boot via loadSiteConfig(); empty Settings-tab UI scope); scope = three value groups (breeding ages, gestation, fallback). Grounding: 4-mapper read-workflow (wf_c21598f3-932: config-file / breeding-age-chain / gestation-chain / test-validation) plus firsthand verification every load-bearing call site — reportGV.R:103 (override), correctUnknownParentMeanKinship.R:96/getBreedingPeerCohort:31 (thread tables, configurable default), modGeneticValue.R:121,185 (config param), modPotentialParents.R:208,242 (accepts gestationTable uses prefill; getPotentialParents call passes none, -op maxGestationalPeriod non-NULL), getPotentialParents.R:63-69 (consults gestationTable maxGestationalPeriod NULL), appServer.R:106,266,307 (modInputServer config-reactive precedent vs. two un-wired target modules), config subsystem (getSiteInfo fixed-schema, getParamDef STOPs missing keys, getConfigApiKey optional-soft-lookup precedent). Plan content: evidence-based inventory (§2) verified file:line; seven design decisions ratification (§3) — headline recommendations: D1 CSV-path key (getConfigApiKey-style helper; getSiteInfo change) inline keys, D4 merge-onto-bundled (replace) partial CSV silently mis-age unlisted species; two vertical slices (§4, FM #25) RED/GREEN/DONE/Verify/boundary/dragons — Slice 1 GVA tab end--end (builds shared reader), Slice 2 Potential Parents tab end--end (reuses ); --dragons (§6) owner ratification checklist (§7). Backward-compat invariant (config ⇒ identical today) -line; Phase-3E runtime smoke required implementation slices (Shiny wiring changes). Issue #73 stays OPEN — Part 1 (data) live; Part 2 (plan) unimplemented. future Part 2 publish uses “Closes #73” (last part). Learning 172 added PROJECT_LEARNINGS.md.

what: 2026-06-23 — Implemented issue #73 Part 1: populated the species reproductive-parameter table for all common colony NHP species; breeding-age columns moved to numeric (Session 182)
title: Changelog
text: Deliverable (owner pick, single item): generalize bundled speciesGestation lookup rhesus-14 common colony NHP species (issue #73 Part 1 — data population), moving two breeding-age columns integer → numeric hold fractional minima. Strict TDD (RED→GREEN→REFACTOR, every transition AskUserQuestion-gated). 0 stakeholder corrections. Committed branch issue-73-populate-breeding-age-table; UNPUBLISHED — master unchanged. Part 2 (user-configurable override path) deferred separate session — issue #73 stays OPEN. Owner supplied biological values (methodology/veterinary call, code default): 14 species minimum female/male breeding-age ranges gestation ranges. Conversion rules (owner-confirmed via AskUserQuestion): minimum breeding age = LOW end range; gestation column = conservative maximum = HIGH end range. Rhesus gestation kept existing conservative 210 (owner chose “keep 210” supplied 164–166 typical figure — issue scopes gestation “missing” rhesus missing; avoids changing getPotentialParents behavior + tests). changed: data-raw/speciesGestation.R now builds 14-row table (RHESUS, CYNOMOLGUS, JAPANESE MACAQUE, PIG-TAILED MACAQUE, BABOON, VERVET, AFRICAN GREEN MONKEY, SQUIRREL MONKEY, COMMON MARMOSET, COTTON-TOP TAMARIN, OWL MONKEY, CAPUCHIN, CHIMPANZEE, BONOBO); minMaleBreedingAge/minFemaleBreedingAge columns moved integer → numeric hold fractional minima (rhesus female 2.5, squirrel-monkey male 3.5, marmoset 1.0, tamarin 1.5). getSpeciesMinBreedingAge() coercions .integer() → .numeric() (two age columns, default, empty-input return integer(0L) → numeric(0L)); gestation column stays integer. Roxygen (R/data.R, accessors) + man/*.Rd regenerated; NAMESPACE byte-identical. Rhesus female moved 3 → 2.5 — confirmed zero real-data/GVA impact (verified firsthand, assumed): shipped pedigree (qcPed/breederPed/examplePedigree) carries species column, GVA unknown-parent mean-kinship correction uses species-absent default cutoff 2 real data; rhesus new-species cutoffs exercised accessor unit tests + synthetic species-bearing fixture test_correctUnknownParentMeanKinship.R (uses rhesus MALE cutoff 4, unchanged). change therefore contained two test files. Files: data-raw/speciesGestation.R, data/speciesGestation.RData (regenerated), R/getSpeciesMinBreedingAge.R, R/getSpeciesGestation.R (doc/example ), R/data.R (doc), man/speciesGestation.Rd + man/getSpeciesMinBreedingAge.Rd + man/getSpeciesGestation.Rd (regenerated). Tests: test_getSpeciesMinBreedingAge.R (rewritten numeric + 14-species assertions) test_getSpeciesGestation.R (new-species gestation assertions; JAPANESE MACAQUE repointed unknown-species fallback case). test_correctUnknownParentMeanKinship.R + test_reportGV.R unchanged (verified unaffected). Verification: RED = 49 failing assertions across two files, failing right reason, collateral (2 unaffected files stayed green — 20/0 25/0). GREEN = data + accessor coercion . REFACTOR = doc/roxygen + lint (.lintr excludes tests/ data-raw/, data vectors use explicit doubles 4.0). Full clean regression 2183 pass / 0 fail / 0 error (203 files); 0 lints (namespace-loaded, Learning 167); 0 spelling (WORDLIST change); build-equivalent devtools::check(vignettes = FALSE) = 0/0/0 (Learning 161). NEWS deferred publish PR (Learning 157a). Learning 170 added. Issue #73 stays OPEN (Part 2 user-config remains).

what: 2026-06-17 — Hardened addGenotype() against factor allele columns (CODE fix, strict TDD) (Session 125)
title: Changelog
text: Deliverable (owner pick A9): hardened addGenotype() integer allele encoding consistent regardless whether two allele columns arrive character factor. realizes code fragility S124 surfaced flagged (Learning 117): dictionary lookup genoDict[genotype[, 2L]] / [, 3L] indexes name-keyed vector factor, R uses factor’s integer codes instead labels, yielding encoding inconsistent two columns (callers). Scoped R/addGenotype.R + tests/testthat/test_addGenotype.R + man/addGenotype.Rd; NAMESPACE/DESCRIPTION/NEWS/data//checkGenotypeFile.R change (NAMESPACE proven byte-identical). Fix (2 lines): coerce allele columns character top addGenotype() (names, genotypeNames[1L]/[2L]), dictionary build (sort(unique(c(...)))) lookup operate labels. Coercing top — rather wrapping two index expressions — also neutralizes version-fragile c()--factors behavior dictionary build. Scope decision (gated): coercion lives addGenotype , checkGenotypeFile. read-breadth scan confirmed () bug pattern isolated addGenotype — sibling genotype function indexes named vector possibly-factor column; (b) addGenotype direct callers bypass checkGenotypeFile gate (roxygen example, test_addGenotype.R, test_geneDrop.R), gate-fix protect ; (c) checkGenotypeFile structural validator coerce types. Owner chose addGenotype-(point--use); checkGenotypeFile stays pure validator. TDD: one pre-RED scope gate (addGenotype-vs +checkGenotypeFile) + three mandatory transitions (PRE-RED→RED, RED→GREEN, GREEN→REFACTOR). RED: two new failing tests test_addGenotype.R — (1) factor-input output identical character-input output, (2) allele ("b", appearing first_name one row second_name another) gets code — minimal deterministic fixture (first_name = c("","b"), second_name = c("b","c") factors; globally →10001, b→10002, c→10003). Confirmed 2 failed / 0 error unhardened function existing character-input test stayed green. GREEN: 2-line coercion; 3 tests pass. REFACTOR: added one-line @details note documenting internal coercion; regenerated man/addGenotype.Rd. 0 stakeholder corrections. Verified: 3 addGenotype tests pass; full-suite clean-regression read failed=0 error=0 (offenders; baseline test-app-/test-e2e- clean run ); tools::checkRd("man/addGenotype.Rd") 0 problems; NAMESPACE byte-identical; git diff confined three intended files. Flagged future (done): fold S125 CRAN Phase 3 NEWS rewrite 2.0.0 (CODE fix ships changes addGenotype output factor-columned input). title: Changelog
text: Deliverable (owner pick A7): re-exported bundled rhesusGenotypes object (31 animals, two haplotypes ) three columns carry canonical character type, preserving every value. shipped stringsAsFactors-era factors (id 31 levels, first_name 18, second_name 23). coerce--place + data-raw/ + atomic-doc/man/test pattern S123 (Learning 116). Scoped data/rhesusGenotypes.RData + new data-raw/rhesusGenotypes.R + new tests/testthat/test_rhesusGenotypes.R + rhesusGenotypes id doc line R/data.R + man/rhesusGenotypes.Rd; NAMESPACE/DESCRIPTION/NEWS/.Rbuildignore/-data-object/addGenotype.R change (^data-raw$ already build-ignored S123). firsthand investigation reframed A7 (Learning 117): S123 flagged A7 “de-factor id”. Probing showed object three factor columns, id column matter (merge(ped, genotype, ="id") coerces either way; every consumer id-agnostic). columns matter two allele columns: addGenotype()’s dictionary lookup genoDict[genotype[, 2L]] indexes name-keyed vector factor, R uses factor’s INTEGER CODES instead labels — yielding inconsistent encoding (allele → different codes first vs second). character columns lookup name encoding consistent (verified: allele → code = TRUE character / FALSE factor; combined dictionary 35 alleles, codes 10001–10035 vs buggy per-column 10001–10018 / 10001–10023). package’s test_addGenotype.R already feeds stringsAsFactors = FALSE input — shipped factor object anomaly. Owner chose coerce three columns (full type-correctness), making shipped addGenotype(rhesusPedigree, rhesusGenotypes) example produce correct, consistent codes. Provenance → coerce--place: data/rhesusGenotypes.RData single 2020 commit (31c4679d), scripted generator, shares 31 obfuscated ids rhesusPedigree (re-deriving via non-deterministic obfuscatePed() change ids desync sibling). new idempotent data-raw/rhesusGenotypes.R coerces three columns via .character() re-saves place (compress="xz", 734→608 bytes). value-identical inst/extdata/obfuscated_rhesus_mhc_breeder_genotypes.csv serves independent cross-check. TDD: one pre-RED scope gate (id-vs -three; owner chose three) + three mandatory transitions (PRE-RED→RED, RED→GREEN, GREEN→REFACTOR). RED: wrote test_rhesusGenotypes.R (22 assertions pinning corrected types preserved values — dim 31×3, names, unique counts 31/18/23, NA counts 0, membership spot-checks), confirmed failed factor object (6 type assertions). GREEN: ran coercion, reverted id doc line (factor→character; first_name/second_name make type claim), regenerated man/. REFACTOR: N/(code clean; change introduced redundant conversions — test references bundled genotype object). 0 stakeholder corrections. Verified: new test -pass (22); full-suite regression read failed=0 error=0 (offenders, baseline test-app-/test-e2e- included); tools::checkRd("man/rhesusGenotypes.Rd") 0 problems; NAMESPACE byte-identical; git diff --stat confined intended files. Phase-3E runtime smoke test DONE (runtime-behavior change): addGenotype() runs cleanly shipped corrected object (conversions; 375×12, 31 genotype rows), allele encoding consistent (allele → code, TRUE), coercion idempotent (-op re-run), CSV cross-check confirms id/first_name/second_name identical. Flagged future (fixed, FM #8): () addGenotype.R fragile factor inputs — mis-encode factor-columned genotype, just bundled one; hardening (coerce allele columns inside function checkGenotypeFile) separate code-fix deliverable tests; (b) rhesusGenotypes doc (R/data.R:345) cites nonexistent source file rhesusGenotypes.csv — real value-identical export obfuscated_rhesus_mhc_breeder_genotypes.csv (separate data-doc nit); (c) fold S124 CRAN Phase 3 NEWS rewrite 2.0.0 (DATA change ships). title: Changelog
text: Deliverable: Closed GitHub issue #8 (“Improve handling non-founder animals without either parents assigned”) implemented, strengthened-caveat resolution comment. Solution 1 (origin/“Center” segregation) — ONPRC-born founders offspring split noParentage bucket (R/orderReport.R:31,44-54). Solution 2 (don’t rank ) — animals get value = "Undetermined", rank = NA (R/rankSubjects.R:38,44). Live wiring: reportGV() → orderReport(finalData, ped) (R/reportGV.R:146). Reproduced: -parent founder offspring → value = "High Value", rank = 1 (original bug) without origin, vs "Undetermined"/NA — warning safeguard doesn’t apply. (2) regression test pins Undetermined/rank = NA branch — test_orderReport exercises path asserts positional unknown-ID counts; test_rankSubjects never exercises noParentage. what: 2026-06-10 — Phase 8e-7 (CI per-module fresh-process grouping): run the 23-file shinytest2 E2E tier in 13 per-module groups, each in a fresh R process, to defang the 23-in-one-process Chrome flake (issue #40, Session 50)
title: Changelog
text: Deliverable (CI config / run--observe): plan slice 8e-7 (docs/planning/phase8e-assertion-strengthening-subplan.md §8/§8e-7 — FINAL §8e slice) — replaced single test_dir(filter = "^(app|e2e)-", stop_on_failure = TRUE) run step .github/workflows/shinytest2.yaml single job loops 13 per-module group regexes, run fresh Rscript process, one process accumulates 23 Chrome/AppDriver instances (S34 “process-count dragon”: ~1 transient error / 5 full-tier single-process runs). Caps process ≤3 files. Per group: test_dir(filter = rx, stop_on_failure = FALSE) → passed/failed/skipped/error report → fail/error > 0 ⇒ quit(status = 1) (checked FIRST, real failure never mislabeled) → passed == 0 ⇒ stop() per-group silent-skip guard (stronger old whole-run guard; zero-match regex caught separately test_dir’s “test files found” abort). bash loop runs groups (full signal, one flake doesn’t skip rest) reds job group failed — preserving stop_on_failure semantics + job env / Chrome provisioning / R CMD INSTALL / timeout-minutes: 30 / removed continue--error (R6). Owner-gated topology (AskUserQuestion): single-job loop chosen 13-leg strategy.matrix (cheapest, plan-faithful, root-cause-sufficient — matrix’s 13× setup wasn’t worth nightly job). TDD = run--observe (CI config; RED→GREEN, plan §6), gated PRE-RED→run--observe. Verified locally: COMMITTED 13-regex partition selects EXACTLY 23 ^(app|e2e)- files — union == tier, overlap / gap / stray — full 182-file dir (replicating testthat’s stripped-name match, Learning #33c); YAML parses (yaml.safe_load); run-step bash -n clean; Rscript -e '...' block single-quote-free; run-step logic smoked throwaway dir (pass→exit 0, fail→exit 1, skip / nomatch → nonzero) — four branches. ⚠ Live-runner-(FM #24’s cousin): flake mitigation environmental — partition / guard / exit logic proven locally, 23--one-process flake can confirmed gone first live GitHub run (requires workflow master). Ships UNVALIDATED locally; claimed fixed live run shows . Pushing add-methodology → master remains SEPARATE deliverable. Scope: CI-config (R/ / tests/ change → test suite byte-identical). CHANGELOG-(package/source change).

title: nprcgenekeepr
text: Quality Control - Validation studbooks text files, Excel workbooks, LabKey EHR pedigrees. Checks include: Parent record verification Sex validation (male dams, female sires) Duplicate detection Date validation Minimum parent age verification (default 2 years) Pedigree Creation - Building pedigrees animal lists using LabKey EHR integration via Rlabkey package Age-Sex Pyramid Plots - Visual display living animals age sex demographic analysis Genetic Value Analysis Reports - Ranking scheme using: Mean kinship (indicates inter-relatedness colony) Genome uniqueness (indicates presence rare alleles) Animals low mean kinship high genome uniqueness rank higher Breeding Group Formation - Creating potential breeding groups : Avoid mating closely related animals Support optional sex ratio constraints Support harem group configuration Maximize genetic diversity

what: NEW-15 — countKinshipValues.R:131-134 wrong loop index · HIGH · correctness
title: PED + GV Cluster Audit (Session 2)
text: countDiffs <- integer(length(valueDiffs)) (value valueDiffs) { countDiffs[index] <- kCounts[[index]][kValues[[index]] == value] }. vector sized length(valueDiffs) loop iterates valueDiffs, assignment indexes outer loop variable index, per-value position. Every iteration writes slot (last new value lost); index > length(valueDiffs) vector silently grows leading 0/NA. Correct form: (seq_along(valueDiffs)) countDiffs[] <- kCounts[[index]][kValues[[index]] == valueDiffs[]]. test exercises -kValues runs, valueDiffs always empty block (l.127-138) never entered — defect untested. (Independently confirmed author’s read.)

what: NEW-34 — getPotentialParents.R references j outside its block (crash) · medium · correctness

what: NEW-45 — geneDrop.R:122-134 period-in-id corrupts allele assignment · medium · correctness
title: PED + GV Cluster Audit (Session 2)
text: strsplit(rownames(alleles), ".", fixed = TRUE) id <- key[1]; parent <- key[2]. Rownames id.sire/id.dam; id containing . (e.g. ".1" → ".1.sire") splits c("","1","sire") → id="" (truncated), parent="1" (wrong). Silent mis-assignment; guard. Latent (fixtures use plain ids).

what: NEW-48 — calcFEFG.R:73 NA propagation (no partial-parentage guard) · medium · correctness
title: PED + GV Cluster Audit (Session 2)
text: d[ego,] <- (d[sire,] + d[dam,]) / 2L character indexing. Roxygen documents “partial parentage” guard; NA parent makes d[NA,] -NA row contaminates ego every descendant, silently corrupting p <- colMeans(d) returned FE/FG.

text: exported makeSimPed calls data.table::setDT(ped) (reference) assigns sire/dam copy(), caller’s ped mutated (class flips data.table; sire/dam overwritten). createSimKinships similarly unconditional setDT + adds population column place.

what: NEW-52 — cumulateSimKinships.R:70-73 sd divide-by-zero / NaN · low · correctness
title: PED + GV Cluster Audit (Session 2)
text: sqrt(((n*squaredKinship) - sumKinship^2)/(n*(n-1))) — catastrophic-cancellation form; n = 1 → 0/0 = NaN; near-constant cells → tiny-negative root → NaN.

title: nprcgenekeepr — Project-Specific Learnings
text:
patterns recur across Learnings. canonical statement lives , stated ; Learning cites reflexes used first discovered [tag]. [tag] “(discovered #N)” means Learning N entered campaign. [verify-first] (discovered #5/#8a/#9a) — Empirically reproduce ACTUAL failure mode, confirm prescribed fix actually fixes failure, writing RED test. audit’s stated mechanism remedy can wrong: NEW-48 hard CRASH “silent NA” (character vs logical/integer NA indexing differ — m[NA_character_,] errors, m[NA_integer_,] returns silent NA row); NEW-25’s prescribed “terminal else” fixed crash fires FIRST (NA) (NaN/NA comparisons yield NA). Probe PAST precursor warning see terminal behavior (-handlers tryCatch(warning=,error=) hides error follows warning). Don’t theorize — verify empirically. [discriminating-RED] (discovered #15a/#20) — pre-existing test can silently PASS buggy output (-names fixture; coincidental equality; substring collision like grepl("1000") matching max="10000"). Design RED input buggy ≠ correct; key SPECIFIC rendered token (value="10", bare 10 collides min/max/step) right LAYER (UI HTML vs internal reactive vs cleaned studbook — server read may already work testServer input-effect passes HEAD). Probe real data first reachability existing assertions move. pre-existing test passing SILENTLY-corrupted output TELL bug real. [stop-vs-warning] (discovered #6/#8b) — Choose CURRENT baseline, per-mechanism (can differ within one function): silent-success → warning/NA (preserve success contract); already-crash → clear stop (preserve crash-contract, improve message). -repo sibling already enforces invariant supplies message precedent. [reachability] (discovered #5/#6) — Verify reachability per-mechanism full qcStudbook pipeline “fixing”; often MIXED (triggers masked, live) can DOUBLY-masked. Known maskers: addUIds (qcStudbook.R:180 — eliminates partial parentage), addParents (injects founder lines missing parents), convertSexCodes (folds H→U / NA→U), removeDuplicates (qcStudbook.R:277), kinship’s unique-id stop. checkParentAge integrity guard (drops NA-birth rows, checkParentAge.R:91). orphaned @noRd/@export symbol → exhaustive caller-trace (incl. .call/get/match.fun/eval + commented-consumers); side-effect bug → call-graph propagation (internal caller can INSULATE leak). grep inventory can NARROW scope (proving siblings unreachable) WIDEN . [regression-read] (discovered #2/#4) — Authoritative read = .data.frame(testthat::test_dir("tests/testthat", reporter="silent", stop_on_failure=FALSE)) pkgload::load_all(".") (else STALE installed namespace → phantom failures files never touched — see [stale-namespace]) NOT_CRAN=true (skip_on_cran/CI condition; bare test_dir clean read necessary sufficient — devtools::test/CI can ERROR). Sum failed error, watch warning column, just failed/error (green suite can ACQUIRE warning change different file). test-app-*/test-e2e-* files baseline noise — test_dir SKIPS (≈156–159), testthat::test_local() ERRORS (≈154, call -undefined create_test_app); isolate true offenders !grepl("test-app-|test-e2e-", file). [stale-namespace] (discovered #15b/#16c) — bare Rscript -e 'test_dir(...)' without load_all runs installed namespace, working tree → flood failures untouched files (TELL) change can read inverted. Likewise new cross-file helper’s object_usage_linter “visible global function definition” stale-namespace transient. /tmp-copy HEAD method (Learning #7) INVALID object_usage_linter — linting outside package dir loses .lintr namespace (HEAD--/tmp = 103 default-linter lints vs 21 -package — comparable). Authoritative: REINSTALL (R CMD INSTALL) + re-lint, HEAD~1-vs-HEAD counts -place. [lint-net-zero] (discovered #7) — .lintr suppresses findings HARDCODED line number; edit inserts/removes lines suppressed line shifts exclusion resurfaces pre-existing, intentionally-suppressed lint → bump exclusion’s line number, “fix” resurfaced finding. Confirm ’s pre-existing linting HEAD copy first: git show HEAD:path > /tmp/x.R; Rscript -e 'lintr::lint("/tmp/x.R")' (/tmp method invalid object_usage_linter — see [stale-namespace]). tests wholesale-excluded (.lintr:35) test edits lint-exempt config. Prove net-zero git stash push -- → lint HEAD -place → stash pop, diffing line CONTENT range. Match net-zero, lint-tripping idiom: explicit-L integers, nzchar() (x != ""), toString() (paste(collapse=)). [identical-proof] (discovered #15c/#16b) — Prove behavior-preserving refactor BYTE-identical() vs pre-change reference captured firsthand, INCLUDING full output seeded stochastic consumer (set.seed(42) reportGV()) deterministic path verified inside random function. Preserve empty-input contract (.call(rbind, -NULL) → NULL → guard back data.frame()). side-effect bug, snapshot target IMMUTABLE paste0(...) string, <- ped (shares SEXP — setDT/setattr mutate place). [idiom-inventory] (discovered #16a) — fix--instances refactor, inventory PREDICATE/idiom, concept’s NAME — variable naming hides sites (grep founder=10 sites; broad .na(sire)&.na(dam) sweep caught 2 ). Filter false positives (roxygen examples, xor/partial-parentage, hasBothParents, unrelated .na births/sex). Applies equally reference-mutation inventory (setDT/setDF/:=/set(/setattr/setkey) rownames(x)<- inventory. [right-sized-orchestration] (discovered #9-corollary/#16d) — Solo grep/probe mechanism+reachability deterministically settled (honest “trivial already-verified” per ultracode’s “unless already verified” — say rather reflexively orchestrating; heavier 3-lens workflow [empirical ‖ static ‖ adversarial-critic] ceremony). Run read-multi-agent discovery workflow broad current-state map MEDIUM-risk multi-feature slice; comment/dead-code/parser-inert change needs none. [completeness-workflow] (discovered #21c) — Follow single-pass discovery fan-adversarial COMPLETENESS-CRITIC pass hunts specifically omissions (catches parity gaps synthesis drops — exactly “executor reaches parity misses feature” failure planning grep-inventory exists prevent), multi-angle finder sweep fix-refactor (re-derive inventory predicate / keyword / idiom / layer). VERIFY critic’s findings firsthand — CONFIRMS, trusted. [macos-dupe-scan] (discovered #26c) — Scan * 2.* macOS duplicate files (git status … '* 2.*') document()/commit; tell man/ delta roxygen change (roxygen merges copies .Rd; % Please edit documentation … line names culprit) — test_dir (matches ^test.*\.R) double-runs duplicated test file (inflated pass count). Per SAFEGUARDS (didn’t create ) surface via AskUserQuestion MOVE /tmp (reversible), don’t delete; revert .Rd churn re-document() → zero-delta. [document-zero-delta] (discovered #22/#23) — roxygen-affecting edit run document() confirm zero man/+NAMESPACE delta. import(shiny) (NAMESPACE:168) blanket-covers new shiny controls (selectInput/textAreaInput/numericInput…) → @importFrom churn. [phase-3E-smoke] (discovered #22d) — appServer wiring / runtime-behavior change → launch runModularApp() confirm binds + HTTP 200 new controls render (grep served HTML namespaced ids). Build/test-clean ≠ runtime-clean (FM #24). [news-vs-changelog] (discovered #22d/#27e) — Completed work → CHANGELOG.md; PRUNE BACKLOG.md OPEN items close-(don’t let “✅ DONE” lines accrete — user-flagged 2026-06-04). NEWS.md = analytical-API release notes; add bullet real numeric/behavior change, CHECK NEWS.md -file precedent first (NEWS.md:85 carries parallel modular GVA iter 5000→1000 bullet). Pure-display/parity slices → CHANGELOG . [testServer-mechanics] (discovered #22b/#26a/#27c) — output$ returns list $html (assert .character(x$html)); output$ RUNS content fn returns WRITTEN FILE PATH (content unit-testable — read file); req(NULL) dead button surfaces error access. Drive DYNAMIC namespaced inputs LOCAL id (session$setInputs(curGrp1=…); read input[["curGrp"]] — never re-ns() server read; ns() belongs UI/renderUI side). set.seed() carries deterministically across eventReactive(input$formGroups) boundary. req()/isTruthy() treats zero-length LIST TRUE → auto-firing observer runs degenerate inputs → guard length(x) >= 1L, req(x). Internal reactiveVals DIRECTLY accessible testServer eval env (storedResults()/storedErrorLst()), via session$getReturned(). mock package fn called BARE NAME nested inside moduleServer’s closure, use testthat::local_mocked_bindings(fn = …, .package = "") — patches namespace binding GLOBALLY real caller resolves mock even nested inside observeEvent→moduleServer; mockery::stub(, …) transfer module level (module isn’t stubbed fn). Mutation-prove mock fires (unmocked, real fn errors / output never assigns) — discovered #29. [author-decision] (discovered #13a/#17a) — Surface genuine scope/approach/domain fork pre-RED AskUserQuestion evidence hand. literal “delegate X” may UNIMPLEMENTABLE (signature asymmetry); “support vs reject input” fork settled [domain-spec-authority]; “robust monolith” clamp author’s call. [refactor-] (discovered #18c/#20a) — Comment/dead-code cleanup, green--arrival test correction, inert-control removal new behavior new unit → declare REFACTOR-gate PRE-RED→REFACTOR; manufacture synthetic RED (asserting deliberately-wrong expectation just force red forbidden; skipping RED/GREEN HONEST, prohibited FM #17 erosion). Prove parser-/behavior-inert via identical(). Delete tautological test control echoed; don’t “fix” . [mutation-check] (discovered #20b) — Prove green--arrival test new guard DISCRIMINATES disabling guarded behavior -PLACE (perl -/Edit, git checkout restore — worktree, see [-worktree-baseline]) confirming NEW assertion FAILS; OLD assertion passing mutant coverage proof. tests use .nan, just .na (.na(NaN) TRUE R — (.na(x)) passes NA NaN; assert expect_false((.nan(x))) separate ). [domain-spec-authority] (discovered #13/#14c) — Settle support-vs-reject edge-input contracts project’s documented spec, general convention: input_format.html:86-97 “Alphanumeric characters (symbols)” (live app via modInput.R:152-153; named authority _input.Rmd:39-40). documented--UNENFORCED rule means enforcing real behavior change needing author sign-; prefer targeted rule (.-) broad spec unless author opts . [-worktree-baseline] (discovered #3) — HEAD git worktrees won’t run (worktree lacks renv/activate.R, .Rprofile aborts load_all fails). Establish clean-HEAD baseline -place revert git grep--HEAD structural proof, restore — instead worktree suite run. [ci-suite-parity] (discovered #32) — CI/config step RUNS test suite must replicate LOCAL verify command’s gating env, just opt-flag: set NPRC_RUN_E2E NOT_CRAN job-level env: — non-interactive Rscript runner skip_on_cran() fires unless NOT_CRAN set, whole tier SILENTLY SKIPS, test_dir(stop_on_failure=TRUE) BLIND skips (skip ≠ failure) → job goes green--nothing. Convert silent-skip class loud failure: res <- .data.frame(test_dir(..., stop_on_failure=TRUE)); (sum(res$passed)==0L) stop(...). browser-E2E R package also: INSTALL package (R CMD INSTALL . — AppDriver subprocess library()s + system.file(package=) resolves ); disable renv autoloader (RENV_CONFIG_AUTOLOADER_ENABLED:'false') deps+install+test land SITE lib subprocess sees (autoloader forces .libPaths()[1] renv’s PRIVATE lib, invisible subprocess starting installed shinytest/ dir project .Rprofile); assert chromote::find_chrome() resolves SINGLE EXISTING path (bare nzchar(NULL) passes vacuously). CI step can’t live-run verified statically (YAML parse + adversarial review + validate exact run-step R locally); flag -statically-verifiable bits (renv lib-path / subprocess interaction) explicit live-run watch items — never treat static-clean runtime-clean (FM #24). Extends [regression-read] READING suite AUTHORING CI runs . [flake-aware-validation] (discovered #34) — SINGLE green run process-count-/timing-sensitive browser tier PROVES nothing stability; “run ” exactly hides intermittent flake. Broadening test_dir(filter=…) run files ONE process load surfaces §5(8c) AppDriver-process-count dragon — intermittently (~1 transient Chrome error 5 local full-tier runs; file passes 8/8/8 isolation; concurrent load — e.g. adversarial review’s parallel agents — trigger). Validate N times (let review’s concurrency surface ), REPRODUCE firsthand characterize RATE + TRIGGER (contention-sensitivity) rather trusting agent panicking ([completeness-workflow]). stop_on_failure=TRUE even low-rate flake reds scheduled job, bring discovered flake owner scope AskUserQuestion ([author-decision]) — document + defer hardening (per-§5(8c) “run grouped” fresh processes) follow-can live-validated, vs harden now — rather silently shipping known-flaky CI; never ship CI hardening can validate unreachable live runner (FM-#24-adjacent). [deletion-namespace-fallout] (discovered #35) — Deleting R file also removes whatever ROXYGEN tags uniquely contribute NAMESPACE. getMinParentAge.R (@noRd, 0-caller orphan) SOLE carrier #' @import shiny, deleting dropped package-wide import(shiny) NAMESPACE (leaving partial importFrom list) modular UI died runtime find function "h5". reference/caller grep catch — reasons CALLS symbol, file’s roxygen EMITS; neither §10 inventory multi-modal sweep flagged (regression run ). file deletion: re-document(), diff NAMESPACE, run full regression / UI smoke; relocate still-needed sole @import/@importFrom retained file (e.g. R/-package.R). Extends [document-zero-delta] deletion case. [production--disguise] (discovered #36) — decomposing “test/quality/refactor” issue plan, classify work item whether actually requires PRODUCTION-code change; determinism/reproducibility hooks, perf, new public surface usually , even inside issue titled “strengthen tests.” Issue #40 (“strengthen E2E assertions”) read test-, determinism item needs gated set_seed() added TWO EXPORTED server functions (modGeneticValueServer/modBreedingGroupsServer ZERO set.seed — firsthand; issue’s “set.seed modBreedingGroupsServer” imprecise, must ADDED). Isolate item owner-gated, full RED→GREEN→REFACTOR + check() slice, distinct test-run--observe + [mutation-check] conversion slices; one item silently BREAKS prior “test-” scope boundary (8a–8d R-code-free) — call explicitly plan’s impact/scope section. [hard-gate-spike] (discovered #37) — plan designates load-bearing assumption HARD-GATE spike confirm live environment FIRST, treat spike HYPOTHESIS TEST: can FALSIFY planned mechanism, merely de-risk . (8e-1: §2.3/§4 .tab-content > .tab-pane.active + innerText-honors-visibility design WRONG — modules nest tabsetPanels .tab-content NON-UNIQUE [5 containers = 1 top-level navbar + 4 nested module sub-tabsets, active sub-panes “Input Format”/“Plot”/“Rankings”/“Groups”]; querySelector first-match latches onto nested pane nav, mid-fade nested element masked innerText visibility [hidden Home read 1895 chars].) Run dependent work; STOP failure (write conversions unconfirmed mechanism). BOUNDED read-DIAGNOSTIC finds corrected mechanism session spike succeeding (confirm--correct definition) — mechanism change DEVIATES approved plan, bring owner scope/approach AskUserQuestion ([author-decision]: apply-fix--complete vs checkpoint--stop), don’t silently redesign past gate (SAFEGUARDS mode-switch / FM #8). Fix pattern navbarPage nested tabsets: scope .tab-content inside .tab-pane (!t.closest('.tab-pane')) → direct-child .tab-pane.active (structural; dependence dynamic data-tabsetid; correctly scoped, innerText honor visibility — hidden pane reads ““). Extends [verify-first] PLANNED MECHANISM (vs audit’s bug mechanism). [output-dom-discriminator] (discovered #47) — Shiny renderDT/render* output read via app$get_value(output="-") returns NULL SUSPENDED (tab hidden, suspendWhenHidden=TRUE); moment tab activated UN-SUSPENDS non-NULL value (json-class ATOMIC string DT — v$json errors, coerce .character) even req() unmet / data loaded (empty
widget). .null(get_value(output=…)) discriminates SUSPENSION, DATA — passes green--arrival instant navigate_to_tab, data-bearing check. genuine data assertion, match RENDERED-DOM content via get_html_safe(app, "#-"): DataTables row-count info ("N entries"), column headers, length menu (dataTables_length). Refines plan §2.3’s “output tier” (get_value-empty--hidden claim half-true). Every 8e-6 DT target subject (pedigree pedigreeTable, GVA rankingsTable, breeding groupStats/groupKinTable). [e2e-subprocess-lib] (discovered #47) — shinytest2 AppDriver SUBPROCESS resolves package SYSTEM/site library (/Library/Frameworks/.../R-4.5/.../library), renv cache, E2E spike/run sets RENV_CONFIG_AUTOLOADER_ENABLED=false inst/shinytest/app.R library(nprcgenekeepr). LOCAL e2e spike test_file exercises whatever last R CMD INSTALLed system lib — can badly STALE (S47’s Jul-2025, ~3 months / dozens commits behind). REINSTALL current source local e2e spike/run R/ changed since: RENV_CONFIG_AUTOLOADER_ENABLED=false R CMD INSTALL ---multiarch ---docs --library= . (pure-R → seconds). LOCAL corollary [ci-suite-parity]’s “install + disable autoloader install+test land SITE lib subprocess sees”; renv-cache install (find.package renv-active) SEPARATE copy, irrelevant subprocess.

Apply: prompt contains multi-phase plan “implement” — recognize planning workstream.

what: Learning 2 — test_local errors vs failed (S3, NEW-15 regression verify)
title: nprcgenekeepr — Project-Specific Learnings
text: testthat::test_local() records test ERRORS separate error column, distinct failed (expectation failures). tally summing failed can read “0 fail” 100+ tests error. repo 154 pre-existing errors (every test-app-*/test-e2e-* file calls -undefined create_test_app(); error, skip, shinytest2+chromote installed). Reflexes: [regression-read]. Apply: whenever verifying “regressions” — count columns; treat pre-existing erroring files baseline; isolate change’s true delta FILE SET, single counter.

title: nprcgenekeepr — Project-Specific Learnings
text: HEAD git worktrees won’t run: worktree lacks renv/activate.R, .Rprofile aborts pkgload::load_all fails. pre-change baseline, revert single file place use structural proof (git grep showing symbol undefined HEAD) instead worktree suite run. Reflexes: [-worktree-baseline] (canonical). Apply: need clean-HEAD comparison — skip worktree; use -place revert git grep--HEAD argument.

what: Learning 4 — runner-dependent e2e noise (S4, NEW-34 regression verify)
title: nprcgenekeepr — Project-Specific Learnings
text: create_test_app baseline noise behaves differently runner: testthat::test_local() ERRORS test-app-*/test-e2e-* files (≈154 error), testthat::test_dir("tests/testthat") SKIPS (≈159 skipped, 0 error). Neither regression. Cleanest compute-change regression read: .data.frame(test_dir(..., reporter="silent")) + offender-isolation. Reflexes: [regression-read]. Apply: prefer test_dir + offender-isolation 0/0/0 signal; don’t alarmed skip↔︎error count shifts e2e files.

what: Learning 5 — prove reachability via the canonical pipeline (S4, NEW-34)

text: audit-flagged “latent” crash, prove reachability project’s CANONICAL pipeline (qcStudbook), hand-crafted input — account transforms re-establish guarded condition. NEW-34 needed empty pUnknown; removeAutoGenIds re-NA-s U-prefixed parents, “resolve NA parents” insufficient — also avoid U-prefixed parent ids. read-fan-workflow (caller-trace ‖ empirical-repro ‖ masking-critic) settled REACHABLE-vs-MASKED code changed. Reflexes: [verify-first][reachability][right-sized-orchestration]. Apply: “fixing” latent/masked audit item — reproduce via real pipeline; adversarial agent argue MASKED; write RED test.

what: Learning 6 — reachability splits by MECHANISM (S5, NEW-40 findGeneration)
title: nprcgenekeepr — Project-Specific Learnings
text: “silent NA / silent degradation” item usually splits mechanism, one yes/. dangling-parent path MASKED addParents qcStudbook, CYCLE path REACHABLE full pipeline checkParentAge drops NA-birth rows (checkParentAge.R:91) isn’t cycle guard. Enumerate trigger separately; fix single CHOKE POINT ((anyNA(gen)) warning(...)) every mechanism covered ; prefer warning stop keep return contract — callers unaffected (provably non-spurious — valid acyclic self-contained pedigree always places every id). COROLLARY: adding warning() can trip EXISTING test exercises degenerate path — scan suite’s warning column (just failed/error) update test EXPECT diagnostic, suppress . Reflexes: [reachability][stop-vs-warning][regression-read]. Apply: verify reachability per-mechanism, guard choke point warning, scan warning column.

what: Learning 8 — audit MECHANISM can be wrong; stop-vs-warning by current mode (S7, NEW-48 calcFEFG/calcFE/calcFG)
title: nprcgenekeepr — Project-Specific Learnings
text: () audit’s stated mechanism can wrong — reproduce ACTUAL failure mode first. audit called NEW-48 “silent NA corruption”; empirical repro proved hard CRASH (subscript bounds): m[NA_character_,] ERRORS m[NA_integer_/NA_logical_,] returns silent NA row, calcFEFG coerces ids character (toCharacter), lone-NA parent NA_character_ (3-lens workflow — empirical ‖ static ‖ adversarial-critic — converged CRASH--corruption). (b) stop-vs-warning depends CURRENT failure mode (INVERSE #4/#6): NEW-48’s baseline ALREADY crash, clear stop() contract-PRESERVING (currently-succeeding input now fails — message improves), warning+degrade behavior change. Reachability MIXED: M2 canonical qcStudbook→reportGV pipeline MASKED addUIds (qcStudbook.R:180); M1 direct exported call + M3 trimPedigree(removeUninformative=TRUE, addBackParents=FALSE) via removeUninformativeFounders.R:52-53 REACHABLE. Reflexes: [verify-first][stop-vs-warning][reachability]. Apply: empirically reproduce actual failure mode (character vs logical/integer NA indexing differ); choose stop-vs-warning current behavior.

title: nprcgenekeepr — Project-Specific Learnings
text: () prescribed FIX can wrong mechanism (extends #8a). audit framed “three-way /else-terminal else,” implying “add terminal else.” NaN > 0.5 NA, (NA) errors “missing value TRUE/FALSE needed” FIRST — fall-— terminal else fixed (~1-min repro caught non-fix). (b) Reachability isn’t always qcStudbook-masking question: getProportionLow @noRd consumer dead/commented makeGeneticDiversityDashboard (NEW-20) — “verify reachability” meant exhaustive caller-trace, fix robustness-hardening orphaned retained helper, empty/edge-input contract pure DOMAIN decision author. Reflexes: [verify-first][reachability][author-decision][right-sized-orchestration]. what: Learning 10 — disprove an unreachable mechanism; both-ways stop/warning (S9, NEW-52 cumulateSimKinships)
title: nprcgenekeepr — Project-Specific Learnings
text: () audit’s mechanism can UNREACHABLE function’s VALUE DOMAIN — strict TDD response DISPROVE fix . M1 (n=1 → 0/0=NaN) reproduced, M2 (“near-constant cells → tiny-negative root → sqrt NaN”) — kinship() returns dyadic rationals (sums powers ½), exact IEEE-754, constant-across-sims cells cancel exactly 0 (probe: 0 negative numerators, 117 exactly-0, 0 NaN n=10/100), unstable expression reachable cumulateSimKinships, non-dyadic data can’t reach . failing test can written → code; pmax(num,0) clamp speculative, untestable defensive code. (b) stop-vs-warning can apply WAYS ONE function: n=1 currently succeeds silently (returns valid mean/min/max + NaN sd) → NA+warning preserves success (NEW-40 side); n=0 already crashes (uninitialized minKinship) → clear stop preserves crash-contract (NEW-48 side) — function, opposite baselines, opposite remedies. COROLLARY: .na(NaN) TRUE — RED test must assert expect_false((.nan(x))), (.na(x)) (passes ). Reachability grep-settled: cumulateSimKinships @exported public orphan (zero live callers) → workflow (Learning #9 corollary). Reflexes: [verify-first][stop-vs-warning][mutation-check][reachability]. Apply: reproduce claimed mechanism; disprove + skip unreachable one; pick stop-vs-warning per-mechanism; use .nan tests.

title: nprcgenekeepr — Project-Specific Learnings

Docs docs/methodology/ --edit reference copies (refresh overwrite). dashboard scores CHANGELOG.md (NEWS.md) changelog; NEWS.md remains CRAN-facing release notes. Last synced f32d780 (S10, 2026-05-31). Apply: whenever updating methodology editing synced file — relocate customizations CLAUDE.md, keep synced files canonical, re-run bin/status = current. Don’t answer methodology-governed questions general convention — consult project’s source truth (synced files + methodology_dashboard.py).

title: nprcgenekeepr — Project-Specific Learnings
text: () NEW bug class — “side-effect---caller” — audit -claims HARM, just mechanism (extends #8a/#9a/#10a “audit-claim-wrong” lineage). audit said makeSimPed “overwrites sire/dam” createSimKinships “adds population column place”; empirically false. leak -reference CLASS flip data.frame→data.table (setDT, mutates attributes place); content preserved post-setDT ped$col[…]<-v triggers $<-.data.table’s shallow-copy--rebind (decoupling local ped column write). Realized harm = [-semantics divergence CALLER’s later code (df[1]=column vs dt[1]=ROW; df[,"x"]=vector vs dt[,"x"]=1-col table). (b) Reachability side-effect bug CALL-GRAPH-propagation question, qcStudbook-masker (NEW-37/40/48) value-domain (NEW-52) question: cumulateSimKinships copies via line-52 ped$population<-… sim loop, leak — exposure direct calls three @exported fns. Fix: setDT(ped) → ped <- data.table::.data.table(ped) (copies inputs, byte-identical output — probed; minimal swap suffices $<- never leaks new column caller either — unconditional copy() needed). Grep FULL reference-mutation inventory (setDT/setDF/:=/set(/setattr/setkey) — handoff named 2 sites, audit named makeSimPed+createSimKinships, real cluster 3 (fix--instances, workstream Q4). RED-assert caller’s object UNCHANGED (class(ped) stays "data.frame") immutable snapshot. Mechanism+reachability deterministic-probe--grep-settled → workflow (3rd consecutive). Reflexes: [verify-first][reachability][idiom-inventory][identical-proof]. Apply: separate real leak (often just class/attr flip) claimed corruption; trace whether internal callers insulate ; fix .data.table; RED-assert caller-unchanged.

what: Learning 15 — mechanism+fix both correct → the EXISTING test is the risk (S15, NEW-16 summarizeKinshipValues)
title: nprcgenekeepr — Project-Specific Learnings
text: () mechanism fix correct, load-bearing risk pre-existing test silently PASSES buggy output (NEW-45 C.003 “test passing corrupted output” pattern). NEW-16: secondQuartile used fivenum()[1] (min) instead [2] (lower hinge); existing test_summarizeKinshipValues.R:75 asserts secondQuartile[10]==0 STILL passes fix (row’s hinge coincidentally equals min). discriminating RED uses input buggy≠correct: numbers=1:5 → fivenum=1,2,3,4,5 hinge 2≠min 1. Probe real data first (5/153 rows change; confirm assertions move). (b) TOOLING TRAP: test_dir() bare Rscript -e WITHOUT load_all runs stale installed namespace → phantom failures untouched files (NEW-16’s first run: 46 failed / 68 error across ~40 files never touched, every prior fix missing installed build) + change reads inverted; repo’s documented “Clean regression read” (CLAUDE.md “Build / Test / Verify”) OMITS load_all (valid already-loaded/-sync session). Always prepend suppressMessages(pkgload::load_all(".")) (corrected: 0/0/1977). (c) Prove behavior-preserving refactor (rbind--loop → preallocated list + single .call(rbind,…)) identical() vs captured reference (seeded pipeline + synthetic input + -skipped edge); preserve empty-input contract (.call(rbind, -NULL)→NULL→guard data.frame()). Grep/probe-settled → workflow (6th consecutive). Reflexes: [discriminating-RED][stale-namespace][regression-read][identical-proof]. Apply: assume pre-existing test passes bug — RED buggy≠correct; always load_all; prove “behavior change” identical().

(b) hidden divergence risk WIRING DON’T relocate: calcFG/calcFEFG reassign ped <- toCharacter(ped) calcRetention; moving toCharacter helper feed ORIGINAL (possibly factor) ped — silent divergence factor input (tests exercise). Verify downstream’s sensitivity (calcRetention %%-coercion-robust factors) don’t RELY — make equivalence hold CONSTRUCTION: helper returns list(p, ped) wrapper feeds calcRetention coerced ped. (c) TDD RED pure refactor = test NEW unit’s existence (PED-1 pattern — cross-function characterization already PASSES); preserve function’s exact error message single guard parameterizing caller arg (one guard, byte-identical messages — strictly conservative generic message existing regexp="partial parentage" tests tolerated). Note .caller trip object_name_linter (.lintr styles = snake/Camel/camel; cf. kinship.R’s # nolint father.id) → use caller. (d) Deterministic identical() gold standard (FE/FG char factor, full set.seed(42) reportGV() object [live calcFEFG caller], 3 guard messages); 3-agent adversarial-equivalence workflow (static body-diff vs GREEN commit via git show, 20 empirical OLD-vs-NEW edge tests transcribing originals, contract/guard/namespace) independently returned 0 divergences — CONFIRMS, doesn’t discover. Lint net-zero (new-helper object_usage finding Learning #16c stale-namespace transient — vanishes load_all/reinstall). Reflexes: [author-decision][identical-proof][completeness-workflow][lint-net-zero]. (c) Non-obvious browser-E2E CI requirements parent §7 omitted: must INSTALL package (R CMD INSTALL . setup-r-dependencies — inst/shinytest/app.R library(nprcgenekeepr), create_test_app() uses system.file("shinytest", package=); pure-R → fast, src/); renv autoloader makes R CMD INSTALL target renv’s PRIVATE lib AppDriver subprocess (starts installed shinytest/ dir, project .Rprofile) can’t see → RENV_CONFIG_AUTOLOADER_ENABLED:'false' install SITE lib; find_chrome() assert must check single EXISTING path (nzchar(NULL) passes vacuously); browser-actions/setup-chrome@v2 chrome-path → CHROMOTE_CHROME via $GITHUB_ENV; chromote auto-adds ---sandbox CI set (manual flag ubuntu 24.04). Grounded design researched current best practice (setup-chrome@v2 latest = v2; ubuntu-latest ships Chrome; chromote CI defaults) validated EXACT run-step + Chrome-assert R locally. (e) Static-CI verification HONESTY (FM #24): live GitHub run DEFERRED (owner chose static+adversarial; branch add-methodology remote → live run creates remote feature branch + outward CI). Verify statically (YAML parse + adversarial review + exact run-step R validated locally green = 37/0/0/0) flag ONE thing statically verifiable — renv lib-path / AppDriver-subprocess interaction — #1 live-run watch item; don’t treat static-clean runtime-clean. what: Learning 34 — third CONFIG/run-and-observe sub-phase; the spike PREVENTED helper work; a single validation run MASKED a process-count flake the ultracode review caught; close #39 + document (S34, Phase 8d / issue #39)
title: nprcgenekeepr — Project-Specific Learnings
text: Implemented Phase 8d conversion (FINAL #39 sub-phase): 5 interaction/menu E2E files green opt-+ broaden CI run-step filter full ^(app|e2e)- tier (23 files) + close #39 + file 8e (#40). () config/run--observe pattern repeats, 8d REAL spike (§8.2 navbarMenu) meant helper work — [verify-first] PREVENTED (spike can SHRINK scope, just de-risk): set_inputs(mainNavbar="Settings"/""/"Help") → get_value(input="mainNavbar") reads child label back TRUE 3 (navbarMenu children tab inputs just like top-level tabs), provisional navigate_to_menu_item delegate--navigate_to_tab body already FINAL — DOM dropdown-open+click, RED→GREEN. Running spike classifying turned handoff’s “MEDIUM-HIGH 🐉, may need real helper” config/run--observe; classify via AskUserQuestion 53/53 evidence hand (synthetic RED). code touch: finalize docstring (body byte-identical) + CI filter. (b) [flake-aware-validation] — headline lesson, direct CORRECTION Learning #33’s claim single-process run “discharges AppDriver-process-count dragon”: 18 files didn’t bite, broadening 23 one process SURFACED . SINGLE green full-tier run (193/0/0/0) proved nothing stability — “broaden + run ” (S33 handoff’s phrasing) exactly HIDES intermittent flake. ultracode 4-lens review caught (run #1 = 191/0/0/1 error workflow-integration.R “maintains state”; isolated 8/8/8) — review’s 4 concurrent agents pressuring Chrome trigger (contention-sensitivity). [completeness-workflow]: review CONFIRMS, verify — REPRODUCED firsthand (2 fresh dedicated runs clean → low-rate ~1/5, contention-driven) rather trusting agent panicking. (c) flake found mid-close SCOPE FORK, thing paper ([author-decision]): stop_on_failure=TRUE even low-rate flake reds scheduled job, brought NEW-information----original-gate owner AskUserQuestion — close #39 + document (chosen) vs harden-now (per-§5(8c) “run grouped” fresh processes) vs keep-narrower. Hardening can validated live GitHub runner (flake environmental + branch isn’t remote) DEFERRED #40, shipped unvalidated (shipping unvalidatable CI complexity FM-#24-adjacent risk). (d) [right-sized-orchestration] ultracode = run review — EXACT inverse #33’s honest decline: #33 ultracode + 1-line change → workflow; #34 ultracode + consequential DECISION surface (close long-lived tracking issue? #40 complete? diff minimal?) even though CODE surface trivial (comment + 1-line filter). panel earned keep: Lens-1/3 -confirm (diff comment-+ minimal; #40 captures every §2.4/§2.5/§6 item + new navbarMenu false-positive); Lens-4 caught real .DS_Store BLOCKER → commit EXPLICIT git add 2 intended files (never -; pre-existing macOS binary must ride along — [macos-dupe-scan]’s commit-hygiene sibling); Lens-2 caught flake. Match orchestration DECISION surface, just code surface. (e) Honesty nuances: spike resolved “input VALUE reaches navbarMenu child” — “navigation works”; visible pane truly switch (navbar “” highlights; grepl(body) passes via §2.3 hidden-DOM) → §8.3 false-positive, deferred 8e/#40 (overstate spike). #39 closed owner’s ACTUAL scope (§1.1 “executable + CI green opt-” = LOCAL validation + wired CI); TWO live-run watch items now ride first master run (renv lib-path + flake). Diff comment-+ CI → document() N/, tests/+.github lint-exempt, * 2.* source dupes (.Rproj.user/, gitignored); non-e2e regression 0 failed/0 error (2159 passed, 156 e2e-skipped, 5 pre-existing modPyramid warnings); test-infra/CI → CHANGELOG , NEWS. Reflexes: [verify-first][flake-aware-validation][completeness-workflow][right-sized-orchestration][author-decision][regression-read][refactor-][ci-suite-parity][phase-3E-smoke][macos-dupe-scan][news-vs-changelog]. NEVER trust single green run process-count-/timing-sensitive browser tier ([flake-aware-validation]) — validate N times let adversarial review’s concurrency surface flake, reproduce firsthand characterize rate+trigger, bring discovered flake owner scope decision (document + defer hardening follow-can live-validated, vs harden now) rather silently shipping known-flaky stop_on_failure CI. what: Learning 35 — Phase 9: retire the monolith (irreversible delete); a deleted file’s sole @import is load-bearing NAMESPACE fallout the reference-grep misses; full check() is a strictly stronger gate than the regression-read (S35, Phase 9 / issue #27)
title: nprcgenekeepr — Project-Specific Learnings
text: FINAL conversion phase: runGeneKeepR() → lifecycle::deprecate_soft() alias launching runModularApp(port=6013L, launch.browser=TRUE); deleted inst/application/ (17 files) + orphans getMinParentAge/getLogo/shouldShowErrorTab/modMinimalTest; closed #27. Strict TDD (RED→GREEN gated) + 4 owner AskUserQuestions + pre-RED→RED / RED→GREEN gates. () Pre-flight IRREVERSIBLE delete RE-RUNNING (stale, Session-21) §10 grep-inventory read-multi-modal sweep + completeness-critic, FIRSTHAND-verify every load-bearing claim ([verify-first][completeness-workflow][right-sized-orchestration]): system.file("application") SOLE live ref (R/runGenekeepr.R:19); inst/www/ (modular app’s data-ready.js, appUI.R:9) DIFFERENT directory deleted inst/application/www/ — conflating breaks app; lifecycle already dep; 17 files tracked → git revert-able (§15). sweep even self-contradicted getLogo (“exported ∴ keep” vs §10 “delete”) — exported ≠ keep SOLE caller monolith deleted (public-API removal → NEWS bullet). (b) DELETION NAMESPACE FALLOUT — inventory’s blind spot ([deletion-namespace-fallout]): getMinParentAge.R @noRd, 0-caller orphan, carried package’s #' @import shiny; deleting silently dropped import(shiny) NAMESPACE (leaving partial importFrom list) → modular UI died find function "h5". Neither §10 sweep flagged (reasoned CALLERS, file’s roxygen EMITS); REGRESSION RUN caught . Fix: relocate @import shiny R/nprcgenekeepr-package.R; re-document(); re-verify. (c) RED alias without launching server ([discriminating-RED][testServer-mechanics]): testthat::local_mocked_bindings runModularApp (pkg) runApp (.package="shiny") → test runs clean HEAD (returns monolith sentinel, deprecation) post-impl (modular sentinel + deprecation); lifecycle::expect_deprecated() forces verbosity; system.file("application", package=…)=="" clean RUNTIME RED “monolith longer ships” (split test_monolith_removed.R PAIRED deletion commit every commit stays green). 3 commits: reversible code → standalone deletion → docs (§15 single-revert). (d) full devtools::check() STRICTLY STRONGER gate [regression-read] — caught PRE-EXISTING, unrelated defect prior sessions’ regression-read never surfaced: a2interactive.Rmd’s error-list table hardcoded 9 descriptions getEmptyErrorLst() returns 10 (NEW-45 invalidIdChars field), failing vignette build (data.frame(): 10 vs 9). surfaced prior sessions used regression-read gate never ran full check(). Owner-gated fixing fix: commit (bundled — scope discipline / FM #8). Final check() = 0 errors / 0 warnings; pre-existing NOTEs (non-standard top-level dev files; stale spelling.Rout.save baseline ~60 domain words). (e) a3manual/a2interactive .md/.html/.R STALE--DESIGN release artifacts (dated Jan 20, pre-Phases-1–8) — force-reknit (months unrelated regeneration noise + heavy-chunk failure risk); check() builds vignettes SOURCE anyway, source edit matters. Re-knit actively-maintained README.md/NEWS.md. Reflexes: [verify-first][completeness-workflow][right-sized-orchestration][author-decision][discriminating-RED][testServer-mechanics][regression-read][document-zero-delta][deletion-namespace-fallout][phase-3E-smoke][news-vs-changelog]. Apply: deleting files, account file’s ROXYGEN tags uniquely contribute NAMESPACE (sole @import/@importFrom) — re-document() + diff NAMESPACE + run full regression / UI smoke deletion; never trust reference-grep alone ([deletion-namespace-fallout]). Pre-flight irreversible delete re-run inventory sweep + firsthand load-bearing checks + owner gate. Run FULL check() (just regression-read) release-affecting deliverable — gate exercises vignette-build / examples / spelling; fix PRE-EXISTING failure surfaces separate fix: commit, bundled.

what: Learning 36 — third PLANNING deliverable; a “strengthen tests” issue hid a PRODUCTION change; a discovery-workflow’s HEADLINE COUNTS are themselves a verify-first target (S36, Phase 8e plan / issue #40)

what: Learning 37 — first EXECUTION slice of 8e; the hard-gate spike FALSIFIED the plan’s load-bearing selector, and the bounded diagnostic that found the fix IS the spike succeeding (S37, Phase 8e-1 / issue #40)
title: nprcgenekeepr — Project-Specific Learnings
text: Implemented slice 8e-1: 4 active-pane helpers (get_active_pane_text/get_active_pane_value/wait_for_active_pane/assert_active_pane) tests/testthat/helper-shinytest2.R (browser-free RED→GREEN) + live-Chrome spike (HARD GATE) + test-e2e-summary-statistics-module.R conversion (8 tautologies/wrong-tab → behavioral active-pane assertions). Strict TDD, gated. () [hard-gate-spike] — load-bearing spike FALSIFIED planned mechanism (R1 fired). plan §2.3/§4 specified .tab-content > .tab-pane.active + innerText-honors-visibility, flagged “confirm live Chrome FIRST, STOP fails.” spike DISCONFIRMED : modules nest tabsetPanels, .tab-content NON-UNIQUE — 5 containers (1 top-level navbar + 4 nested; nested active sub-panes “Input Format”/“Plot”/“Rankings”/“Groups”), querySelector first-match latched onto nested “Input Format” Settings nav (assert_active_pane(Settings)=FALSE, item 4 failed), mid-fade nested element made innerText look like ignored visibility (hidden Home read 1895). spike load-bearing assumption hypothesis test — can FALSIFY, just de-risk. (b) bounded read-DIAGNOSTIC found corrected mechanism spike succeeding (redesign mode-switch). second read-diagnostic spike (conversion code) proved corrected selector — .tab-content inside .tab-pane (!t.closest('.tab-pane')), direct-child .tab-pane.active: structurally resolved (dependence dynamic data-tabsetid=8517), tracked EVERY navigation incl. navbarMenu(“”) “Settings” child, — correctly scoped — innerText honor visibility (hidden Pedigree=0). deviates approved plan’s mechanism (R1), brought owner scope/approach AskUserQuestion ([author-decision]: apply-fix--complete [chosen] vs checkpoint--stop vs literal-stop) rather silently redesigning past gate (SAFEGUARDS / FM #8); confirmed corrected helpers 17/17 live spike. (c) Browser-free unit tests SURVIVE mechanism rewrite fake stubs key JS’s INVARIANTS, exact text (#31 fake-AppDriver-stub idiom extended active-pane helpers). fake_app_pane discriminates inspecting get_js arg data-value vs innerText substring simulates wait_for_js success embedded label == data_value; fake_app_pane_liar (wait succeeds value≠label) proves assert_active_pane’s redundant identical(get_active_pane_value, tab_label) guard. substrings survive selector change (corrected JS still reads getAttribute('data-value')/innerText), 11 new tests / 59 expectations stayed GREEN across fix — unit layer proves CONTRACT (never-throw + pane/content discrimination), live spike proves BROWSER TRUTH. (d) wrong-tab RED→GREEN [mutation-check] proof two directions, spike already captured RED. Tests 2–8 navigated “Genetic Value Analysis” (§2.4/#33d wrong-tab defect — “Summary Statistics” tabPanel, appUI.R:156-159), converted assert_active_pane(app,"Summary Statistics",…) FALSE nav targets GVA (RED — captured live: “assert SS GVA = FALSE”) TRUE nav→“Summary Statistics” (GREEN). post-conversion [mutation-check] (one boot: wrong-tab→FALSE, correct-tab→TRUE) re-proves discrimination test-file level (old expect_true(TRUE) passed ). Assert STATIC UI — export-button labels, h3 “Summary Statistics Plots”, bottom population-genetics guidance HTML statically defines “Founder Equivalents”/“Founder Genome Equivalents”; founder/quartile TABLES + rendered plots data-dependent → deferred 8e-6 (§8e-1 dragon-2 deferral, honored). (e) Phase-3E / scope: deliverable lives test tree (helper-shinytest2.R + test_helper_shinytest2.R + one converted e2e file) → SUITE + live AppDriver spike runtime (#31 “Phase-3E N/; suite runtime” pattern); drive real app (17/17 spike + 8/8 e2e browser run). tests/ .lintr-excluded → lint-exempt; R/ roxygen → document() N/; test-infra → CHANGELOG , NEWS. Non-e2e regression 0 failed/0 error (2122 passed, 159 e2e-skipped, 5 pre-existing modPyramid warnings). Committed 3 intended test files via explicit git add (pre-existing .DS_Store/..Rcheck//audit-html must ride along — [macos-dupe-scan]’s commit-hygiene sibling, #34d); transient /tmp/spike_*.R+/tmp/mutation_check.R committed. title: nprcgenekeepr — Project-Specific Learnings

what: Learning 40 — Pedigree-family run-and-observe conversion (8e-2 part B): the genuine-grepl-vs-tautology conversion split, the genuine-to-NULL data-dependent sub-case, and a PRE-GATE adversarial refutation of the whole map (S40, Phase 8e-2 Pedigree family / issue #40)
title: nprcgenekeepr — Project-Specific Learnings
text: Converted 3 Pedigree-family E2E files (pedigree-module 5 / pedigree-detailed 6 / pedigree-tutorial 8 = 19 browser-booting blocks) content-blind navigate_to_tab → grepl(get_html_safe(app,"body")) idiom assert_active_pane(app,"Pedigree Browser",<pattern>). class #38/#39 — PURE [refactor-] run--observe (defect; Pedigree pane already renders, “Pedigree Browser” tabPanel title appUI.R:130, navigate_to_tab’s 3rd fallback arg explicit documented -OP helper-shinytest2.R:245-250 — re-verified firsthand, wrong-tab defect), gated PRE-RED→run--observe [author-decision]; [mutation-check] supplies rigor (synthetic RED). () conversion PRINCIPLED SPLIT OLD assertion’s kind, uniform rewrite. Two classes need different treatment: genuine expect_true(grepl(orig, html)) assert already encodes real intent → KEEP original regex verbatim rescope haystack active pane (faithful refactor: pattern, tighter scope — module L6/L25/L42/L76, detailed L6/L25/L82, dragons); expect_true(TRUE) tautology (dead has_* <- grepl(...)) behavior preserve → free choose PRECISE default-visible anchor named control (“Display Unknown IDs”/“Focal Animals”/“Choose CSV file”/“Trim pedigree”/“Update Focal Animals”/“Clear Focal Animals”, modPedigree.R:52,72,79,86,105,118). Don’t uniformly substitute precise anchors (loses faithfulness genuine asserts) uniformly keep-regex (dead tautology regexes never asserted — precise anchor strictly honest discriminating). (b) GENUINE assert can ALSO become NULL — data-dependent sub-case, distinct #39’s nonexistent-feature NULL. #39’s honest-tautology rule NULLs tautology whose named feature doesn’t exist. real expect_true(grepl("table|dataTable", html)) assert (module L59, detailed L63) must ALSO convert NULL-pattern assert_active_pane(app,"Pedigree Browser") — table fake, data-dependent: DT::DTOutput(ns("pedigreeTable")) gated req(pedigreeData()) (modPedigree.R:150,306) tests load studbook, table renders EMPTY div innerText. original regex matched “table” appears elsewhere whole-body DOM (CSS/JS/pedigreeTable id ATTRIBUTE) — exactly content-blindness conversion closes. test “keep regex” whether least one alternative DEFAULT-VISIBLE pane innerText; NONE (target data-bearing), drop NULL + flag content assertion deferred 8e-6 (destination #39’s data-bearing deferral; DataTables “Show X entries” pagination, tutorial L28, data-dependent case). Result: 4 honest NULLs (module L59, detailed L63, detailed L101 [nonexistent “status filter”], tutorial L28), 15 content patterns; NULL assert_active_pane still genuinely upgrades old expect_true(TRUE)/content-blind grepl (catches wrong-tab / silent--op nav). (c) always-rendered LEFT-panel guidance HTML carries dragon column-keywords — extends #39(c) active-nested-tab guidance unconditional left panel. dragons (pedigree-detailed:57 sire|dam|parent|offspring|ancestor|descendant, pedigree-tutorial:174 sire|dam|sex|birth|exit|age|gen|population) resolve inst/extdata/ui_guidance/pedigree_browser.html (includeHTML modPedigree.R:41-44), lists “Ego ID, Sire ID, Dam ID, Sex, Generation, Population columns… Birth Date, Exit Date, Age”. Unlike #39’s Input case (anchor lived ACTIVE nested tab, nested-tab state mattered), modPedigree nested tabsetPanel — guidance column unconditionally visible, column names reliable static anchors. (Honesty self-correction: draft cited helpText “ancestors focal animals”; actual modPedigree.R:124-127 text “relatives focal animals” — critic caught misquote; verdict unaffected since guidance “Sire ID, Dam ID” independently satisfies sire|dam.) (d) PRE-GATE adversarial refutation WHOLE map — verify conversion committing owner gate, . Rather pose gate self-authored map discover bad pattern (slow, 19-Chrome-boot) browser run, ran 4-agent workflow (3 per-file skeptics told default--refuted + cross-checking critic) 19 proposed patterns AskUserQuestion: 0/19 refuted, critic GO, every pattern confirmed default-visible, 4 NULLs confirmed honest (overlooked static anchor), [mutation-check] labels “Color Scheme”/“Bin Size” confirmed FOREIGN (grep: modPyramid.R:31-32). [right-sized-orchestration] applied conversion slice (MEDIUM-risk 19-block multi-file map earns read-refutation sweep; browser run remains authoritative [verify-first]) [completeness-workflow] (critic hunts overlooked honest anchor make NULL dishonest). Cheap relative wasted browser cycle; owner gate carried verified map. (e) Phase-3E / scope: test-tree-→ browser run (19 blocks / 19 expectations — 1:1 swap, net 0) + live mutation-check spike runtime (#31 pattern); drove real app. [regression-read] non-e2e 2162 passed / 0 failed / 0 error / 0 non-e2e offenders (156 skipped, 5 pre-existing modPyramid warnings) — e2e-change self-skips create_test_app() (helper-shinytest2.R:196) non-e2e counts definitionally unaffected (count differs S39’s reported 2122 invocation set NOT_CRAN=true, surfacing non-e2e tests — orthogonal change, regression). tests/ .lintr-excluded; R/ change → document()/NEWS ([news-vs-changelog] → CHANGELOG ). Anchor dragon column-keywords unconditional guidance HTML. Refute whole pattern map read-adversarial workflow gate; browser run still authoritative verify.

what: Learning 41 — Pyramid-family run-and-observe conversion (8e-2 part C, FINAL → 8e-2 COMPLETE): the NULL test is “does ≥1 regex alternative match DEFAULT-VISIBLE innerText?” NOT “is the named feature real / data-dependent?” (refines #40b); keep a genuine regex VERBATIM even when the test NAME overclaims; and the pre-gate refutation EARNED its keep by correcting 2/12 self-authored over-NULLs (S41, Phase 8e-2 Pyramid family / issue #40)

Faithfulness = pattern, tighter scope; overclaiming name pre-existing slice’s defect fix. code comment records match via static “age” labels, real max-age control. what: Learning 42 — Genetic-Value family run-and-observe conversion (8e-3 part B-1, FIRST 8e-3 cut): a tautology that has a DEAD computed grepl pattern → REVIVE that exact pattern rescoped (vs #41’s fresh-anchor case); the pre-gate refutation NARROWS a revived pattern by pruning FOREIGN alternatives while keeping real-but-data-dependent ones; and a missing-NOT_CRAN regression read fakes a 40-pass “regression” (S42, Phase 8e-3 Genetic-Value family / issue #40)
title: nprcgenekeepr — Project-Specific Learnings
text: Converted 3 Genetic-Value-family E2E files (genetic-value-module 7 / -detailed 7 / -tutorial 8 = 22 browser-booting blocks) content-blind navigate_to_tab → grepl(get_html_safe(app,"body")) idiom assert_active_pane(app,"Genetic Value Analysis",<pattern>), FIRST 8e-3 cut. class #38–#41 — PURE [refactor-] run--observe (defect; GV pane already renders, “Genetic Value Analysis” tabPanel title appUI.R:148 == module h3 modGeneticValue.R:32), gated PRE-RED→run--observe [author-decision]; [mutation-check] supplies rigor (synthetic RED). Outcome: 16 keep-regex · 3 REVIVE · 1 ANCHOR · 2 NULL. () NEW sub-case — tautology dead computed grepl pattern → REVIVE exact pattern, rescoped, fresh anchor (#41(c) handled expect_true(TRUE)/nchar tautologies surviving regex). Three blocks read has_X <- grepl(PATTERN, html, ...) asserted expect_true(TRUE) — author WROTE intended check never asserted . faithful conversion revives PATTERN active pane: D3 founder|equivalent|FE|genetic (✓“founder” guidance “rare founder alleles” + “genetic” h3), D6 report|export|download|summary (✓“Export /Subset” download buttons + “Summary” nested-tab label). remaining content-LENGTH tautology (D7 nchar(html)>200, regex) still gets guidance ANCHOR (“ranks animals”, genetic_value.html) per #41(c). (b) pre-gate refutation NARROWS revived pattern — pruning FOREIGN alternatives KEEPING real--data-dependent ones — distinct correction mode #40d/#41d’s NULL/un-NULL. T8 (revived focal|display|Show.*entries|search|filter) corrected just filter: four alternatives (focal/display/Show.*entries/search) COPY-PASTE artifacts another module’s test appear NOWHERE GV pane, “filter” matches default-visible text (“Filter View”/“Filter IDs”). Contrast D3/D6, whose non-matching alternatives (founder-EQUIVALENTS, report) REAL GV concepts rendered DATA 8e-6 → keep verbatim (faithful author intent). Rule: reviving dead multi-alternative pattern, KEEP alternatives genuine pane concepts (default-visible now, data-bearing output later); DROP alternatives foreign module entirely. genuine, already-passing grepl (16 keeps, incl. 3 dragons M4/D1/T4) stays VERBATIM regardless (#41b) — prune applies REVIVED dead patterns authoring new assertion. (c) 2 NULL (T5 “Value Designation”, T7 “Z-score”) — data-dependent results concepts absent static UI/guidance, faithful default-visible alternative → assert pane-active , defer data-bearing assertion 8e-6 (#40b/#41a). (d) regression read OMITS NOT_CRAN=true fakes regression. first [regression-read] (NOT_CRAN) returned 2122 passed / 159 skipped — 40-pass DROP vs 2162 baseline looked alarming. test-tree-edit e2e files (self-skip create_test_app() helper-shinytest2.R:196) lower non-e2e passes — impossibility TELL. Cause: without NOT_CRAN=true, ~40 NON-e2e unit tests skip_on_cran() guards silently skip (skip ≠ fail, FAIL stayed 0 masqueraded clean--smaller suite). Re-running NOT_CRAN=true restored 2162 / 0 / 0 / 156-skip / 5-warn / 0 offenders EXACTLY, 3 GV files showed 0/0/0/22-skip (proving edit innocent). Reinforces [regression-read]: NOT_CRAN=true mandatory, suspicious pass-count delta edit provably can’t cause MEASUREMENT artifact — diagnose firsthand (re-measure / reason skip mechanism), never hand-wave claim “baseline held” wrong read. (e) Family-per-session split extends 8e-3 (owner-gated). 8e-3 censused firsthand 8 files / ~56 blocks (~3× 8e-2 session, past family boundary S38–S41 set); per plan §5 “may split oversized” + don’t-bundle (FM #18/#25) posed pre-RED scope [author-decision] owner scoped session genetic-value family (breeding-groups family + settings-/workflow deferred follow-ons). Confirms #38’s “split oversized conversion slice” next slice; special menu/workflow files (navbarMenu finalization navigate_to_menu_item, visit-N conversion) distinct higher-value work belongs cut. (f) Phase-3E / scope: test-tree-→ browser run (22 blocks / 22 expectations, 1:1 swap net 0) + live mutation-check spike runtime (#31 pattern). [mutation-check] PASS, INVERTED (Genetic Value Analysis TARGET pane) — correct (Genetic Value Analysis,"Run Analysis")→TRUE, wrong-pane (Pedigree Browser,"Run Analysis")→FALSE, wrong-content (Genetic Value Analysis,"Focal Animals")→FALSE (“Focal Animals” Pedigree-modPedigree.R:52, grep-confirmed foreign GV), old whole-body grepl("Focal Animals",body)→TRUE (content-blind contrast), active-pane innerText grepl→FALSE (sanity). tests/ .lintr-excluded ([lint-net-zero] N/config); R/ change → document()/NEWS ([news-vs-changelog] → CHANGELOG ). Commit 3 test files + docs via explicit git add ([macos-dupe-scan] — .DS_Store/..Rcheck//PED_GV_AUDIT_2026-05-30.html must ride along); /tmp/mutation_check_8e3_gv.R committed. Next 8e-3 cuts: breeding-groups family (3 files, ~23) settings-+ workflow-integration (2 files, ~11 — finalize navigate_to_menu_item true visible-pane check, kill workflow visit-N false-positive). Reflexes: [refactor-][author-decision][mutation-check][verify-first][regression-read][right-sized-orchestration][completeness-workflow][phase-3E-smoke][news-vs-changelog][macos-dupe-scan][lint-net-zero]. Apply: active-pane conversion, split OLD assertion’s kind — genuine passing grepl stays VERBATIM (rescope , flag dragons, never rename); tautology carries DEAD computed grepl pattern REVIVES pattern rescoped (prune alternatives FOREIGN module, keep real--data-dependent ones); -regex/content-length tautology gets guidance anchor; NULL nothing default-visible matches faithful pattern. Always read regression NOT_CRAN=true; test-edit appears drop pass count, suspect missing NOT_CRAN (another measurement artifact) suspecting real regression — re-measure firsthand. slice ~3× session, pose pre-RED scope AskUserQuestion one family.

what: Learning 43 — Breeding-Groups family run-and-observe conversion (8e-3 part B-2): a THIRD NULL sub-case — a STATIC feature that is present-but-in-an-inactive-NESTED-tab (display:none) → NULL+defer (vs #39’s nonexistent-feature and #40’s data-dependent req()-gate); nested-tab NAV labels ARE in active-pane innerText while their CONTENT is not; and sum(nb)−sum(failed) is NOT the passed count (S43, Phase 8e-3 Breeding-Groups family / issue #40)
title: nprcgenekeepr — Project-Specific Learnings
text: Converted 3 Breeding-Groups-family E2E files (breeding-groups-module 7 / -detailed 7 / -tutorial 9 = 23 browser-booting blocks) content-blind navigate_to_tab → grepl(get_html_safe(app,"body")) idiom assert_active_pane(app,"Breeding Groups",<pattern>), 2nd three 8e-3 cuts. class #38–#42 — PURE [refactor-] run--observe (defect; BG pane already renders, “Breeding Groups” tabPanel title appUI.R:166), gated PRE-RED→run--observe [author-decision]; [mutation-check] supplies rigor (synthetic RED). Outcome: 12 keep-regex · 6 REVIVE · 1 ANCHOR · 4 NULL. () THIRD NULL sub-case — STATICALLY-PRESENT control lives INACTIVE nested tab (display:none) active-pane innerText → NULL-pane-active + defer. modBreedingGroups right column nested tabsetPanel “Groups”(default)/“Statistics”/“Group Detail”; export downloadButtons “Export Current Group”/“Export Current Group Kinship Matrix” (modBreedingGroups.R:83-86) STATIC (req()-gated) sit INACTIVE “Group Detail” nested tab → innerText (honors CSS visibility) excludes , guidance HTML export tokens. D5/T7 (“export”) T9 (“kinship matrix export”) faithful default-visible match → NULL, deferred 8e-6 / nested-tab-navigation enhancement. DISTINCT #39b (NONEXISTENT feature — T5 “infants dam”: control modular UI , tutorial-) #40b (DATA-DEPENDENT req()-gated output). One family carried two different NULL reasons (T5 nonexistent; D5/T7/T9 present--nested-hidden) — correctly resolve pane-active-, different reasons worth recording: NULL test still purely “≥1 faithful alternative match DEFAULT-VISIBLE innerText?” (#41a), “default-visible” excludes inactive nested-tab content firmly excludes req()-gated empty div. (b) Nested-tab NAV labels active-pane innerText even though inactive tabs’ CONTENT . nested <ul class="nav nav-tabs"> (labels “Groups”/“Statistics”/“Group Detail”) descendant top-level BG .tab-pane always visible, M7 statistic|summary|total validly anchors “Statistics” nav label D4’s revived “group” matches “Groups” nav label — even though tabs’ bodies hidden. one genuinely uncertain point (M7’s matcher nav label — “statistic” sidebar control guidance); pre-gate critic settled RENDERING actual Shiny navbarPage+nested-tabsetPanel DOM via Rscript (stronger firsthand check source-reasoning) confirming nav <ul> p.innerText; browser run confirmed M7 GREEN. Lesson: nested-tab NAV labels usable static anchors; nested-tab CONTENT (display:none tab inactive) — active-vs-inactive split #39 found Input module’s nested tabs, now stated general rule module whose named features hide behind non-default nested tabs. (c) REVIVE-pruning recurred (#42b) inputId artifacts named prune class. 6 tautologies--dead-grepl revived: D2→harem, D4→result|group|table|output|formed (keep — “group” matches now, rest data-dependent formed-group display → 8e-6), T1→group.*formation|source.*animal (prune framing words workflow/Choose.*group), T4→Seed.*Group|seed.*animal|specific.*animal (prune pre.*seed + inputId seedGroups), T6→Include.*kinship|kinship.*display (prune inputId showKinship + non-matching-order display.*kinship), T8→top.*ranked (prune high.*value/value.*animal never-rendered + FOREIGN-module token genetic.*analysis — GV pane). Prune classes, confirmed critic: inputId artifacts (seedGroups/showKinship/sexRatio attributes, innerText), never-rendered framing words, wrong-token-order .* alternatives, foreign-module tokens; KEEP matching label + real--data-dependent (#42a/b). genuine passing grepl (12 keeps incl. D1 dragon size|number|count|animals — “size” control, matches via “number”/“animals”) stays VERBATIM, flagged comment, never renamed (#41b). (d) pre-gate refutation CONFIRMED whole map (0 corrections, like S40) yet still earned keep — RESOLVING real uncertainty, just rubber-stamping. Unlike S41/S42 (corrected 2/12 1/22), 0/23 changed — workflow’s value settling M7 firsthand (DOM render) confidence lowest, dismissing two skeptic refutations demanded NULL false premise nested nav labels innerText. Robust partial agent failure: 2 3 skeptics hit stream-idle timeouts; 1 complete skeptic + 1 partial (whose returned refutations critic still adjudicated) + critic sufficient — [completeness-workflow] degrades gracefully synthesizer verifies firsthand rather vote-counting. 0-correction pre-gate wasted converts private low-confidence judgment (M7) DOM-verified one slow 23-Chrome browser run. Cause: nb column counts skip warning rows — canonical tally (counting expectation classes directly: expectation_success=2162, expectation_skip=156, expectation_warning=5; 2162+156+5=2323) shows true passed count expectation_success (== testthat reporter’s PASS line), sum(nb)−sum(failed). Baseline held EXACTLY: 2162 / 0 failed / 0 error / 156 skip / 5 pre-existing modPyramid warn / 0 non-e2e offenders.
