what: Learning 44 — Settings-About + Workflow-Integration conversion (8e-3 FINAL cut → 8e-3 COMPLETE): the navbarMenu(“More”) dragon is RESOLVED firsthand (a child DOES become the lone active top-level .tab-pane via set_inputs(mainNavbar=child)) → navigate_to_menu_item finalized as a genuine visible-pane check (docstring only, body unchanged); navbar CHROME (brand) is element-scopable (strictly stronger than the 8e-2 whole-body carve-out); and a “visits N tabs” count-loop tautology only discriminates when the threshold is raised to the FULL count (S44, Phase 8e-3 FINAL / issue #40)
title: nprcgenekeepr — Project-Specific Learnings
text:
Converted LAST two 8e-3 files — test-e2e-settings-.R (4) + test-e2e-workflow-integration.R (7) = 11 browser-booting blocks — content-blind navigate_to_tab → grepl(get_html_safe(app,"body")) idiom assert_active_pane(...). class #38–#43 — PURE [refactor-] run--observe, gated PRE-RED→run--observe [author-decision]; [mutation-check] supplies rigor (synthetic RED). Outcome: 10 keep-regex-rescope · 1 navbar-chrome carve-. () navbarMenu(“”) dragon — flagged R1/§2.3-item-4, deferred 8e-1 ([hard-gate-spike] #37 confirmed input read-back) carried 🐉 S42/S43 — RESOLVED firsthand: navbarMenu child become lone active top-level .tab-pane via set_inputs(mainNavbar=child). live-DOM spike (Rscript→AppDriver) confirmed navigate_to_menu_item(app,"Settings"): top-level .tab-content count == 1 (children land single container 8 top-level tabPanels — separate dropdown container), get_active_pane_value==“Settings”, get_active_pane_text==“Application Settings Configuration options go ”; idem (version/credits/NIH) Help (Documentation/Online). navigate_to_menu_item’s delegate body (→navigate_to_tab’s set_inputs+read-back) ALREADY genuine visible-pane switch — docstring’s “body-grepl passes regardless true visible-pane switch (shallow-coverage limit … strengthened 8e)” caveat needed retiring (helper-shinytest2.R:283-292; body unchanged → still PURE run--observe, helper RED→GREEN). [hard-gate-spike] CONFIRM mode (vs 8e-1’s FALSIFY): spike can validate planned mechanism, break — still RUN firsthand dependent conversions (rendering DOM strongest refutation load-bearing question DOM behavior, separate source-reasoning skeptic panel — S43’s pre-gate shape — SUBSUMED two live spikes). (b) Navbar CHROME (brand/title) element-scopable — strictly STRONGER choice 8e-2 whole-body carve-— even though active-pane apply . brand renders GeneKeepR, OUTSIDE .tab-pane (spike-confirmed !document.querySelector('.tab-pane .navbar-brand')), assert_active_pane correctly reach (category home-navigation navbar-LABEL carve-outs :147-185 8e-2 left whole-body grepl). unlike labels, brand stable class → scope grepl element : grepl("GeneKeepR", get_html_safe(app, ".navbar-brand")). [mutation-check]-proven strictly stronger: grepl("Breeding", brand)==FALSE OLD grepl("Breeding", body)==TRUE (whole-body content-blind — “GeneKeepR” also lives Home

“Welcome GeneKeepR” pane, old assertion passed even brand removed). Rule: non-pane navbar element stable selector → scope selector, don’t settle whole-body grepl carve-. (c) “visits N tabs” COUNT-LOOP tautology becomes discriminating threshold raised FULL count. Workflow W1 looped 6 panes accumulating tabs_visited asserted >= 3 (content-blind whole-body grepls → always 6 → always passes). Converting inner check assert_active_pane necessary sufficient: >= 3, breaking ONE nav drops count 5 STILL passes — mutation doesn’t bite. Raise threshold equal count (== 6L) single failed/wrong-pane nav reds block (mutation-confirmed: wrong-pane assert_active_pane→FALSE → count 5 → ==6L fails). one block AGGREGATES many panes (vs per-block 1:1 swaps elsewhere); discriminating lever THRESHOLD, just inner predicate. (d) GOTCHA — re-navigating ALREADY-ACTIVE tab raises shinytest2’s “Server update output values within 4 seconds” (set_inputs(mainNavbar=) default wait_=TRUE blocks output flush -op nav never produces). Harmless real isolated blocks (fresh app navigates Home→DISTINCT tab, W1/W3’s sequences distinct-adjacent transitions → output always updates), bit FIRST diagnostic spike checked two patterns pane back--back. spiking multiple checks one pane single app instance, sequence DISTINCT tabs reads (pass wait_=FALSE); defect converted tests. (e) W2/W3 .list() responsiveness tautologies (grepl) — strengthened genuine pane-switch asserts (Input-active--Home-active; final-pane-active 4-switch loop), net-0 expectations, dropping now-unused get_values_safe() calls. 8 remaining workflow patterns + 4 settings patterns genuine grepls → KEEP verbatim, rescope (every one [verify-first]-confirmed real active-pane innerText spike v2: ALL_OK). (f) Phase-3E / scope: test-tree-→ browser run (11 blocks / 12 expectations — net 0 vs old 12: settings 4 + workflow W1:1/W2:2/W3:1/W4:1/W5:1/W6:1/W7:1) + two live DOM spikes + live mutation-check spike runtime (#31 pattern). [regression-read] non-e2e 2162 expectation_success / 0 failed / 0 error / 156 skip / 5 pre-existing modPyramid warn / 0 non-e2e offenders — S40–S43 baseline held EXACTLY (read via sum(nb)−failed−skipped−warning=2162, sum(nb)=2323, per #43e). tests/ .lintr-excluded ([lint-net-zero] N/config); helper docstring TEST-tree roxygen comment, R/ export → document()/NEWS ([news-vs-changelog] → CHANGELOG ). Commit 3 test-tree files + docs via explicit git add ([macos-dupe-scan] — .DS_Store/..Rcheck//PED_GV_AUDIT_2026-05-30.html must ride along); spikes /tmp/spike_navbarmenu_8e3.R, /tmp/spike_workflow_patterns.R, /tmp/mutation_check_8e3_final.R committed. 8e-3 now COMPLETE (genetic-value S42 + breeding-groups S43 + settings-/workflow S44); next 8e-4 (namespace input-→dataInput- fix + error-states/boundary-conditions interaction revival — RED→GREEN ns fix, §2.4) — SEPARATE session (FM #18/#25). Reflexes: [hard-gate-spike][refactor-][author-decision][mutation-check][verify-first][regression-read][phase-3E-smoke][news-vs-changelog][macos-dupe-scan]. Apply: plan’s load-bearing assumption DOM behavior, settle RENDERING live DOM bounded spike dependent conversions — [hard-gate-spike] confirms--corrects, live-DOM render subsumes source-reasoning skeptic panel DOM question. set_inputs(mainNavbar=child) activate navbarMenu child lone top-level .tab-pane (one .tab-content), navigate_to_menu_item genuine visible-pane check (docstring-finalization). Scope non-pane navbar element (brand) stable selector, whole-body grepl. Convert “visits N tabs” count-loop raising threshold FULL count single failed nav reds block. Re-navigating already-active tab raises 4s -output timeout — sequence distinct tabs spiking -pane checks one app instance.

what: Learning 45 — Namespace fix + error-states/boundary interaction revival (8e-4): the FIRST hybrid 8e slice (RED→GREEN namespace + run-and-observe conversions, two gates in one session); the namespace discriminator is the input VALUE READ-BACK, not a throw (shinytest2 set_inputs on an unbound id WARNS and never sets); a no-file getData click surfaces a TRANSIENT showNotification toast (the only pre-data error-state); a browser-free recording-stub anchors the helper fix in the always-run layer; and a concurrent external code-formatter rewrote 14 R/ files mid-session — surfaced, owner-gated, verified inert, excluded from the commit (S45, Phase 8e-4 / issue #40)
title: nprcgenekeepr — Project-Specific Learnings
text: Converted test-e2e-error-states.R (13) + test-e2e-boundary-conditions.R (13) = 26 browser-booting blocks content-blind nchar(html)>100 / dead-grepl / interaction-noop-tryCatch idioms behavioral assertions, applied §2.4 namespace fix (input-→dataInput-) 5 sites + upload_and_wait helper. () FIRST 8e slice pure run--observe — HYBRID: RED→GREEN namespace fix (4 tests) + run--observe 23 conversions, gated (PRE-RED→RED RED→GREEN, two [author-decision] gates). Sites per §2.4 (helper-shinytest2.R:150/:154, error-states:24/:45, boundary:43); §2.4 --CHANGE list (data-ready bare ids, data-module="input" literal, #goto_input, tab anchors [data-value=]) respected. (b) namespace discriminator input VALUE READ-BACK, exception. Contrary plan’s “wrong id throws” framing, shinytest2 set_inputs(\input-minParentAge`=…)UNBOUND id emits WARNING ("Unable find input binding") **set anything** (raise R error) — wrong-id RED proven byget_value(input=“dataInput-minParentAge”)staying default "2.0" ≠ set value, atryCatch-caught throw. CLICK path differs:app$click(selector="#input-getData")` missing selector THROWS ("find HTML element") → `click_element_safe`→FALSE → `expect_true` fails. One slice, two distinct namespace discriminators (textInput → read-back; actionButton click → throw→FALSE). **(c) -file `getData` click surfaces TRANSIENT `showNotification` warning toast — error-state available pre-data.** `modInput.R:305-308` `observeEvent(getData)`: `(.null(activeFile())) { showNotification("Please select file first.", type="warning"); return() }`. `[verify-first]` spike confirmed toast renders `#shiny-notification-panel` readable right `click + wait_for_idle` (~5s auto-dismiss). Crucially zero/non-numeric-age blocks WITHOUT file surface error — `minParentAge` `textInput` accepting string (`get_value` reflects "0"/"abc"); `.numeric()` coercion fires inside never-reached (-file) handler. genuine assertions **input round-trip + pane-active**, "error-state" (refines plan's "surfaces visible error/state" — true -file click). **(d) browser-free recording-stub anchors helper namespace fix ALWAYS-RUN layer.** e2e blocks self-skip without `NPRC_RUN_E2E`, `upload_and_wait` exercised 8e-4 test (serves 8e-6's real upload) — RED→GREEN recording fake-app stub `test_helper_shinytest2.R` (mirrors 8a's stub idiom) asserting uploads `dataInput-pedigreeFileOne` clicks `dataInput-getData`; RED = hardcoded `input-pedigreeFileOne` + default `module_id="input"`, GREEN = default `"dataInput"` + DERIVE upload id via `.call(app$upload_file, setNames(list(file_path), sprintf(“%s-%s”, module_id, file_input_id))). +4 always-run expectations (2162→2166) protect fix even browser suite opted . **(e) ZERO blocks deferred 8e-6 — plan's "boundary blocks need data → defer" materialize.** Every pane's CONTROL labels static (present without data) 26 patterns[verify-first]-confirmed real active-pane innerText (every spike cell TRUE): Input (Minimum Parent Age/Read Check Pedigree), Pedigree (Focal Animals/Display Options/search), Pyramid (Bin Size/Age Unit/Age Label), GV (Run Analysis/Iterations/Threshold/Export /Export Subset), BG (Form Groups/Number groups/Sex ratio/Harem), Home (Welcome/GeneKeepR). two rapid/repeat-click blocks assert FINAL pane (Home / Input); narrow/short-window blocks assert Home active BOOT (nav). **(f) ⚠ concurrent external code-formatter rewrote 14R/PRODUCTION files mid-session — surfaced, owner-gated, verified inert, EXCLUDED commit (FM #22 wild).** Orientation showed clean tree (.DS_Store); minutes laterpkgload::load_allFAILED ([verify-first]caught ) parse error inmakeFounderStatsTable.R:68— automated style pass (‘…’→“…”,0→0L,round(x,2)→round(x,2L); likely editor format--save /styler/ another agent open #30 lint work) converted single-quoted HTML strings double quotes WITHOUT escaping innerclass=“…”, closing literal early. modified set actively GROWING (11→13→15→17 tracked files across read-polls) → tool running CONCURRENTLY. Per SAFEGUARDS (preserve user edits) / FM #22 touch, revert, "fix" unauthored uncommitted changes — STOPPED gated owner (AskUserQuestion). next poll formatter SELF-HEALED 2 broken files (later pass rewrote valid) settled 17;[regression-read]proved whole reformat behaviorally inert (non-e2e **2166expectation_success/ 0 failed / 0 error / 156 skip / 5 pre-existingmodPyramidwarn / 0 non-e2e offenders** — S40–S44 baseline + exactly +4 new helper expectations). 8e-4 commit staged 4 test-tree files + docs via explicitgit add, leaving owner's 14-file reformat uncommitted -progress work ([macos-dupe-scan]also excluded.DS_Store/..Rcheck//PED_GV_AUDIT_2026-05-30.html). Lesson: non-parsing tree START code work always breakage stale checkout — AI/tooling-heavy repo formatter may run concurrently; verify firsthand (load_all+ parse-check +git statusgrowth), changes unauthored + uncommitted, SURFACE + gate, never silently fix revert. **(g)** Phase-3E / scope: test-tree-→ browser run (26 blocks / 29 expectations, 0 failed/0 error/0 skip) + two live spikes (DOM/namespace + mutation-check) runtime (#31). **[mutation-check]** PASS:assert_active_pane(GV,“Export |Export Subset”)→TRUE, wrong-pane(Breeding Groups,…)→FALSE, wrong-content(GV,“Number groups”)→FALSE ("Number groups" BG-, grep-confirmed foreign GV), OLD whole-bodygrepl(“Number groups”, body)→TRUE (content-blind contrast), active-pane innerText grepl→FALSE (sanity); namespacedataInput-minParentAgereflects "0", click#dataInput-getData→notification, wrong selector#input-getData→click_element_safe→FALSE.tests/.lintr-excluded (**[lint-net-zero]** N/); /change → nodocument()/NEWS (**[news-vs-changelog]** → CHANGELOG ). Next **8e-5** (⚠ PRODUCTIONR/gatedset_seed— owner-gated full RED→GREEN→REFACTOR+check(), [production--disguise]) **8e-6** (real upload+QC/GVA/breeding flows + deferred data-bearing asserts; 8e-4 prerequisite — thedataInput-ids now correct). **Reflexes:** [hard-gate-spike][verify-first][mutation-check][regression-read][author-decision][phase-3E-smoke][news-vs-changelog][macos-dupe-scan]. **Apply:** hybrid 8e slice gates twice (PRE-RED→RED failing namespace tests, RED→GREEN). namespaced textInput wrong-id discriminator theget_valueread-back (shinytest2 WARNS, never sets — throw); actionButton theapp$clickthrow. Anchor helper's namespace fix browser-free recording-stub unit test (e2e layer self-skips). Convert pre-data block toassert_active_paneagainst STATIC control label, data-bearing content. Ifload_allfails start code work unauthored uncommittedR/edits still growing, formatter running concurrently — surface + owner-gate, verify inert via regression, commit files via explicitgit add`; never revert silently fix someone else’s -progress work.

what: Learning 46 — Stochastic determinism hook (8e-5): the [production-in-disguise] item EXECUTED — an env/option-gated set_seed() added to two EXPORTED module servers via owner-gated full RED→GREEN→REFACTOR; the determinism RED compares a stochastic engine’s output across TWO testServer runs (RNG carries across invocations) guarded against a vacuous identical(NULL,NULL); committing a concurrent formatter’s reformat DESYNCS man/ (it rewrapped #' comments + changed signature defaults to 8L) so run document() before check(); and the new cross-file helper’s object_usage_linter flag is a [stale-namespace] transient (S46, Phase 8e-5 / issue #40)

what: Learning 47 — Real upload→pedigree E2E flow (8e-6a): the FIRST genuinely data-bearing E2E assertions in the suite; the [hard-gate-spike] CORRECTED the plan’s §2.3 “output tier” (get_value(output=DT) un-suspends to non-NULL WITHOUT data → assert rendered-DOM content, not is.null); and a local e2e spike tests the SYSTEM-lib install, not the working tree, unless reinstalled first (S47, Phase 8e-6a / issue #40)

text: 8e-6a wired real pipeline upload_and_wait(app, obfuscated_rhesus_mhc_ped.csv) → #dataInput-getData → navigate_to_tab("Pedigree Browser") converted 3 NULL’d pedigree blocks S40 (A1 test-e2e-pedigree-module.R, A2 -detailed.R, A3 -tutorial.R) pane-active-data-bearing asserts rendered #pedigree-pedigreeTable — first time E2E suite drives real analytical flow (recon [completeness-workflow] wf_855f37cd-4ac confirmed NOTHING clicks runAnalysis/formGroups/uploads today → genuine RED→GREEN). what: Learning 48 — Real GVA-run E2E flow (8e-6b): the rankings DT’s value column is real but arrives via orderReport()→rankSubjects()→rbind (NOT reportGV’s cbind — trace column PROVENANCE), and the default topN=20 render truncates to the top-ranked rows so only “High Value” survives (asserting “Low Value”/“Undetermined” would RED a green flow); both data-bearing tokens are seed-INDEPENDENT structural invariants (S48, Phase 8e-6b / issue #40)
title: nprcgenekeepr — Project-Specific Learnings
text: 8e-6b drove real GVA pipeline upload_and_wait(app, obfuscated_rhesus_mhc_ped.csv) → navigate_to_tab("Genetic Value Analysis") → set nIterations=100 → click_element_safe("#geneticValue-runAnalysis") → wait_for_module_ready("geneticValue") converted 2 NULL’d GV blocks S42 (B1 test-e2e-genetic-value-tutorial.R:99 Value Designation, B2 :144 Z-score) pane-active-data-bearing asserts rendered #geneticValue-rankingsTable — second real-flow slice 8e-6a. Trace rendered column’s provenance WHOLE pipeline; cbind site last word later orderReport/rbind adds columns. (b) NEW [topN-truncation]: row-truncation hides lower designations. output$rankingsTable truncates input$topN (default 20) via data[1:input$topN, ] (modGeneticValue.R:240), module re-orders rank(indivMeanKin − gu) ascending top-20 BEST animals → “High Value”. firsthand spike confirmed render shows "20 entries" "High Value" TRUE "Low Value"/"Undetermined" FALSE. ⟹ DEFAULT view faithful Value-designation token "High Value"; asserting “Low Value”/“Undetermined” RED green flow (must raise topN). refines S47’s recon note (“levels High/Low/Undetermined”): three exist full report, High Value survives default top-N render. what: Learning 49 — Real breeding-group E2E flow (8e-6c → 8e-6 COMPLETE): the export buttons + rendered Group-Detail tables live in a NO-id nested tabset reached only by a DOM click on a[data-value='Group Detail']; make a static-UI button data-bearing by PAIRING its visibility-gated LABEL with a suspendWhenHidden DT so each block needs the full flow (not just nested-tab nav); animalSource='all' isolates breeding from GVA; and the non-e2e baseline is MEASUREMENT-method-sensitive → prove edit-inertness with a stash diff, not the headline count (S49, Phase 8e-6c / issue #40)
title: nprcgenekeepr — Project-Specific Learnings
text: 8e-6c drove real breeding pipeline upload_and_wait(app, obfuscated_rhesus_mhc_ped.csv) → navigate_to_tab("Breeding Groups") → set_inputs(animalSource="", nIterations=5) → click_element_safe("#breedingGroups-formGroups") → wait_for_module_ready("breedingGroups") → click_element_safe("[data-value='Group Detail']") revived 3 export-NULL’d BG blocks S43 (D5 test-e2e-breeding-groups-detailed.R:89, T7 -tutorial.R:135, T9 -tutorial.R:178) data-bearing asserts RED→GREEN (3 AskUserQuestion gates: PRE-RED→RED · RED→GREEN · GREEN→REFACTOR-declined; scope fixed owner’s “8e-6c”). () [hard-gate-spike] captured recon’s two OPEN items firsthand. Group Detail nested tabsetPanel (modBreedingGroups.R:72) id → set_inputs drive → activate via UNIQUE DOM link [data-value='Group Detail'] (spike: count==1), click_element_safe → TRUE. CLOSES Learning #43 loop: #43 found nested tab’s CONTENT display:none-excluded active-pane innerText NAV LABEL included; #49’s fix CLICK nav link, nested pane becomes visible content enters TOP-LEVEL active pane’s innerText (assert_active_pane resolves non-nested .tab-content, whose innerText now carries activated nested pane). intermediate spike state PROVED steps needed: post-formation pre-activation, Ego ID/Export Current Group still FALSE. (b) Make STATIC-UI button data-bearing PAIRING. downloadButtons static UI — present DOM always, just display:none inactive nested tab — get_html button id match “Export Current Group” even RED (trap, #43 reason NULL’d). assert button LABEL via active-pane innerText (visibility-gated: absent nested tab activated) pair suspendWhenHidden rendered DT (#breedingGroups-groupMemberTable → “Ego ID”/“Age Years”; #breedingGroups-groupKinTable → <table>), needs group formation tab visibility → block genuinely requires full upload→form→activate flow, merely nested-tab nav. [mutation-check] 13/13: right-token-WRONG-table ("Ego ID" kin DT) → FALSE, foreign-pane → FALSE, pre-flow → FALSE, correct → TRUE. (c) animalSource='' ISOLATES breeding GVA. module’s topRanked (default) branch req(geneticValues()) (set GVA run, appServer.R:272), '' uses ped$id directly → upload→QC→kinship→group-formation→render GVA dependency — cleaner/faster vertical slice upload→GVA→breeding chain (GVA already covered 8e-6b). (d) assert. Requested numGp=3 algorithm formed ONE big MIS group (S43-handoff’s “{numGp, numGp+1}” guaranteed — high threshold 0.25 + hardcoded ignore=F–F yields one large independent set) → assert export buttons + rendered tables, group count; strict within-group kinship invariant unattainable (ignore=F–F) → never assert numerically. tokens static labels / rendered column-headers / table structure → seed-INDEPENDENT (Option C), GREEN NPRC_BG_SEED. (e) [regression-read] refinement — non-e2e baseline MEASUREMENT-METHOD-sensitive. pkgload::load_all renv → 2140 pass / 0 err (clean); library() RENV_CONFIG_AUTOLOADER_ENABLED=false (system lib) ERRORS tests whose Suggests deps bare system lib lacks; S48’s reported 2180 different measurement. Since e2e test_that SKIPS create_test_app() assertion (NPRC_RUN_E2E unset), test-e2e edit STRUCTURALLY inert non-e2e count → PROVE git stash diff (pre-edit == post-edit == 2140 / 0 fail / 0 err / 0 non-e2e offenders) instead chasing headline number. (f) System-lib currency must checked AppDriver’s ACTUAL resolution (RENV_CONFIG_AUTOLOADER_ENABLED=false → system lib), plain library() (renv redirects stale project lib, lacked gatedSeed/downloadGroupKin) — [verify-first] lib resolution; R/ unchanged since S48 → system lib already current, reinstall. what: Learning 50 — CI per-module fresh-process grouping (8e-7, the FINAL §8e slice): partition the 23-file E2E tier into 13 per-module groups each run in a fresh Rscript process so no one process accumulates 23 Chrome instances; the partition is STATICALLY PROVABLE locally (replicate testthat’s stripped-name grepl match against the COMMITTED regexes → exactly 23, no overlap/gap) but the flake fix is LIVE-RUNNER-ONLY; check fail/error BEFORE the silent-skip guard so a real failure is never mislabeled “executed nothing”; and keep the per-group R snippet apostrophe-free because it lives inside bash Rscript -e '...' (S50, Phase 8e-7 / issue #40)
title: nprcgenekeepr — Project-Specific Learnings
text: 8e-7 converted single 23-files--one-process E2E run step .github/workflows/shinytest2.yaml single job looping 13 per-module group regexes, fresh Rscript process, defusing S34 “AppDriver process-count dragon” (23 Chrome instances accumulating one process → ~1 transient timeout / 5 full-tier runs). LAST §8e slice → issue-#40 assertion-strengthening + CI-stability campaign now code-complete. () [author-decision] topology gated, single-job loop chosen matrix. pre-phase AskUserQuestion offered () single job + bash loop spawning one Rscript per group (plan §8’s literal design — 1× setup, sequential, fresh PROCESS per group) vs (B) 13-leg strategy.matrix (fresh RUNNER per group, parallel, per-group UI checks, 13× checkout/setup-r/deps/INSTALL/Chrome cost). Owner chose — cheapest, plan-faithful, root-cause-sufficient (≤3 files/process already defuses dragon); matrix’s extra isolation/visibility wasn’t worth 13× setup nightly job. phase gate PRE-RED→run--observe (CI config, RED→GREEN per plan §6). (b) [ci-static-proof] partition PROVABLE locally even though flake . Per Learning #33c (replicate testthat’s stripped-name grepl match: strip leading test-? + trailing .[rR], grepl(rx, name)) — extracted 13 regexes COMMITTED YAML (draft) proved union==23 ^(app|e2e)- tier overlap/gap/stray, applied FULL 182-file dir (group can’t silently reach non-tier file; ^app- trailing dash correctly excludes test_appServer_dynamicTabs/test_create_test_app). 13 groups: ^app-(2), ^e2e-breeding-groups-(3), ^e2e-genetic-value-(3), ^e2e-input-(3), ^e2e-pedigree-(3), ^e2e-pyramid-(2), + 7 single-file regexes (boundary-conditions, data-ready, error-states, home-navigation, settings-, summary-statistics, workflow-integration). (c) [guard-ordering] check fail/error silent-skip guard. Per group: test_dir(filter=rx, stop_on_failure=FALSE) → cat passed/failed/skipped/error report → (f>0||e>0) quit(status=1) FIRST → (p==0) stop(...). smoke EXPOSED naive order (p==0 guard first) mislabels real failure “executed nothing” whenever failing group 0 passes — reordering makes silent-skip guard fire TRUE nothing-ran case (-skipped / empty) real failures red job correct context. guard now PER GROUP (stronger old whole-run sum(passed)==0): one group’s filter drift can’t hide behind others; ZERO-match regex separately caught test_dir’s “test files found” abort (→ nonzero exit). bash loop runs groups (full signal, one flake doesn’t skip rest) reds job failed — preserving stop_on_failure job semantics; job env / Chrome provisioning / R CMD INSTALL / timeout-minutes:30 / removed continue--error(R6) preserved; group wrapped ::group::/::endgroup:: log folds. (d) [quote-safety] per-group R snippet lives inside bash Rscript -e '...' → ZERO single-quotes allowed. R strings double-quoted inline R COMMENTS apostrophe-free (wrote “groups”/“test_dirs”, “group’s”/“test_dir’s”) — apostrophe terminate bash single-quote break step. Verified grepping -e block ' (none) + bash -n extracted run step (clean) + yaml.safe_load (parses). (e) [phase-3E-smoke] run-step LOGIC locally verifiable; FLAKE . Smoked snippet throwaway test dir (deterministic, Chrome): pass→exit0, fail→exit1 (“executed nothing” mislabel), skip→silent-skip guard→exit1, nomatch→test_dir abort→exit1 — 4 branches. flake mitigation ENVIRONMENTAL / LIVE-RUNNER-(FM #24’s cousin): proven partition selects right files guards behave, first live GitHub run can confirm 23--one-process flake gone — explicitly claimed fixed . ⚠ smoke-HARNESS bug bit briefly: =$(Rscript ... | grep ...) ${PIPESTATUS[0]} reads ASSIGNMENT’s status (always 0), Rscript’s — capture exit $? right non-piped =$(Rscript ...). committed snippet never wrong; harness . (f) [right-tool] deterministic partition best proven executable check, agent fan-— R verification script adversarial proof (asserts -overlap/-gap programmatically); workflow skeptic agents add nothing provably-correct regex partition. (g) Scope = CI-config — shinytest2.yaml + notes; R//tests/ change → suite byte-identical, regression run needed (change alters CI INVOKES suite). [news-vs-changelog] → CHANGELOG ; [macos-dupe-scan] explicit git add (.DS_Store/..Rcheck//audit-html excluded). push bundle master push (FM #2/#18) — SEPARATE deliverable first exercises two S34 watch items (renv lib-path + now-mitigated flake). Reflexes: [author-decision][ci-static-proof][guard-ordering][quote-safety][phase-3E-smoke][right-tool][regression-read][news-vs-changelog][macos-dupe-scan]. Apply: defang per-process resource-accumulation flake CI test tier, partition files per-module groups run FRESH process via bash loop spawning one Rscript per group (preserve env / install / stop_on_failure semantics + PER-GROUP silent-skip guard); PROVE partition locally replicating testthat’s stripped-name grepl match COMMITTED regexes (exactly N, overlap/gap) even though flake fix live-runner-; per-group snippet check fail/error passed==0 guard, keep Rscript -e '...' body apostrophe-free; smoke run-step logic throwaway dir state plainly flake mitigation ships unvalidated first live run.

what: Learning 51 — Promote a long-lived integration branch to master + live-validate (8e-7 follow-through → issue #40 close): the FIRST remote push exercises PR-triggered checks that local verification never ran → expect first-remote-CI surprises ORTHOGONAL to package correctness; HOLD the merge for them, triage each to root cause, surface the merge decision to the owner; the live master shinytest2 dispatch IS Phase-3E (S51, promote add-methodology → master / PR #41 / pkgdown #42)
title: nprcgenekeepr — Project-Specific Learnings
text: Pushed long-lived add-methodology dev branch (105 commits / 356 files; master strict ancestor → 0 behind → clean conflict-free merge) master via PR #41 (merge commit 0363ffe3), workflow_dispatch-ed shinytest2 master (run 27356752221 SUCCESS), CLOSED #40 — completing §8e / issue-#40 campaign. () [first-remote-CI] branch verified LOCALLY never run pull_request/push workflows. Read every workflow : trigger pushing know fires: push/PR ran lint + pkgdown + R-CMD-check (×5 platforms) + test-coverage FIRST time 105 commits (shinytest2 schedule+workflow_dispatch → per-PR → dispatch manually post-merge, triggers register ’s default branch). HELD merge PR’s first CI (gh pr checks 41 --watch) instead merging blind possibly-red master (SAFEGUARDS “don’t start broken state”). (b) [triage--root-cause] separate REAL-&-blocking KNOWN/advisory; green R-CMD-check green pkgdown. R-CMD-check green 5 platforms ⇒ package correctness intact; pkgdown FAIL = doc-site-deploy-; lint FAIL = known style debt (open #30); codecov/patch+project FAIL = EXTERNAL advisory thresholds (test-coverage workflow GENERATES coverage PASSED; codecov’s commit-status checks fail diff/threshold — routine big PR adding hard--unit-test Shiny modules covered opt-E2E codecov can’t see). (c) pkgdown docs/ collision STATICALLY detectable .gitignore. docs/* ignored + !docs/methodology//!docs/planning/ un-ignored ⇒ 15 files git-tracked INSIDE pkgdown’s default docs/ output dir; fresh clone docs/ non-empty pkgdown.yml sentinel → build_site_github_pages(clean=TRUE)→clean_site()→check_dest_is_pkgdown() errors “built pkgdown” → exit 1. one DING: thorough pre-push audit PREDICTED .gitignore:32-36 (reading triggers tells check RUNS, FAILS). Fix options (logged #42, done — 1--done): relocate methodology docs docs/ (Option 1, keeps site URL) set pkgdown destination:. (d) [author-decision] surface real--non-blocking merge call via AskUserQuestion — don’t presume; owner chose “merge now, fix pkgdown later”; log deferred fix issue rather scope-creeping promotion. (e) [preserve-history] merge --merge, NEVER squash multi-session campaign (105 commits TDD/session deliverables) one. merge commit lands master feature branch → diverge; put close-notes dev branch (add-methodology) let next sync carry (cherry-pick). (f) [phase-3E] CI/integration deliverable runtime verification live workflow run real branch (#31): workflow_dispatch shinytest2 master → confirm 13 per-module group folds FIRSTHAND run log (passed>0 failed=0 error=0 — extract via gh api .../jobs/<id>/logs | grep), merely “step green.” S34 watch items resolved FIRST run (renv lib-path RENV_CONFIG_AUTOLOADER_ENABLED=false; 23--one-process flake → zero transients 8e-7’s per-module fresh processes). One clean run CONFIRMS--doesn’t-PROVE probabilistic flake gone — said explicitly; per-group isolation means future transient reds group independently re-dispatchable. Stakeholder corrections: 0. Reflexes: [first-remote-CI][verify-first][triage--root-cause][author-decision][preserve-history][phase-3E-smoke][regression-read][news-vs-changelog][macos-dupe-scan]. Apply: first push long-lived local-branch — read every workflow : trigger, run local build-equivalent gate, HOLD merge PR’s first CI, triage red root cause (package-correctness vs doc-site/style/advisory), surface real--non-blocking merge decision owner log deferred fix issue; merge --merge preserve multi-session history; validate CI deliverable dispatching live workflow target branch reading group’s result firsthand; state plainly one clean run doesn’t prove probabilistic flake gone.

what: Learning 53 — Auditing .lintr line-exclusions requires parse_settings=FALSE, and the hardcoded line numbers drift two ways (S53, issue #30 planning)
title: nprcgenekeepr — Project-Specific Learnings
text: () auditing trap. see .lintr "file" = line exclusion actually suppresses MUST bypass .lintr — lintr::lint("R/foo.R") (lint_package()) default parse_settings=TRUE, reads .lintr applies exclusion audit, suppressed line reports “lints found” looks stale. Use lint(..., linters=<project tag set>, parse_settings=FALSE) lint_package(..., parse_settings=FALSE, exclusions=list("inst","tests","vignettes")). subagent skipped wrongly declared getLkDirectAncestors.R:26/29/35 stale exclusion; bypassing proved undesirable_function_linter flag local variable named source (flags symbol shadowing base::source, just calls) → fix variable RENAME, exclusion deletion. (b) Line-number drift goes ways ([lint-net-zero] sibling): shift can leave exclusion pointing lines lint (dead config — getPyramidPlot.R = 25:27 suppressed 0; real lints moved 16/38/41-43) keep suppressing content changed. (c) Verify-first beats agent’s headline. Adversarial verification overturned two examine-agent recommendations: “delete -commented makeGeneticDiversityDashboard.R” reversed explicit author won’t-delete decision (NEW-20, .Rbuildignore’d, namespace fallout per #35) → KEEP-EXCLUDE; “set_seed.R:11 exclusion stale, just remove ” wrong removing re-fires lint — stray trailing #' (also leaks man/set_seed.Rd) fools commented_code_linter must stripped. (d) Fix--de-exclude atomically: clean file’s code delete .lintr entry commit, stale line number ever left. (e) commented_code_linter active via tag set; #commented_code_linter = NULL line .lintr dead -op (failed linters_with_tags modify) — resolving issue #30’s “reports finding ” confusion. (f) undesirable_function_linter flags symbols, just calls — local var named source/sapply/etc. shadowing undesirable function trips . Reflexes: [verify-first][lint-net-zero][author-decision][parse-settings-false]. Apply: audit exclusions parse_settings=FALSE; rename shadowing locals; never delete author-retained files; strip stray #'; fix--de-exclude one commit. #42: pkgdown Build-site step failed fresh CI clone docs/methodology/+docs/planning/ git-tracked inside pkgdown’s default docs/ output dir (.gitignore:32-36) pkgdown.yml sentinel → clean_site()/check_dest_is_pkgdown() refuses wipe dir didn’t build → exit 1. () [author-decision] chose Option 2 (repoint), issue’s recommended Option 1 (relocate trees) — surfaced via AskUserQuestion recommendation constraint issue author hadn’t weighed. methodology framework’s convention pins reference docs docs/methodology/: SYNCED methodology_dashboard.py:109-110 scores docs/methodology+docs/methodology/workstreams (20 98 health pts) SYNCED SESSION_RUNNER.md (13 refs) + SAFEGUARDS.md (1 ref) cross-link path — none durably editable -repo (re-synced upstream). relocating break things can’t fix; repointing pkgdown touches nothing framework cares . owner’s written recommendation conflicts evidence ’ve found, don’t silently follow silently override — surface trade-exact actions let choose. (b) [verify-first library internals] build_site_github_pages(dest_dir="docs") as_pkgdown(pkg, override=list(destination=dest_dir)) — dest_dir ARG OVERRIDES _pkgdown.yml destination:. Read installed-pkgdown (2.1.1) source proved empirically (as_pkgdown(".",override=list(destination="pkgdown_site"))$dst_path → pkgdown_site; default → docs). ⟹ setting yml ALONE fix CI (owner proposed yml; confirmed ’s necessary--insufficient set : workflow dest_dir="pkgdown_site" CI + _pkgdown.yml destination: pkgdown_site local build_site() consistency). Don’t assume config field honored every entry point — build_site() reads yml, build_site_github_pages() overrides . (c) Fix (commit fcc154e8): .github/workflows/pkgdown.yaml dest_dir="pkgdown_site" + deploy folder: docs→pkgdown_site; _pkgdown.yml destination: pkgdown_site; .gitignore += pkgdown_site/; .Rbuildignore += ^pkgdown_site$. file moves; gh-pages URL unchanged (site deploys gh-pages BRANCH via JamesIves, build-dir name transient artifact); R//tests/ change → suite byte-identical, R-CMD-check unaffected. [local-proof--push] simulated fresh-clone state temp package skeleton: clean_site(dest=docs) ERRORS “non-empty built pkgdown” (reproduces #42) clean_site(dest=pkgdown_site) clean -op — proved fix locally CI cycle. (d) [fix-unmasks-next] CI failure can MASK later-stage failures; fixing reveals next one. clean_site resolved, build reached vignette rendering failed ColonyManagerTutorial.Rmd:209 chunk make-errorList-definition-tbl — data.frame(Error=names(getEmptyErrorLst()), Definition=errorDescriptions) paired 10 error types vs 9 hardcoded descriptions (“arguments imply differing number rows: 10, 9”). Root cause: NEW-45 “period IDs” feature (commit 5e228bd9) added invalidIdChars type getEmptyErrorLst() without updating vignette table → added missing description positional order (duplicateIds, changedCols) using package’s canonical wording (commit e89975c8). (e) [pkgdown-vs-Rbuildignore] pkgdown builds vignettes source tree IGNORING .Rbuildignore; R CMD build/check builds NON-ignored ones. ColonyManagerTutorial.Rmd .Rbuildignore’d (:36) — likely CRAN tarball-size/time (reads screenshots also-.Rbuildignore’d vignettes/shiny_app_use/) — R-CMD-check NEVER builds (green 5 platforms) yet pkgdown → ONE pkgdown-built vignette R-CMD-check covers, hence place render bug hide (3 — a2interactive/a3manual/simulatedKValues — check-built → green → render fine; let PREDICT re-run go green, ). add/rename error type getEmptyErrorLst(), update ColonyManagerTutorial.Rmd table lockstep (positional pairing). (f) [scope-discipline] fix unmasked SEPARATE bug, surfaced via AskUserQuestion (fix-now vs file-separately) rather silently scope-creeping — characterized root cause, whack--mole risk (4th vignette untested point), .Rbuildignore reason latent, owner decide full info; owner chose fix-now. (g) [phase-3E] validation chain, firsthand: local fresh-clone simulation → PR #43 pkgdown run 27361729368 (fresh-clone, Deploy skipped PR) SUCCESS, 4 vignettes rendered → merged --merge master c6ad23dd → master push run 27362288625 Build site SUCCESS + Deploy SUCCESS (exercises new folder: pkgdown_site → gh-pages). live master pkgdown run Phase-3E (#31) — confirmed steps firsthand, “check green.” #42 auto-closed merge (PR body “Fixes #42”) + validation comment. Owner-gated decisions: 4 AskUserQuestion (fix-approach, vignette-scope, merge; + honored owner’s mid-stream yml correction) — 0 corrections. [news-vs-changelog] → CHANGELOG ; [macos-dupe-scan] explicit git add. Reflexes: [author-decision][verify-first][local-proof--push][fix-unmasks-next][pkgdown-vs-Rbuildignore][scope-discipline][phase-3E-smoke][triage--root-cause][news-vs-changelog][macos-dupe-scan]. Apply: fix pkgdown docs/ collision reference docs legitimately live docs/, REPOINT pkgdown’s output via workflow dest_dir arg (overrides _pkgdown.yml destination:) + set yml local consistency, rather relocating tracked trees framework pins ; prove fix fresh-clone clean_site() simulation pushing; expect masked CI failure reveal next one (pkgdown builds .Rbuildignore’d vignettes R-CMD-check skips); surface unmasked separate bug scope decision rather silently absorbing .

what: Learning 54 — Implement issue #30 to a GREEN lint check: Phase 1 (commented-code) committed alone, then a per-file editor→verifier fan-out for the 154-lint residual (S54, issue #30 implementation)
title: nprcgenekeepr — Project-Specific Learnings
text: () [orchestrate-fanout-verify-globally] broad mechanical--judgment cleanup per-file pipeline. 154 residual lints across 18 files: workflow ONE editor + ONE adversarial verifier per file (editing distinct file → zero Edit conflicts) applied 150+ fixes verified 18 behavior-preserved ~6 min. editors iterated--clean caught EXTRA implicit_integer literals surfaced wrap shifted lines (pch = 19→19L, errors$Error[1]→[1L]). orchestration parallelizes per-site judgment; AUTHORITATIVE verification (full lint_package()=0, full test suite, document(), app boot) done parent, trusted agents. (b) [reconcile--CI-command] agent’s parse_settings=FALSE self-lint can fire linters project .lintr . verifier reported 2 coalesce_linter “remaining” modInput.R; coalesce_linter isn’t project tag set ("coalesce_linter" %% names(proj) → FALSE) real CI command lintr::lint_package() (reads .lintr) showed 0. flagged lines pre-existing, untouched, behavior-correct. NEVER accept non-green claim sub-probe without reproducing exact CI command. (c) implicit_integer int-vs-double behaviorally moot R intent-correctness matters (owner kept linter , disable): append L counts/indices/lengths/UI-widths/durations (column(8L), character(0L), errors > 0L, rep("Site", 3L)); append .0 real intended (ped$age * 12.0). double * 12L == double * 12.0 numerically, style, behavior — pick intent-correct form. (d) [author-decision] targeted inline # nolint: <linter> VERIFIED false-positives — object_usage package-internal funcs lintr can’t resolve (calcFounderContributions, gatedSeed) + one misreads (founderStats modSummaryStatsServer formal, modSummaryStats.R:293); nonportable_path MIME strings ("text/css"); object_name base-R-standard launch.browser arg; library() shinytest harness; CRAN par() save/restore idiom. Read PROVE ’s non-bug suppressing (6 object_usage false positives — 0 latent bugs). (e) Wrapping roxygen line reflows generated .Rd → run document() COMMIT regenerated man pages (getPyramidPlot/modBreedingGroupsServer/modPedigreeServer ); \item/\value text identical, just rewrapped — R-CMD-check requires man/ match source. @importFrom wraps change NAMESPACE (roxygen joins continuation lines → tokens). (f) [phase-3E-smoke] verify runtime Shiny edits BOOTING app load_all source, stale system lib — pkgload::load_all(".") build modXUI() + runModularApp(launch.browser=FALSE); confirmed 7 module UI builders constructed (column()/implicit_integer UI edits live) app served HTTP 200 / 92KB — unit suite (2140/0/0, S49 baseline) exercise mod servers, boot real runtime gate files. (g) lint-dump basename ≠ R/<name> — dump’s app.R actually lives inst/shinytest/app.R (R/app.R); agents DISCOVER flag real path rather assume. (h) [scope] owner expanded “1--done” session mid-stream (“proceed clean lints remain”) — honored deliberate scope expansion (Phase 1 + residual), committed Phase 1 ALONE first recoverable boundary ([lint-net-zero]: code fix + exclusion removal commit) architect-mode residual fan-. Reflexes: [orchestrate-fanout-verify-globally][reconcile--CI-command][author-decision][phase-3E-smoke][lint-net-zero][verify-first]. Apply: broad lint backlog, fan one editor + one adversarial verifier per file; keep implicit_integer int/double intent-correct; # nolint PROVEN false-positives; document() + commit man/ roxygen reflow; reconcile every lint count real lint_package() CI command; BOOT app verify runtime Shiny edits.

what: Learning 55 — Adversarial verification can overturn a plan’s “behavior-none” classification: an EXPORTED sapply→%in% swap diverged on NA input → owner-gated reclassification to RED→GREEN→REFACTOR (S55, issue #30 Phase 3)
title: nprcgenekeepr — Project-Specific Learnings
text: () [verify-first--classifying] “Obviously equivalent” hypothesis, fact — especially exported function. Phase 3 #30 plan labeled checkRequiredCols.R’s .character(unlist(sapply(requiredCols, \(col) (!(col == cols)) col))) → requiredCols[!requiredCols %% cols] behavior-none (“agent-verified across present/absent/empty cases”). per-file adversarial verifier (wf_eb654565-758; one skeptic per refactor, told REFUTE behavior-equivalence ALLOWED RUN R) constructed untested case: cols = c("id", NA, "sire") required col absent → OLD (!(col == cols)) evaluates (!NA) THROWS "missing value TRUE/FALSE needed", %% treats NA cleanly RETURNS missing cols. reproduced firsthand (non-NA inputs byte-identical across 5 cases; NA input: error vs clean return). checkRequiredCols @exported → divergence public surface. clean lint-passing rewrite preserves exact NA-error (inherent sapply/structure), lint fix necessarily changes behavior → belongs behavior-SENSITIVE bucket (RED→GREEN→REFACTOR), behavior-none. plan caught addSexAndAgeToGroup “real behavior risk” (§6 #4); SECOND one -scoped. (b) [strict-TDD] behavior change discovered mid-REFACTOR phase violation — surface , don’t ship . Per project TDD contract (REFACTOR = behavior change) paused committing, surfaced 3 options via AskUserQuestion; owner chose DEFER Phase 4. Reverted one file EXACT pre-session state (sapply + exclusion restored) shipped 6 GENUINELY behavior-none refactors (6 verifiers returned refuted=false, empirical R comparison). (c) 6 behavior-none: unnecessary_nesting collapses (drop else unconditional stop()/return(), else { } → else ) pure control-flow-equivalent; undesirable_function_linter flags local var named source (shadowing base::source — flags SYMBOL, just call) → rename msgSource (value reference, resolution unaffected — cosmetic); unnecessary_lambda \(df) inherits(df, "data.frame") → vapply(dfList, inherits, logical(1L), = "data.frame") (vapply feeds element positionally inherits’s x, = appended via ... → identical call; list element named misbind elements pass positionally). (d) [owner-flagged-config-fix] pre-existing .lintr casing bug (R/CheckRequiredCols.R capital-C) suppresses nothing case-sensitive CI — lintr exclusions case-sensitive Linux, capital-C entry let L34 lint fire CI runner macOS hid . Fixed lowercase R/checkRequiredCols.R owner’s explicit request (config-, behavior-none); corrected entry now suppresses deferred file’s lint Linux , CODE refactor stays deferred. initially restored buggy casing literal “revert” flagged — owner point ; better call fix proactively (behavior-none, independent deferred code). (e) [orchestrate--verify-globally] 7 verifiers ran parallel (~95 s); AUTHORITATIVE gate (lint_package()=0, full suite 2140/0/0/159, devtools::check() 0 errors) run parent, trusted agents. Reflexes: [verify-first][adversarial-overturns-plan][strict-TDD][author-decision][lint-net-zero][orchestrate-fanout-verify-globally]. Apply: classifying *apply/%%/match() swap EXPORTED function behavior-none, adversarially test NA / duplicate / --contract input; diverges, RED→GREEN→REFACTOR, REFACTOR — surface let owner decide. .lintr line-exclusion paths case-sensitive CI — match real filename casing.

what: Learning 56 — Implement #30 Phase 4 (the behavior-sensitive bucket): adversarial verification catches edge divergences that firsthand probing MISSES — empty-input column-drop + abuse-input error-message — and one was a latent caller crash-fix (S56, issue #30 Phase 4)
title: nprcgenekeepr — Project-Specific Learnings
text: () [verify-first / adversarial-beats---probe] dedicated skeptic finds edge case firsthand probe didn’t think try. firsthand-proven addSexAndAgeToGroup’s sapply→ped$sex[match(ids, ped$id)] equivalent across happy/missing/duplicate inputs DOWNGRADED plan’s “RED slice” behavior-none REFACTOR (age vapply already errors identically ≠1-row id, sex can’t diverge — true inputs). 6-skeptic adversarial workflow (wf_168f8dcf-1e5, told REFUTE + run R) tried ids = character(0): OLD sapply(character(0), …) returns NAMED EMPTY LIST → data.frame() DROPS column → 2 cols (ids, age); NEW match() returns length-0 factor → retained → 3 cols (ids, sex, age). SHAPE divergence never probed. Lesson: run adversarial pass even firsthand verification — “tested ” “tested empty / zero-length / wrong-type case.” Always include character(0) / length-0 / NA / wrong-type *apply-swap’s adversarial set. (b) [trace--caller] empty-input divergence LATENT CRASH FIX, regression. sole caller modBreedingGroups.R:438-440 gp <- addSexAndAgeToGroup(ids, ped); colnames(gp) <- c("Ego ID","Sex","Age Years") — assigning 3 names OLD’s 2-col empty-group result THROWS "'names' attribute [3] must length vector [2]"; NEW’s 3-col result renders empty table. NEW also matches @return doc (3 columns). “adopt new behavior” (owner choice) FIXED latent empty-group crash breeding-groups member view. Tracing ONE caller turned abstract “shape differs” concrete decision. (c) guard-clause inversion (x)→(!x) diverges non-logical input. create_wkbk’s (replace){remove} else {warn;return} → (!replace){warn;return}; remove: replace non-logical non-coercible value (string/list) file exists, OLD (replace) throws “argument interpretable logical” NEW !replace (evaluated FIRST, ) throws “invalid argument type” — error, message text differs. Coercible values (0/1/NA/logical) identical. replace documented logical → owner ACCEPTED cosmetic message change (clean lint-passing rewrite preserves exact message). (d) [strict-TDD] Surface refutations shipping, even trivial one. Per #55’s precedent REFACTOR contract, paused (just meaningful addSexAndAge one) posed ONE AskUserQuestion caller-traced consequences + recommendations; owner chose adopt-new / accept. 0 corrections. (e) [process-slip — re-lint EVERY edit, incl. roxygen] committed checkpoint 17e3fa06 adding @details block without re-linting → 81-char line landed ; caught NEXT lint_package() run fixed-forward batch. roxygen edit can introduce line_length lint just like code — re-run lint_package() edit commit, just code change. (f) 4 genuinely behavior-none refactors (correctParentSex /else inversion report body falling ; fillGroupMembers else{}→else ; setExit mapply→unlist(Map(...)) since chooseDate always length-1; checkRequiredCols %% strictly within agreed NA envelope) confirmed skeptics (6000-iter fuzz / 146 seeded / 21 inputs / ~50 inputs respectively, identical incl. error messages). (g) [phase-3E] runtime gate pure-fn change consumed Shiny = module test, app boot. addSexAndAgeToGroup’s integration exercised test_modBreedingGroups.R:1015-1122 (viewGrp member view → c("Ego ID","Sex","Age Years") colnames path), green full suite — stronger cheaper manually creating empty group booted app. Reflexes: [verify-first][adversarial-beats--probe][trace--caller][strict-TDD][author-decision][lint-net-zero][re-lint--every-edit][orchestrate-fanout-verify-globally][phase-3E-via-module-test]. Apply: swapping *apply/match()/%% inverting guard clause EXPORTED fn, adversarially test EMPTY (character(0)), zero-length, NA, WRONG-TYPE inputs (just happy/missing/dup) — trace actual caller(s) judge whether shape/error divergence regression latent-bug fix; re-lint every edit including roxygen.

what: Learning 57 — Closing #30 (admin) + the macOS SESSION_NOTES 2.md dupe is a check WARNING (not just a NOTE) because of the SPACE in its name (S57, issue #30 close + repo hygiene)
title: nprcgenekeepr — Project-Specific Learnings
text: () [verify--gating-fact-firsthand] Re-verify one fact close turns , even handoff already states . gh issue close 30 re-ran lintr::lint_package() = 0 rather trusting S56 handoff’s count — project’s standing gotcha “always reconcile sub-probe lint count real lint_package().” close public, hard--walk-back act; pay seconds confirm load-bearing premise. (b) [macos-dupe → portable-names WARNING, top-level NOTE] recurring macOS sync duplicate SESSION_NOTES 2.md causes lone devtools::check() WARNING specifically via “non-portable file names” check — SPACE filename — DIFFERENT check “non-standard files/directories found top level” NOTE -space methodology/audit files (RECOMMENDED_SKILLS.md, methodology_dashboard.py, PED_GV_AUDIT_2026-05-30.{html,md}, TECH_DEBT_AUDIT_2026-05-30.md, dashboard.html, nprcgenekeepr_notes.txt, 20250504_cran-comments.md) trigger. Root cause dupe reaches build : .Rbuildignore’s ^SESSION_NOTES\.md$ EXACT-match regex cover space-name, dupe lands build tarball real file ignored. rm clears WARNING (verified firsthand: post-removal devtools::check() = 0 errors / 0 warnings / 3 pre-existing NOTEs — clock-skew, spelling, top-level-files NOTE longer lists dupe). NOTE pre-existing/accepted cleared removing dupe. Permanent fix (DEFERRED — owner’s call, session’s scope): broaden pattern ^SESSION_NOTES.*\.md$ (^SESSION_NOTES.*) future macOS dupe build-ignored never re-raises WARNING. (c) [safe-delete-untracked] “Untracked” “safe delete.” rm verified dupe untracked (??), never committed (empty git log -- "SESSION_NOTES 2.md"), content-contained live file (comm -13 <(sort SESSION_NOTES.md) <(sort "SESSION_NOTES 2.md") → 0 dupe-lines). point--time copy hold edits absent original; confirm zero unique content first. (d) [declare-N/-honestly] admin/hygiene session (issue close + untracked-file removal + doc/changelog edits) writes production code tests → RED→GREEN→REFACTOR cycle apply; declare TDD phase N/every response rather forcing phase. Reflexes: [verify-first][verify--gating-fact][safe-delete-untracked][macos-dupe-scan][news-vs-changelog][commit--scope-switch]. Apply: session’s whole point close issue, re-verify issue’s resolution criterion firsthand closing; remember macOS dupe trips WARNING (space → portable-names) distinct top-level-files NOTE — rm (broaden .Rbuildignore kill permanently).

what: Learning 58 — Execute S57’s DEFERRED .Rbuildignore permanent dupe-fix: broaden the exact-match to .*, and verify a build-ignore change at the BUILD level (stage dummy → R CMD build → tar tzf), not via devtools::check() (S58, repo hygiene / .Rbuildignore)
title: nprcgenekeepr — Project-Specific Learnings
text: () [permanent--recurring] Kill recurring-toil class root rather re-manual fix session. S57 cleared macOS-dupe WARNING rm-ing SESSION_NOTES 2.md explicitly DEFERRED permanent fix (Learning 57b); S58 executed — .Rbuildignore:77 ^SESSION_NOTES\.md$ → ^SESSION_NOTES.*\.md$. exact-match build-ignore entry cover macOS sync dupes (X 2.md, X 3.md, X copy.md); broaden ^X.*\.md$. project already patched exact class narrowly (.Rbuildignore:30 ^\.Rhistory\ 2$ — escaped-space exact match single dupe), TELL narrow form keeps coming back; .* generalization durable fix. (b) [build--check] Verify .Rbuildignore change BUILD level, via devtools::check(). “non-portable file names” WARNING pure function built tarball’s CONTENTS, authoritative, targeted gate : stage real dummy (touch "SESSION_NOTES 2.md") → R CMD build ---build-vignettes ---manual . → tar tzf <tarball> | grep -SESSION_NOTES (expect NONE) → remove dummy + tarball. proved exclusion (0 SESSION_NOTES entries / 693 files, RC=0) WITHOUT ~90s full check() S57 self-dinged -heavy — check redundant since R code/metadata affecting changed S57 already established dupe→WARNING link. Pair fast grepl(old, files) vs grepl(new, files) regex probe (ignore.case = TRUE, perl = TRUE — mirrors R CMD build’s case-insensitive relative-path match) RED-equivalent: confirm OLD misses dupes, NEW catches variants, neither -matches (CHANGELOG.md / non-.md stay FALSE; canonical name stays excluded). (c) [declare-N/-honestly, cont. 57d] .Rbuildignore-change TDD N/— shippable unit test , .Rbuildignore DROPPED built tarball, testthat assertion reads can’t run R CMD check. Substitute build-level proof ; manufacture synthetic test. (d) [glob-dont-hardcode] DESCRIPTION Version tarball-name source truth, CLAUDE.md. built tarball nprcgenekeepr_1.1.0.9000.tar.gz (dev version) CLAUDE.md still says “Version 1.0.8” — glob nprcgenekeepr_*.tar.gz; hardcoded _1.0.8 matched nothing. (Stale CLAUDE.md version flagged future one-line fix.) (e) [Rscript –vanilla one-offs] renv project, run throwaway R temp .R file via Rscript --vanilla — inline -e backslashes ("\\.") hits shell-escaping .Rprofile prints renv --sync banner; --vanilla skips .Rprofile/renv file sidesteps quoting. Reflexes: [verify-first][macos-dupe-scan][news-vs-changelog][right-sized-orchestration][declare-N/-honestly]. Apply: recurring macOS-dupe (sync-dupe) keeps re-raising check WARNING, broaden .Rbuildignore exact-match .* prove building staged dummy inspecting tarball — devtools::check(), eye.

what: Learning 59 — Generalize the dupe-guard to the whole methodology .md cluster — and the trap that surfaced: EVERY .Rbuildignore line is a perl regex, so a “comment” with an unbalanced paren ABORTS the build (S59, repo hygiene / .Rbuildignore)
title: nprcgenekeepr — Project-Specific Learnings
text: () [generalize--class, cont. 58a] S58 broadened SESSION_NOTES; macOS-dupe WARNING class still hit every sibling exact-match pattern. Broadened 7 <NAME>.*\.md$ (.Rbuildignore:77-84): PROJECT_LEARNINGS, CLAUDE, SESSION_RUNNER, SAFEGUARDS, BACKLOG, ROADMAP, CHANGELOG. dupe (CLAUDE 2.md, CHANGELOG copy.md) otherwise re-raised exact WARNING S58 just killed SESSION_NOTES. Killing class means covering every member, one bit last. (b) [Rbuildignore-lines---regexes] load-bearing new fact: .Rbuildignore comment syntax — every line perl regex matched relative paths. existing #-prefixed “comments” work happens VALID regex matches real file (path containing literal comment text doesn’t exist). added multi-line # comment whose 2nd/3rd lines held unbalanced ( (... sync dupes ( 2.md,) → R CMD build aborted immediately: Error ... invalid regular expression '# Patterns broadened ...('. fix: keep every comment line valid regex — balanced parens , safest, parens / leading quantifier (*,+,?). left inline NOTE file warning next editor. TELL regex-file, prose-file: line 73’s original (tooling, R package content) works parens balanced. (c) [build step test] caught build-level verify (Learning 58b), eye — static read comment looked fine. .Rbuildignore edit’s authoritative gate R CMD build; running EVERY edit (just pattern lines) surfaced invalid-regex abort ship. (d) [zsh--bash: word-split unquoted scalars] Bash tool runs zsh, n $NAMES split unquoted scalar whitespace (bash ). first verify loop iterated whole string → created 1 bogus file named PROJECT_LEARNINGS CLAUDE ... 2.md instead 7. Use explicit literal list (n B C ...) real array, never unquoted space-joined scalar, loop’s correctness depends word-splitting. (e) [authoritative build proof] Staged 14 REAL spaced dupes (2.md copy.md forms × 7 names) → R CMD build (RC=0) → tar tzf (693 files) → ZERO 7 names .md (dupes canonicals excluded), real content (DESCRIPTION/NAMESPACE) present; trap cleanup EXIT removed dupes + tarball. Paired -7-names regex probe (RED-equivalent): OLD misses every dupe form, NEW catches 2.md/copy.md -match <NAME>.Rmd/<NAME>_archive.txt. (f) [scope--decision---owner] Two genuine author-decisions posed via AskUserQuestion editing: pattern style (loose .* match S58’s shipped line — chosen — vs targeted ( [0-9]+| copy)? zero -match) file scope (already-ignored cluster — chosen, pure behavior-none — vs ALSO adding currently-UNignored docs like RECOMMENDED_SKILLS.md/audit files, change tarball contents + shrink top-level-files NOTE, DIFFERENT change). Deferring latter kept pure dupe-guard. Reflexes: [verify-first][build--check][macos-dupe-scan][news-vs-changelog][declare-N/-honestly][right-sized-orchestration][commit--scope-switch]. Apply: treat .Rbuildignore regex file (balanced/safe comments ) re-build edit; scripting verification environment remember ’s zsh (explicit lists, unquoted scalars); generalizing guard, cover every member class, just triggering file.

what: Learning 60 — Execute the deferred scope-B: exclude ALL non-shipping top-level files to eliminate the “non-standard top-level files” NOTE — and BUILD THE BASELINE TARBALL to enumerate the real set, don’t trust the handoff’s candidate list (S60, repo hygiene / .Rbuildignore)
title: nprcgenekeepr — Project-Specific Learnings
text: () [enumerate---artifact, handoff] handoff’s candidate-file list incomplete; authoritative set came building baseline tarball. S59’s SUGGESTED-NEXT #1 named 4 candidate files (RECOMMENDED_SKILLS.md, TECH_DEBT_AUDIT, PED_GV_AUDIT.{md,html}) actual NOTE comprised 8 — also 20250504_cran-comments.md, methodology_dashboard.py, dashboard.html, nprcgenekeepr_notes.txt. got complete set R CMD build → tar tzf <tarball> | grep -E '^pkg/[^/]+$' (tarball’s top-level FILES exactly NOTE’s input), subtracting 5 standard files (DESCRIPTION/NAMESPACE/NEWS.md/README.md/LICENSE). Lesson: “shrink/eliminate NOTE” task, enumerate built artifact, prose candidate list — pose scope AskUserQuestion real set, options grounded reality. (b) [NOTE pure function tarball top-level contents] “Non-standard files/directories found top level” computed R CMD check unpacked tarball’s top-level entries minus fixed standard set, building + listing top-level entries AUTHORITATIVE gate — full devtools::check() needed (build--check logic Learning 58b, applied NOTE rather WARNING). Excluding 8 left exactly 5 standard files (685 files vs 693 baseline = 8 removed) → NOTE eliminated, verified directly. (c) [consolidate--prevent-recurrence] root cause 20250504_cran-comments.md shipping 7 sibling exact-match lines + missed 8th. Replaced 7 dated ^YYYYMMDD_cran-comments\.md$ one ^[0-9]+_cran-comments\.md$ — NEW dated cran-comments file now auto-ignored, killing “someone adds dated file forgets ignore line” class. find N exact-match lines dated/numbered family, single regex durable fix. (d) [dupe-guard dupes happen] Used <NAME>.* (dupe-guarded) macOS-synced methodology/audit docs (RECOMMENDED_SKILLS, PED_GV_AUDIT, TECH_DEBT_AUDIT) tight ^X\.ext$ methodology_dashboard.py/dashboard.html/nprcgenekeepr_notes.txt cran-comments regex — aren’t sync-prone, broad form add -match risk benefit. Match guard actual threat, don’t apply .* reflexively. (e) [zsh-nomatch ABORTS, cont. 59d] rm -f nprcgenekeepr_*.tar.gz matching file ABORTED whole script zsh (matches found) R CMD build ran — even -f, zsh errors unmatched glob unless unsetopt nomatch / setopt null_glob. ’d applied zsh lesson dupe-staging array forgot cleanup glob; prefix unsetopt nomatch 2>/dev/null; setopt null_glob 2>/dev/null glob might match. Reflexes: [verify-first][build--check][macos-dupe-scan][news-vs-changelog][declare-N/-honestly][right-sized-orchestration][commit--scope-switch]. Apply: “shrink/eliminate top-level-files NOTE,” build baseline tarball enumerate real non-standard set, exclude per owner scope, re-build confirm top level standard files; consolidate dated/numbered families one regex; disable zsh nomatch glob cleanups.

what: Learning 61 — Closing a STALE issue (resolved by a prior session but never formally closed): verify the integration is LIVE and PINNED firsthand before closing — the proof is a test that would FAIL if reverted to the placeholder (S61, issue #34 close)
title: nprcgenekeepr — Project-Specific Learnings
text: () [verify--gating-fact-firsthand, cont. 57a] deliverable closing issue, gating fact issue’s resolution CLAIM — establish firsthand, don’t infer “looks done.” #34 (“integrate qcStudbook modInput”, bug/high) described placeholder QC (# TODO: Replace actual qcStudbook() call + results$cleaned <- rawData); current modInput.R:408/423 already calls qcStudbook()/runQcStudbook(). integration landed Shiny-module conversion (commit 7da01afe, extended c9019d51/bb7f2be6) CHANGELOG.md’s Session-20 entry (:1216-1217) even recorded “#34 … stale (already integrated)” — yet nobody closed GitHub issue. issue can outlive resolution; closing evidence-gated deliverable. handoff chain (S20→S60) kept listing #34 “highest-value open BUG implement” CHANGELOG already knew done — systemic issue-tracker-lags-code gap, one session’s miss. (b) [pin-test = integration proof; [mutation-check] sibling] single strongest evidence claimed-complete integration REAL test FAIL code reverted placeholder. test_modInput_qcStudbook.R:296 asserts "gen" %% names(cleaned); gen added qcStudbook() (qcStudbook.R:267), never old results$cleaned <- rawData passthrough → one assertion pins live path. verifying “X actually wired,” don’t just confirm call exists — locate (note ABSENCE ) discriminating test placeholder failed. (c) [firsthand test gate — skips load-bearing] test_qcStudbook.R 38/0/0/0 + test_modInput_qcStudbook.R 90/0/0/0 (pass/fail/err/skip). 0 skips mattered: shiny::testServer module-server tests carry skip_if_not_installed("shiny"), nonzero skip mean end--end module path never executed green hollow. Confirm shiny installed → tests actually drove modInputServer (upload → getData → assert cleaned studbook). (d) [right-sized adversarial close ultracode] irreversible public act HIGH-priority bug, ran small 3-lens refute--close workflow (residual-placeholder/live-path ‖ functional-completeness-vs-issue-intent ‖ test-authenticity), skeptic told find reason close → refuted=false, high confidence, 0 gaps. AUTHORITATIVE test gate run parent firsthand, trusted agents (agents read code; ran R). 3-lens fan-proportionate ; heavier pass ceremony, solo close underuse ultracode budget. (First launch failed unsupported run_in_background arg — Workflow always backgrounds; re-invoked clean, one self-corrected round-trip.) (e) [declare-N/-honestly, cont. 57d/58c] verify--close session writes production code tests → TDD phase N/every response; pre-committed fixing -session gap surfaced (separate TDD session) scope discipline held even “’m ” temptation. Reflexes: [verify-first][verify--gating-fact][mutation-check][right-sized-orchestration][declare-N/-honestly][news-vs-changelog][commit--scope-switch]. Apply: close issue prior session resolved--didn’t-close, verify resolution firsthand — find discriminating test original defect/placeholder failed (integration’s “pin”), run relevant tests confirming 0 skips conditionally-skipped end--end tests, high-value/irreversible close run small adversarial refute--close pass keeping test gate firsthand. picking backlog “bug,” READ CODE confirm ’s still live treating implementation work — tracker can lag code.

what: Learning 62 — Backlog-staleness audit: generalize the #34 finding to the WHOLE tracker via a classify→adversarial-refute fan-out — the refute pass earns its keep by knocking down a false-STALE the owner himself had flagged in 2020 (S62, audit / docs/audits/)
title: nprcgenekeepr — Project-Specific Learnings
text: () [generalize--#34-finding whole tracker] S61 found ONE issue (#34) resolved--open; audited 21 open issues staleness. Result: 2 21 fully done (#14 genotype support, #8 -parentage handling) — landed S20–25 Shiny-module conversion never closed; 5 PARTIAL (#1, #5, #9, #35, #37); 14 genuinely OPEN. tracker lags code, resolved→still-open direction — issue falsely “open” way. Confirms systemic gap “closing doesn’t happen,” “issues wrong.” (b) [adversarial-refute--close EARNS KEEP — ceremony] 3 issues classifier called STALE, skeptic confirmed 2 KNOCKED 1 (#1). #1 (“clear focal animals list”) Clear Focal Animals checkbox (modPedigree.R:84-88) resets focalIds(character(0L)) — never resets file-browser input (input$focalAnimalFile; shinyjs::reset anywhere), later “Update” re-reads still-uploaded file. owner’s 2020 GitHub comment says exactly : “Introduced partial fix… new checkbox Clear Focal Animals… clear file names read file browser.” Closing checkbox alone re-buried gap author documented six years ago. outward-facing close, refute step changed answer 1/3 candidates — load-bearing. (c) [verify-close-relevant-calls firsthand — incl. issue’s comments] Re-verified 3 close-relevant calls (#14/#8/#1) firsthand source GitHub. agent CITED #1 owner comment evidence; confirmed real via gh api repos/:owner/:repo/issues/1/comments (bare gh issue view 1 printed empty — TTY/pager quirk; API showed 1 comment). Agents read code; parent runs authoritative checks (: gh api, R-free grep/Read orderReport.R:44-54 + rankSubjects.R:38,43 #8, test assertions test_modInput_qcStudbook.R:538-545 #14). (d) [search--CONTENT, cited line] load-bearing classifier instruction: old issues’ line numbers drifted, grep quoted TODO TEXT / function name, never cited line. #35’s placeholder moved issue’s “lines 246-253” modPedigree.R:292-302 (real trimPedigree() call replacing ) — line-number check misses resolution; content search finds reveals ’s ancestors (getProbandPedigree walks backward ), PARTIAL STALE. (e) [hold STALE #34 bar] STALE = placeholder REPLACED real logic, TODO deleted/reworded. 14 OPEN issues still carry cited TODO VERBATIM (fillBins.R:6 “RMS provide description”, agePyramidPlot.R:60 chimp TODO, getPotentialParents.R:92-94 “bit hack”, removeAutoGenIds.R:4-6 leading-U). #8 confirmed-resolved--CAVEATED → downgraded close--NOTE (functional -solutions-live, gated optional origin column + test asserts Undetermined/rank=NA branch) — distinct #14’s clean close. (f) [Workflow args gotcha + build-safe report placement] Workflow({args:[38,37,…]}) arrived NON-array → pipeline() threw instantly (0 agents, 59 ms). Fix: hardcode work-list script (const ISSUES = Array.isArray(args)&&args.length ? args : [38,37,…]) re-launch patched scriptPath (resume needed — nothing cached). Placed report docs/audits/ — build-ignored via .Rbuildignore:15 ^docs$ — regress S60’s elimination “non-standard top-level files” NOTE (top-level dated audit file like existing PED_GV_AUDIT/TECH_DEBT_AUDIT re-added ). (g) [1--done: audit ≠ close] deliverable audit REPORT closure RECOMMENDATIONS; closing issues outward-facing follow-, executed session (stated Phase 1, held ). Net available: #14 clean close, #8 caveated close, #37/#35 updates, ID-cluster (#38/#32/#26/#31 — one feature split across four issues) consolidation. Reflexes: [verify-first][completeness-workflow][right-sized-orchestration][news-vs-changelog][declare-N/-honestly][commit--scope-switch][author-decision]. Apply: backlog-staleness sweep, fan one classifier per issue (instruct: search CONTENT, hold STALE #34 bar), adversarially REFUTE every STALE recommending close, verify close-relevant calls firsthand INCLUDING GitHub issue’s comments, write report build-ignored path, recommend — don’t execute — closes (1--done).

what: Learning 63 — Executing an audit’s close recommendation is itself evidence-gated: re-verify intent-completeness firsthand (it re-graded #14 from “clean” to “caveated”), and reconcile EVERY adversarial verdict against a load_all run — a “tests failing” refutation was a stale-installed-binary artifact (S63, issue #14 close)
title: nprcgenekeepr — Project-Specific Learnings
text: () [audit’s confidence HUNCH re-verified — don’t inherit ] S62 classified #14 “clean close, high confidence”; firsthand verification re-graded close--CAVEAT. audit’s per-issue classifier checked headline (separate-genotype-file path works + test pin passes) stopped . deeper check found commonPedGenoFile (combined-file) UI mode never integer-codes string alleles → genotypes never satisfy hasGenotype() never reach geneDrop(). Lesson: verify--close session executing audit recommendation must independently re-check intent-completeness WHOLE issue (: EVERY input mode track, just one audit cited), ratify audit’s grade. audit recommending close start verification, end . Learning 61() applied recommendation rather raw backlog item. (b) [reconcile adversarial verdict firsthand evidence — refuted≠true, refuted≠false, checked] 3-lens refute pass returned 1 confirm + 2 refuted; one refutation REAL one ARTIFACT. intent-completeness refutation (combined-file caveat) real changed deliverable. test-authenticity refutation — “test :503-547 actively FAILING, installed modInputServer missing genotype merge block” — FALSE: agent decompiled stale installed binary (compiled RDB) instead source. pkgload::load_all run 90/0/0/0 read merge block R/modInput.R:384-396 directly. Lesson: subagent claims R test failing code missing, may inspecting getNamespaceVersion/installed namespace, can lag working tree; authoritative source gate load_all (fresh install) run parent. Don’t accept refuted=true face value don’t dismiss — verify verdict firsthand; value refute pass questions raises, verdicts returns. (c) [stale-install recurring R-package verification trap — version string proof currency] getNamespaceVersion("nprcgenekeepr") returns rolling dev 1.1.0.9000 whether installed binary current months stale. matching version mean installed code equals source. agent decompiling installed namespace can therefore “see” code source already superseded (, , code source ADDED install lacks). Always test via load_all working tree verifying source-level claim; never let installed-binary inspection stand . (d) [verification flipped approved premise → re-confirm owner, even something decided] combined-file caveat DELIBERATE parity choice owner’s commit c9019d51. Even , changed close “clean” framing owner approved (picking “#14” menu) caveated one, surfaced via AskUserQuestion (clean / caveated / keep-open-narrowed) rather silently downgrading unilaterally closing. owner chose caveated close. Lesson: firsthand verification flips premise approved outward-facing action, re-confirm framing — owning past design decision authorizing today’s issue-state change new understanding. (Safeguards: “find contradicts described, surface instead proceeding.”) (e) [“close caveat” authorizes close + comment, new tracker writes — classifier enforced correctly] tried file 1-line follow-enhancement combined-file gap; auto-mode classifier DENIED (approved action closing #14; new issue separate external write). Right boundary. captured residual close comment instead (file pointers future enhancement needs) labeled “filed.” Lesson: outward-facing scope approved narrowly, keep within — record spun-gaps artifact authorized write, leave issue-creation owner unless explicitly approved. Don’t treat “optionally also…” menu option standing authorization. Reflexes: [verify-first][verify--gating-fact][reconcile-agent-claims-firsthand][stale-install-trap][author-decision][right-sized-orchestration][declare-N/-honestly][news-vs-changelog][commit--scope-switch]. Apply: executing audit’s close recommendation, re-verify issue’s FULL intent firsthand (every mode/path, just cited one) — audit’s grade hunch; run refute--close pass reconcile verdict pkgload::load_all run (stale installed binary yields false “tests failing”/“code missing” refutations); verification re-grades close, re-confirm framing owner via AskUserQuestion; keep new-issue creation “close caveat” scope — document spun-gaps close comment.

what: Learning 64 — When an adversarial gate SPLITS, reconcile the dissenting verdict by REPRODUCTION, not majority vote — a “hold-open” outvoted 2-to-1 was substantively right, and reproducing its claim (optional-column gating silently recreates the original bug) upgraded a footnote caveat into a strengthened one (S64, issue #8 close)
title: nprcgenekeepr — Project-Specific Learnings
text: () [split gate decided evidence, vote count] 3-lens refute pass closing #8 returned 1 hold-open (refuted=true, high) + 2 close--caveat (refuted=false, high). tempting move go 2--3 majority. Instead reconstructed dissenter’s central claim code: -parent founder offspring, run orderReport() without origin column → value="High Value", rank=1 (exact bug #8 describes); origin (NA ONPRC-born animal) → "Undetermined"/NA. reproduction CONFIRMED hold-open verdict’s substance even though outvoted. Lesson: adversarial verdicts inputs firsthand reconciliation, poll tallied — lone dissenter exactly one reproduce, ’s right changes deliverable. (Extends Learning 63(b): reconcile verdict; 64 adds: disagree, reproduction breaks tie, count.) (b) [optional-column gating SILENTLY recreates bug stronger finding footnote caveat] S62 audit graded #8 “close CAVEAT” treating origin gating (R/orderReport.R:31 ("origin" %% names(rpt))) footnote. Firsthand, gating means fix NOTHING — warning — studbook lacking optional origin column (absent bundled datasets; origin reaches report via intersect(getIncludeColumns(), names(ped)) R/reportGV.R:119). headline symptom fully present default path. Lesson: “implemented gated optional input” automatically minor caveat — check happens DEFAULT path whether user warned; safeguard silently -ops materially worse audit’s one-line note implied. staleness classifier checks headline + cited anchors stops; won’t probe alternate input path long comment thread’s second arc (, orphaned 2021 simulated-kinship subsystem + unresolved “discuss Matt” design item). (c) [premise-flip → re-confirm--owner reflex S63, second time running] Firsthand verification flipped approved premise (audit’s footnote caveat → reproduced silent-failure + orphaned subsystem), surfaced via AskUserQuestion (close--strengthened-caveat / hold-open--re-scope / close--file-followup) irreversible gh issue close. Owner chose strengthened caveat. Held S63 scope boundary: documented three remaining items (origin-absent safeguard, regression test, simulated-kinship integration) close comment candidate enhancements filed new issues. Lesson: premise-flip reflex isn’t one-— every audit-driven close gated re-verifying intent firsthand, reproduction (just code read) strongest re-grade evidence bring owner. Reflexes: [verify-first][reproduce--dissenting-verdict][verify--gating-fact][default-path--just-headline][author-decision][surface-premise-flip][scope-discipline][declare-N/-honestly][news-vs-changelog]. Apply: adversarial refute gate splits, reproduce dissenting (hold-open) verdict’s claim code deciding — majority “close” verdicts outweigh one reproduced blocker; treat optional-input gating potential silent-failure (test default path + check warning), footnote; verification re-grades approved close, re-confirm framing owner via AskUserQuestion keep new-issue creation “close caveat” scope.

what: Learning 65 — “Update a stale inventory issue” is a recompute-from-scratch task, not a patch-the-named-clusters task: the handoff said ≈2 clusters flipped; a call-graph reachability recomputation found 45 of 70 listed functions are now used (S65, issue #37 update)
title: nprcgenekeepr — Project-Specific Learnings
text: () [recompute, don’t patch cited clusters] S64 (inheriting S62 audit) framed #37 “strike resolved Shiny-module + genotype rows; keep still-accurate unused-export inventory” — ≈7 functions, “bulk holds.” -scratch reachability recomputation found 45 70 listed functions now used app (22 + 3 S3 methods still unused); totals 155 exports / 116 used / 39 unused vs issue’s 108 / 38 / 70. per-issue classifier checked headline (4 Shiny modules) + genotype anchor stopped — calibration miss flagged S62→#14 S63→#8, amplified #37 70-row inventory, single yes/. Lesson: deliverable “update stale inventory,” unit work recomputing WHOLE inventory, patching rows handoff names; handoff tells start, much stale. Stale entries inherited framing left place included rankSubjects, calcGU, filterKinMatrix/Report/Threshold, getOffspring, withinIntegerRange — now live. (b) [call-graph reachability right tool ’s reproducible] codetools::findGlobals(f, merge=FALSE)$functions ∩ package-functions gives function’s callees; BFS app entry seeds {runModularApp, runGeneKeepR, appUI, appServer} yields transitive “used app” set; exported names outside unused. rigorous grep (follows call graph, text matches) reliable farming per-function judgments agents (conflate test/man/@examples references app use — roxygen lives comments correctly seen findGlobals, parses function body). Concrete call paths evidence ship (e.g. rankSubjects: appServer → modGeneticValueServer → reportGV → orderReport → rankSubjects). Put method issue inventory reproducible, one-time snapshot. (c) [name static method’s blind spots CHECK — don’t hand-wave] findGlobals misses dynamic dispatch (.call/match.fun/get string calls) S3 generic dispatch. Checked explicitly: string-dispatched call R/ .call("rbind", …) (base), NONE 22 still-unused names appear string literal anywhere R/ → dynamic invocation closure missed; 3 S3 methods (print.summary.*, summary.nprcgenekeeprErr) aren’t dispatched app path (app’s summary() calls hit summary.default numeric vectors). stated--checked limitation verification; unstated one latent error. (Also note 3 S3 methods aren’t even getNamespaceExports — registered via S3method — yet issue author counted exported; keep S3 caveat rather silently dropping .)
