(d) [outward-facing edit, surface FORM + SCOPE acting] Editing owner’s issue body reversible (GitHub keeps edit history) still overwrites authored text, “also add 17 newer unused exports” expands scope beyond literal task. owner’s call → ONE AskUserQuestion concrete previews (strikethrough--place vs rewrite vs comment-; scope--70 vs add--17) let owner choose grounded mockups; timeline pointer comment silent body edit isn’t invisible watchers. surface--irreversible discipline S63/S64 used closes, applied UPDATE. Reflexes: [verify-first][recompute-don’t-patch][reproducible-method---artifact][name--check--blind-spot][surface-form--scope][right-sized-orchestration][declare-N/-honestly][news-vs-changelog][macos-dupe-scan]. Apply: “update stale inventory/audit issue,” recompute whole inventory reproducible static method (call-graph closure “used app”), adversarially check method’s blind spots, surface edit’s form + scope owner outward-facing change.

what: Learning 66 — Merging an out-of-band branch into a diverged base: prove the merge is clean BEFORE running it and confirm keep-both AFTER, and re-read any operating file the merge rewrites (S66, merge chore/methodology-pr2527-wording → add-methodology)
title: nprcgenekeepr — Project-Specific Learnings
text: () [bracket merge: prove-clean-, verify-keep--] branch target touched file, don’t git merge trust exit code — bracket verification. branch (one wording-commit ce7d6779, methodology PR #25/#27 adoption) edited PROJECT_LEARNINGS.md’s line-3 header blockquote; Sessions 63–65 appended Learning rows tail. : git rev-parse HEAD:<file> showed CLAUDE.md / SESSION_RUNNER.md / HOW_TO_USE.md blobs byte-identical branch base (→ three merge trivially), git diff b7f45901..HEAD -- PROJECT_LEARNINGS.md showed divergence tail-(@@ -224,3) vs branch’s line-3 edit (→ non-overlapping); git merge-tree dry run grepped actual ^<<<<<<< markers returned 0 (“changed ” line also prints informational, conflict — grep marker, phrase, raise false alarm). : confirmed new “size budget” header S63/64/65 tail appends survived (prompt’s “keep ” rule), git’s 3-way merge automatically non-overlapping hunks. Lesson: clean merge-tree dry run + blob-equality check turns “hope merges” “know , keep-proof”; bracketing whole value-add human/agent bare git merge. (b) [re-read operating file merge rewrites; close NEW text] merge rewrote SESSION_RUNNER.md §3C — close-routing learnings. Per prompt’s caution re-read merged 3C closing : now routes adopter-project learnings CLAUDE.md → Project-Specific Methodology Adaptations → Project-specific Learnings (repo redirects PROJECT_LEARNINGS.md) says explicitly edit synced “Learnings (added sessions)” table. learning went PROJECT_LEARNINGS.md, table — change merged codified rule follow. Lesson: merge lands new wording file operate (SESSION_RUNNER / SAFEGUARDS / CLAUDE), treat close-governed post-merge text, version read orient. (c) [anchor analysis live HEAD, handoff’s session number] task arrived --band context (branch prepared outside session protocol, S65’s handoff pre-name ), mid-flight user note corrected “S65 also closed since prompt written.” pre-merge analysis used git merge-base / merge-tree live HEAD (003ae525 = S65) rather session number quoted instructions, correction required zero rework — analysis already current. Lesson: compute merge/diff facts actual current ref; stale session-number instructions -op, redo. Reflexes: [verify-first][prove-clean--merge][verify-keep-][re-read-rewritten-operating-file][anchor--live-HEAD][right-sized-solo][declare-N/-honestly][news-vs-changelog][macos-dupe-scan]. Apply: branch merge sides touched shared file — bracket merge blob-equality + merge-tree dry-run (^<<<<<<< ) check -merge keep-confirmation; whenever merge edits file operate , re-read acting . mechanical single-commit merge explicit verification steps right-sized SOLO task — Workflow fan-needed (ultracode ≠ orchestrate-everything).

what: Learning 67 — Re-scoping a partially-done feature issue: verify which half shipped AND validate the issue’s OWN suggested API against the code (it can cite a signature that doesn’t exist), then expose the semantic fork the one-line ask hides (S67, issue #35 re-scope)
title: nprcgenekeepr — Project-Specific Learnings
text: () [issue’s “Suggested Implementation” claim verify, spec inherit] #35 proposed trimPedigree(focalIds(), ped, ancestors = TRUE, descendants = TRUE) — trimPedigree’s real signature (probands, ped, removeUninformative = FALSE, addBackParents = FALSE); ancestors/descendants params never existed. re-scope copied issue’s suggested call forward handed implementer non-compiling spec. body ALSO cited stale placeholder lines 246-253 already replaced live ancestor logic 292-302. Lesson: grooming feature issue, check every API body names actual function definition — author-proposed code old issue ages exactly like cited line numbers . Read signature, don’t trust snippet. (b) [verify half “X Y” ask already shipped — reading call chain, title] #35 = “include ancestors descendants.” Firsthand: ancestors DONE (modPedigree.R:292-302 → trimPedigree → getProbandPedigree, upward sire/dam closure getProbandPedigree.R:24-40), descendants — neither walks downward, getOffspring single-level . Lesson: compound feature ask, re-scope’s first job partition done/-done live call graph; handoff’s “ancestors done, descendants ” hint verify, finding restate (recompute-don’t-inherit discipline Learning 65, applied feature rather inventory). (c) [one-line ask can hide semantic fork — surface , don’t pick silently] “Include descendants” two non-equivalent implementations: () strict lineal — new downward closure mirroring getProbandPedigree, unioned ancestors (focal’s ancestors+descendants ); (B) reuse getPedDirectRelatives() (R/getPedDirectRelatives.R:46-59), loops parents offspring closure thereby also pulls collateral relatives (siblings/cousins/mates) = whole connected pedigree. package -directions primitive already, broader lineal, transitive descendants-helper. documented open design choice (owner’s pick) rather committing issue one. Lesson: re-scoping, expose design fork ask glosses (, lineal vs -relatives — plus UI help text modPedigree.R:125 already says “relatives” behavior ancestors-); grooming/re-scope deliverable faithful spec, prematurely picking approach implementation work session isn’t . Reflexes: [verify-first][recompute-don’t-inherit][validate--issues--API][partition-done-vs---call-graph][surface--semantic-fork][surface-form--scope][right-sized-solo][declare-N/-honestly][news-vs-changelog][macos-dupe-scan]. Apply: re-scope partially-implemented feature issue — trace live call chain partition half shipped, validate every API/line body cites current code (author-proposed snippets go stale like line numbers), surface edit’s form hidden semantic fork owner via AskUserQuestion outward-facing edit.

what: Learning 68 — A behavior-change feature’s RED phase must inventory EVERY pre-existing test that asserts the OLD contract, not just add tests for the new behavior; the full-suite regression read is the backstop, not the plan (S68, implement #35 descendants — first real TDD code session after the S57–S67 non-code run)
title: nprcgenekeepr — Project-Specific Learnings
text: () [grep test corpus contract ’re changing RED] trim feature deliberately flips existing contract: ancestors-→ ancestors+descendants. RED wrote new helper’s unit tests + 2 integration tests obvious file (test_modPedigree_processing.R), SECOND pre-existing test different file — test_modPedigree.R:419 (“trims pedigree based focal animals”) — still asserted old result (nrow==3, expect_false("D")) focal {,C}. strict-lineal, D child focal → descendant → now correctly included (nrow==4; E stays excluded half-sib collateral). full-suite clean-regression read caught GREEN (2 failures), updated new approved contract reasoning. Lesson: RED-planning behavior change (greenfield), grep -rn whole test corpus symbol/behavior ’re changing (trimPedigree / “trims pedigree”) bring EVERY old-contract assertion RED set — rely GREEN regression read surface . CLAUDE.md’s “clean-regression read” backstop proved worth , substitute exhaustive RED inventory. (FM #25-adjacent: new tests “felt complete” contract change rippled test RED plan never looked .) (b) [newly-added exported function trips object_usage_linter installed — prove ’s artifact, don’t dismiss ] adding getDescendantPedigree calling modPedigree.R, lintr flagged “visible global function definition ‘getDescendantPedigree’” — existing trimPedigree call one line warn. Cause: object_usage_linter resolves INSTALLED namespace; brand-new function lives dev (load_all) namespace reinstall. Re-running lint(..., object_usage_linter()) pkgload::load_all() → 0 warnings, proving staleness artifact, undefined-function bug (full suite passing already implied runtime resolution). Lesson: lint warning fires newly-added sibling function install-staleness artifact — confirm linting dev namespace loaded, rather ignoring “fixing” non-bug. (c) [project’s phase-gate convention, exercised real long non-code run] First actual RED→GREEN→REFACTOR session since S56-era code work. convention held cleanly: declared TDD phase atop every response; posed SEPARATE pre-RED approach decision (Option strict-lineal vs Option B getPedDirectRelatives) declaring RED; one AskUserQuestion PRE-RED→RED, RED→GREEN, GREEN→REFACTOR. Option design previewed owner came essentially straight S67’s documented spec, making PRE-RED→GREEN nearly mechanical. 0 stakeholder corrections — approach + every transition owner’s call, applied chosen. Right-sized SOLO: single-helper feature verifiable focused suite mechanical/directly-checkable; Workflow fan-ceremony (call S65/S66/S67 made — ultracode ≠ orchestrate-everything). Reflexes: [grep--contract--RED][regression-read---backstop---plan][prove--lint-artifact][declare-phase-every-response][separate-pre-RED-approach-decision][phase-gate-via-AskUserQuestion][right-sized-solo][news--changelog]. Apply: implementing feature changes existing behavioral contract, RED grep entire test corpus assertions OLD behavior bring RED set; treat newly-added-function object_usage_linter warning install-staleness artifact (confirm via load_all); keep declaring phase + gating transition via AskUserQuestion even small, clean feature.

what: Learning 69 — Closing an issue: verify the shipped code against EACH of the issue’s enumerated acceptance criteria, not just “the suite is green” — a green suite proves the tests pass, not that every sub-ask was addressed (S69, close #35)
title: nprcgenekeepr — Project-Specific Learnings
text: () [map close acceptance criteria, passing test count] #35 re-scoped S67 three explicit asks: (1) union descendant set existing ancestor set, (2) Option strict-lineal (collaterals), (3) align -promising “relatives” UI label. (irreversible, outward-facing) gh issue close, confirmed three firsthand working tree: union R/modPedigree.R:299-305, strict-lineal closure R/getDescendantPedigree.R (getParents/collateral step), help text :124-126 now reading “ancestors descendants”. Running three covering test files green necessary sufficient — green proves assertions hold, enumerated sub-ask shipped (UI-label item, e.g., failing test gating ). Lesson: issue body enumerates acceptance criteria (especially re-scoped issue lists ), close’s firsthand evidence criterion--criterion map asks → code, suite backstop — green-suite result standing map. (Extends S64/S65 “don’t close without firsthand evidence” rule: evidence acceptance-criteria coverage, just test status.) (b) [clean three-session feature lifecycle, honoring “1 done”] #35 ran S67 re-scope → S68 implement → S69 close — three sessions, one deliverable , bundling. S67 produced faithful spec (exposed Option /B fork); S68 implemented exactly Option full TDD shipped + closed-one commit; S69 administrative close firsthand re-verification. owner’s explicit “close #35” gate outward-facing action S68 deliberately deferred (FM #2 “keep going” avoided: S68 self-close issue implemented). Right-sized SOLO: single-issue close verifiable running three test files + reading diff mechanical/directly-checkable — Workflow fan-ceremony (call S65–S68 made; ultracode ≠ orchestrate-everything). Reflexes: [verify-first][map-asks--code--just-green-suite][owner-confirm--irreversible-close][1--done][right-sized-solo][declare-N/-honestly][news-vs-changelog][macos-dupe-scan]. Apply: closing issue, list acceptance criteria confirm one shipped code firsthand; treat passing suite backstop, proof; never self-close issue implemented session without explicit owner go-ahead.

what: Learning 70 — Consolidating overlapping issues is a SUBSYSTEM-mapping task, not an issue-reading task — and the adversarial completeness critic (not the facet-mappers) is what finds the structure the issues don’t mention (S70, consolidate #26/#32/#38 → umbrella #44)
title: nprcgenekeepr — Project-Specific Learnings
text: () [map subsystem issues touch, don’t just summarize issues] #26/#32/#38 framed problem single hard-coded leading-“U” convention. firsthand subsystem map (Workflow: 4 parallel facet readers — generation / detection / callers-config / tests — + completeness critic) found package actually carries THREE independent “unknown/auto-generated” conventions, coupled call ordering qcStudbook.R (unknown2NA → addUIds → addParents): (1) textual "UNKNOWN" sentinel (unknown2NA.R, case-insensitive toupper()=="UNKNOWN"); (2) "U%04d" prefix — TWO producers (addUIds.R:47,54 + obfuscateId.R:38-43, second minter) 7 detection sites across 4 files INCONSISTENT case-handling (stri_sub/startsWith case-sensitive vs grepl("^U", ignore.case=TRUE)), centralized predicate; (3) recordStatus="added"/"original" (addParents.R:43-61) ALREADY-centralized getRecordStatusIndex() predicate consumed 5 functions. Lesson: umbrella/consolidation deliverable’s unit work subsystem issues touch, issue text — issues describe symptom reporter noticed, landscape underneath. umbrella’s quality (“scope” boundary falls) depends map, titles. (b) [completeness critic earns keep — found facet-mappers asserted didn’t exist] four facet agents reported addUIds “exactly ONE site IDs synthesized” DETECTION facet said “centralized predicate exists.” adversarial completeness critic (phase 2, fed combined inventory told refute) overturned : obfuscateId mints second "U" id, addParents second synthesizer (tracked recordStatus, prefix), getRecordStatusIndex centralized predicate — parallel convention mappers blind scoped search "U". Lesson: ultracode, completeness-critic pass mapping fan-ceremony — facet agents scoped one lens structurally blind parallel mechanism; critic’s whole job find mechanism single lens searching . session’s load-bearing finding came critic, mappers. (c) [subagent’s map assumption firsthand-verified — especially irreversible/outward-facing action] writing map outward-facing artifacts (creating #44, closing #26/#32) re-read 8 load-bearing files (addUIds, removeAutoGenIds, addParents, getRecordStatusIndex, obfuscateId, unknown2NA, qcStudbook.R:188-199 ordering, modPedigree.R:112 tooltip) rather copying workflow’s findings verbatim — confirming three-convention thesis two-generator claim source. [verify-first]/recompute-don’t-inherit (Learning 65/67) extended WORKFLOW output: orchestration breadth lower firsthand-verification bar claims publish. Right-sizing note: INVERTS S65/S67/S69 “single-issue grooming = solo” call — MULTI-issue consolidation spanning subsystem exactly Workflow fan-+ adversarial verify pays ; right-size heuristic breadth surface, “’s grooming session.” Honest miss: AskUserQuestion option copy said closing 2 issues = “18 → 16”, forgetting umbrella new open issue (true net 18 → 17); caught verification, corrected handoff — decision-aid arithmetic deserves care deliverable’s. Reflexes: [verify-first][map--subsystem---issue-text][completeness-critic-finds--parallel-mechanism][verify-workflow-output--publishing][surface-form--scope][right-size--surface-breadth][declare-N/-honestly][news-vs-changelog][macos-dupe-scan]. Apply: consolidate overlapping issues umbrella — map whole subsystem touch (fan-facet readers + adversarial completeness critic catch parallel mechanisms single lens searches ), firsthand-verify every load-bearing claim outward-facing create/close, surface scope + originals-disposition owner via AskUserQuestion; recognize multi-issue consolidation Workflow-worthy even single-issue grooming .

what: Learning 71 — Implementing a “make it configurable, keep it byte-identical” feature: the byte-identical constraint is satisfied at the EXPRESSION level (a drop-in equivalent, NA-semantics included), and the UNCHANGED tests are the proof — not “the suite is green” (S71, implement #44/#38, configurable auto-ID format)
title: nprcgenekeepr — Project-Specific Learnings
text: () [byte-identical = expression-level equivalence, UNCHANGED tests proof] #44’s acceptance criterion #1 “configuration, existing behavior byte-identical.” satisfied replacing inline check predicate returns identical value, “cleaner” one: isGeneratedUnknownId(x) startsWith(.character(x), prefix), equals old stri_sub(x,1,1)=="U" / startsWith(x,"U") inputs including NA (yield NA NA, replacement true drop-even inside ped$sire[<idx>] <- NA index carries NAs). Generation: sprintf("U%04d", n) ≡ paste0("U", sprintf("%04d", n)); obfuscateId’s mint stays size - nchar(prefix) = size - 1 1-char default. proof 3 4 “U”-baking tests (test_addUIds, test_qcStudbook, test_modPedigree) passed UNCHANGED — one deliberate case-reconciliation test changed. Lesson: acceptance criterion “byte-identical,” verify equivalence expression level (new call return value, NA semantics , old one?) let unchanged characterization tests evidence — green suite full edited tests proves nothing back-compat. (b) [fixture’s edge-case datum “reconcile inconsistency” becomes concrete owner-facing fork — grep pre-RED] abstract ask “reconcile case-sensitivity” became real decision found lowercase "u001" test_obfuscateId.R:28. single datum made fork concrete: case-sensitive (issue’s recommendation) deliberate, test-visible behavior change ; case-insensitive breaks existing test. Grepping test corpus distinguishing data posing AskUserQuestion let hand owner evidence-based choice naming exactly test changes , hand-wave. Lesson: surfacing approach decision “reconciles inconsistency” “fixes latent bug,” grep fixtures data distinguishes options; decision aid cite specific test/line flips, owner chooses evidence, abstraction. (Pairs Learning 70’s “decision-aid care.”) (c) [handoff gotcha naming “second / easy--miss” site RED-inventory line item, closed completeness grep] S70’s gotcha — “obfuscateId SECOND \"U\" producer, easy miss; format change must touch ” — load-bearing. mint path needed getAutoIdPrefix() + size - nchar(prefix) (hard-coded "U" + size-1) honor multi-char configured prefix staying byte-identical 1-char default; missing left second generator un-threaded failed round-trip. GREEN ran exhaustive grep remaining auto-ID "U" literal across R/ confirmed 7 detection sites + 2 generators centralized ("U" hits unrelated sex-factor level M/F/U/H). Lesson: predecessor’s gotcha flags “second/parallel/easy--miss” site, promote explicit RED-scope item close loop completeness grep proves instance old literal survives. (d) [triage devtools::check NOTE attribution fixing — pre-existing baseline NOTE session’s resolve] check() returned 1 NOTE: spelling.R comparison test (spelling.Rout vs stale spelling.Rout.save reading “Done!”). Rather reflexively expand inst/WORDLIST regenerate .save (scope creep, FM #8), attributed : spell_check_package(".") plus check’s word list showed 0 new identifiers among 54 flagged words — flagged terms live pre-existing files. NOTE pre-existed session neither introduced worsened ; flagged future-housekeeping candidate left . Lesson: check() yields NOTE/WARNING, run underlying check directly confirm whether symbols contribute acting; “check clean anything change caused, 1 pre-existing baseline NOTE” honest, correct close state — fixing baseline noise separate deliverable. Right-size note: contained 6-file single-feature TDD change correctly SOLO (Workflow) — byte-identical claim directly checkable via full suite + exhaustive grep + check(); contrast S70’s multi-issue subsystem map, Workflow-worthy. Learning-70(c) heuristic held: right-size breadth surface, “’s code session.” Reflexes: [byte-identical--expression-level][unchanged-tests---proof][grep-fixtures---deciding-datum-pre-RED][promote-handoff-gotcha--RED-scope][completeness-grep--GREEN][attribute-check-NOTEs--fixing][right-size--surface-breadth][declare-phase-every-response][phase-gate-via-AskUserQuestion][news--changelog]. Apply: implement “configurable back-compatible” change — prove byte-identical expression-level equivalence (NA semantics included) characterization tests stay UNCHANGED; grep fixtures edge-case datum makes “reconcile” decision concrete cite owner’s decision aid; treat predecessor “second/easy--miss site” gotchas RED-scope items closed completeness grep; attribute every check() NOTE mine-vs-baseline touching .

what: Learning 72 — Consolidation ≠ deduplication: a consolidation session must let the firsthand research decide whether the issues are duplicates-to-close or distinct-sub-tasks-to-link; a thin shared primitive + severe lift asymmetry ⇒ a LINKING umbrella with both kept open, not closes (S73, consolidate #31/#28 → umbrella #45)
title: nprcgenekeepr — Project-Specific Learnings
text: () [disposition evidence outcome, pattern inherited prior consolidation] task (“consolidate parent-ID cluster umbrella”) implicitly carried S70’s #44 template, consolidated issues (#26/#32) TRUE duplicates got CLOSED. Firsthand, #31 #28 duplicates: share scalar “estimated conception date = birth − gestation” diverge sharply mechanism, data model, lift — #31 bounded -function refactor data already present; #28 needs NEW timestamped-colocation subsystem package wholly lacks, blocked #11/#12 data pulls. right disposition LINKING umbrella (#45) sub-tasks kept OPEN cross-linked — dedup--close. surfaced duplicate-vs-distinct finding + disposition via AskUserQuestion rather force-fitting prior pattern (owner chose linking-umbrella, open). Lesson: consolidation deliverable’s disposition (close--duplicate vs link--distinct-sub-task) decided research, consolidation preceded ; “umbrella” imply “close originals.” signal says LINK-don’t-merge thin shared primitive + lift asymmetry — verify assuming dedup. (b) [reading CORE file firsthand beat issue text subagent summaries] single scope-shaping fact — getPotentialParents ALREADY takes maxGestationalPeriod applies sire-side (:62), #31 “extend existing gestation quantity dam side,” “add gestation function none” — came reading function , issue bodies (say “use gestational length” none existed) verbatim facet readers. also let owner pick “reuse existing param” “new option” informed position. Lesson: grooming/design session, read core implementation firsthand drafting — issue describes symptom reporter noticed, subagents summarize, function tells already half-built reframes ask. (c) [firsthand-verification bar applies EVERY layer fan-, adversarial CRITIC included] Learning 70(c) verified facet-MAPPERS publishing; completeness CRITIC overstated — asserted “species column data model,” firsthand grep found example input pedigrees carry species column (deidentified_jmac_ped.csv) plus latent multi-species intent (#36, agePyramidPlot.R:60). published accurate, narrower fact #45 (species CANONICAL fixtures / parent-ID data model, present inputs) rather critic’s absolute; also re-confirmed firsthand #28’s location data genuinely absent getPotentialParents unwired (test + one ext-data caller → #37). Lesson: critic refutes mappers can still overstate — verify claim publish whoever produced , including adversarial pass. Right-size note: multi-issue subsystem consolidation Workflow-worthy (breadth surface — Learning 70’s heuristic held) even though #45’s scope narrow (one function); contrast single-issue closes S69/S72 rightly ran solo. Honest −1: confirmed species column raw CSV headers trace whether ingestion (getPossibleCols/toCharacter) retains internal pedigree — stated verified-narrow fact, full trace resolved “species-specific gestation even reachable today” #31 implementer. Reflexes: [verify-first][disposition---evidence-outcome---inherited-pattern][thin-primitive+lift-asymmetry⇒link-don’t-merge][read--core-file--drafting][verify-every-layer-including--critic][surface-disposition-via-AskUserQuestion][right-size--surface-breadth][declare-N/-honestly][news-vs-changelog][macos-dupe-scan]. Apply: consolidating overlapping issues, let firsthand research decide duplicate-vs-distinct (thin shared primitive + lift asymmetry ⇒ linking umbrella sub-tasks kept open, dedup-closes); read core implementation drafting design (reveals ’s already half-built reframes ask); hold firsthand-verification bar every layer workflow’s output, adversarial critic included.

what: Learning 73 — TDD on an intentional behavior change with exact-set characterization fixtures: derive the new expected sets from an INDEPENDENT read-only reference computation + per-delta justification (never from running the production change), and back them with from-first-principles driving tests that fail on the old code for the RIGHT reason (S74, implement #31 — gestation-derived dam-exclusion window)
title: nprcgenekeepr — Project-Specific Learnings
text: () [RED chicken--egg exact-set fixtures, resolved independent oracle + per-delta justification] behavior change rewrites expected output expect_identical characterization fixture (dams_1/dams_4), write new expected values running -yet-written production change — circular (asserting code matches ). Resolution: PRE-RED built throwaway, read-copy function intended one-line change (/tmp, never committed, never touching R/) oracle, diffed shipped output, justified every delta biological rule — 5 dropped dams (0B7XRI −193 d, PHCADH +195 d, 1SIP4V +183 d, DMI0QY +192 d, HV7LZ3 −192 d) delivered another offspring within new ±maxGestationalPeriod window, gestation conflict. new fixtures = old minus justified removals, written test RED; fail shipped code (still returning old 7/10 sets) right reason. Lesson: new expected values characterization-fixture behavior change come independent derivation (reference computation can read, plus per-row “changed” check), production code test — comment block recording delta’s justification turns “silently regenerated” “recomputed justified” (umbrella’s explicit bar). (b) [characterization fixtures lock surface; CORRECTNESS proof separate, -first-principles driving tests] exact-set fixtures regression net, proof rule. added two tests prove rule independently rhesus fixture’s accidents: (1) hand-verifiable synthetic pedigree — focal animal plus DAM_IN (another offspring +200 d) DAM_OUT (+400 d) — asserting DAM_IN excluded maxGestationalPeriod=210 retained 180, isolating exact window edge values verifiable hand; (2) differential/responsiveness test asserting BRI2MW’s dam set differs 165 d 210 d (acceptance criterion #2: selection must respond parameter, hard-coded half-year). fail shipped code right reason — synthetic one shipped uses fixed ±182.5 d window, differential one shipped dam selection ignored maxGestationalPeriod entirely. Lesson: pair brittle exact-set characterization fixtures least one synthetic, hand-computed test isolates changed rule minimal controlled input, (issue frames “responds X”) differential test across two values X; fixtures catch unintended regressions, driving tests prove intended behavior. (c) [“reconcile X appropriate” prompt ANALYZE, necessarily CHANGE — proving candidate change -op real result] umbrella flagged two adjacent things (“reconcile sire/dam exit-check asymmetry appropriate”; consider preferential band). Firsthand analysis showed () exit-check asymmetry (exit ≥ birth − gestation sires vs exit ≥ birth dams) biologically correct — sire need present conception, dam birth — right action document intentional, change ; (ii) widening exclusion window leaving preferential band’s inner edge old half-year behaviorally -op, wider exclusion (:94) always removes overlap region preferential intersection (:97) runs — leaving band untouched minimal equivalent choice (proved data: outputs identical either way). surfaced resolved scope pre-RED AskUserQuestion (minimal vs broader-reconciliation), recommending minimal. Lesson: spec says “reconcile/consider X appropriate,” deliverable analysis; “X already correct — document ” “changing X provably -op — don’t” valid, scope-minimizing outcomes — surface recommended option rather changing code look responsive (FM #8 resisted). Right-size note: contained single-function change correctly SOLO (Workflow) — behavior change directly checkable via independent oracle + full suite + check(); read-exploration quantified deltas research needed context, fan-(Learning 70’s right-size--surface-breadth heuristic held). Reflexes: [independent-oracle--fixture-deltas][justify-every-delta--silently-regenerate][synthetic-hand-verifiable-driving-test][differential-test--responds--X][prove---op][document-correct-asymmetry-dont-change-][declare-phase-every-response][phase-gate-via-AskUserQuestion][right-size--surface-breadth][news--changelog][macos-dupe-scan]. Apply: TDD intentional behavior change rewrites characterization fixtures — derive new expected values independent read-reference computation justify delta domain rule (never production change test); back hand-verifiable synthetic-input test isolates changed rule , ask “responds X,” differential test across two values X; treat “reconcile X appropriate” call analyze, proving X correct--change -op valid minimal-scope outcomes.

what: Learning 74 — A spec/grooming session’s research workflow needs a critic that separates DERIVED findings from INVENTED design, and recompute-don’t-inherit extends to your own project’s prior issue maps (which go stale when later code ships) (S76, spec #28 colocation data model)
title: nprcgenekeepr — Project-Specific Learnings
text: () [facet asked REASON semantics returns design proposals dressed findings — completeness critic’s job spec workflow demote ratifiable options] research workflow includes facet reasons (semantics, modeling) rather reads (code, config), output mix findings proposals — proposals arrive phrased like derived requirements. Facet E (colocation inference semantics) returned elaborate 3-case model (missing-sire / missing-dam / -unknown), postnatal mother-infant co-housing window, grain-confidence ordering, overlap-duration weighting — none exists code — spec_implications worded like settled findings. completeness critic caught exactly (“almost entirely INVENTED design, derived package evidence … presenting invented design implications risks spec adopting unvalidated husbandry assumptions settled”), spec carries [OPEN — husbandry ratification required], fact. code-reading facets needed critic different failure: inter-reader contradiction (Facet B “species novelCol survives” vs Facet D “species dropped”), resolved firsthand qcStudbook.R:281-283 (sb[, c(cols, novelCols)] ⇒ survives). Lesson: critic pass fanned-research must classify item derived-vs-proposed reconcile contradictions; reading facets overstate absence/claims, reasoning facets invent design — must demoted harden spec. (b) [recompute-don’t-inherit applies project’s prior issue maps — go stale later code ships] design issue’s “verified firsthand” current-state map verified authoring. Umbrella #45 (authored S73) carried line-cited map getPotentialParents, S74 (#31) rewrote function — #45’s :72-94 dam-window citation stale session. re-read function working tree (spec’s §2 cites post-S74 lines: window :83-85, exclusion :106, fallback :112-115) rather inherit #45’s map, said spec. Lesson: Learnings 70/72c/73’s recompute principle applied self-authored umbrella — place tempted trust. code inherited map describes shipped change map written, map stale; recompute note supersession. (c) [non-obvious cross-cutting constraint spec’s highest-value finding] owner flagged grain + temporal model; research surfaced constraint neither #28 #45 mentioned: obfuscation coherence. obfuscatePed jitters Date column independently (obfuscatePed.R:34-37 + fresh runif per element obfuscateDate.R:50, ±30 d default) covers pedigree — naïvely obfuscating location dates corrupts interval-overlap math (±30 d ≈ 1/5 gestation) orphans location FK. spec makes coherent per-animal-delta obfuscation + alias-remap explicit requirement (§9), alongside cross-cutting items originating issue didn’t name (null-coverage matrix, location = NULL byte-identical default, performance colony scale). Lesson: data-model spec’s value disproportionately cross-cutting constraints originating issue omitted; critic’s section--section outline exists force view, merely answer owner’s flagged questions. Right-size note: multi-facet spec genuinely warranted Workflow (5 readers + critic) — unlike contained single-function S74 change correctly SOLO — surface spanned four subsystems (conception primitive, ingestion/data-model, LabKey/Oracle/ARMS sourcing, obfuscation/temporal) single context maps well (Learning 70’s right-size--surface-breadth heuristic, breadth side time). Reflexes: [critic-classifies-derived-vs-invented][reconcile-inter-reader-contradictions-firsthand][recompute-stale-self-authored-map][firsthand-verify--outward-facing-spec][surface-cross-cutting-constraints][owner-decisions-via-AskUserQuestion][recommend--rationale-plus-open-register][additive-comments--body-overwrites][right-size--surface-breadth][news-vs-changelog][macos-dupe-scan]. Apply: spec/design/grooming session fans research — run completeness critic (1) classifies facet item derived--evidence vs proposed-design (carry proposals ratifiable [OPEN], never fact), (2) catches resolves inter-reader contradictions firsthand, (3) names cross-cutting constraints originating issue didn’t; recompute current-state map inherit — including project’s prior umbrella/issue maps — working tree, later commits silently invalidate .

what: Learning 75 — Before putting a spec’s recommendations to the owner, verify each [REC] firsthand against the code: a verify-and-sharpen workflow can OVERTURN a prior session’s own recommendations, and most “open decisions” aren’t decisions for the owner at all (S77, ratify #28’s §13 open-decisions register)
title: nprcgenekeepr — Project-Specific Learnings
text: () [spec’s [REC] assumption-level claim re-verified — verifying asking can flip ] decisions/ratification session’s first job relay spec’s recommendations owner; re-prove one working tree, spec author wrong. S76 spec’s §5-case-3 [REC] said -parents-unknown animals “known anchor,” colocation withheld (require ≥1 known parent). item-verifier re-read getPotentialParents.R:46-48 firsthand found pUnknown filter inclusive — -unknown infant already processed , crucially, birth-time location valid dam-side anchor, identical missing-dam case; sire side genuinely anchorless. recommendation flipped “withhold” “dam-side colocation ,” flagged overturn owner rather presenting spec’s [REC] settled. Separately, §10 mis-cited #36 (“Add chimpanzee-specific age pyramid plot settings”) “make species first-class” prerequisite — firsthand gh lookup showed #36 display ticket; first-class species un-ticketed (now #46). Lesson: treat every [REC] inbound spec — especially one prior session authored — claim re-verify owner sees ; verify--sharpen fan-exists precisely catch recommendations citations plausible--wrong. Learnings 70/72c/73/74b’s recompute-don’t-inherit applied recommendations, just current-state maps. (b) [“open-decisions register” -states owner must decide — classify item asking] every [OPEN] item owner-judgment call; many corollaries decisions already made deferrals gated absent inputs, bundling questions wastes stakeholder’s attention. completeness critic classified 8 register items 4 genuine owner-decisions (missing-dam model, -unknown, output shape, provenance) vs 4 ratifiable corollaries/deferrals (coherent-obfuscation = technical-correctness requirement; single-species, flat-file, POSIXct = corollaries S76’s already-DECIDED scope #11/#12-gated). also found two §7 policy gaps absent §13 despite register’s “owner sign-sizing” contract. asked 4 genuine decisions via AskUserQuestion (2 rounds, staggered dependent -unknown item informed missing-dam answer — -call questions answered simultaneously, true dependency requires later call), folded rest + §7 gaps single multi-select batch ratification. Result: 0 stakeholder corrections, recommendations accepted. Lesson: classify register items genuine-decision / safe-ratification / already-decided / --scope-defer composing questions; ask genuine ones room (crux first), batch rubber-stamps, order calls dependent decisions follow decisions depend . (c) [record ratifications additively split discovered mis-citation issue] deliverable ratification session decisions recorded spec lives, plus tracker corrections verification surfaced. posted ratified register new comment #28 (preserving S76 spec — FM #22), item annotated [DECIDED-S77]/[SIZING] two corrections inline; added register-ratified link comment umbrella #45; (owner consent via AskUserQuestion) filed #46 corrected first-class-species dependency rather letting mis-citation rot spec footnote. Carried sizing notes forward implementer (new species-dependent postnatalCoHousingWindow param; obfuscateDate.R:49-57 per-element-re-draw rework break existing obfuscation tests). Right-size note: verify--sharpen Workflow (8 verifiers + critic) right call — verifying 8 independent [REC]s different files genuine breadth fan-(Learning 70), de-risked owner decisions catching two unsound spec claims reached owner; SOLO read tempted trust spec’s recommendations. Reflexes: [verify-every-REC-firsthand--asking][overturn-prior-session-recommendations--wrong][classify-register-items-genuine-vs-ratifiable][stagger-dependent-AskUserQuestion-across-calls][crux-first-batch--rubber-stamps][additive-comments--body-overwrites][file--issue---discovered-miscitation][carry-sizing-notes---implementer][right-size--surface-breadth][news-vs-changelog][macos-dupe-scan]. Apply: session ratifies/grooms inbound spec’s open-decisions list — re-verify recommendation citation firsthand (ready overturn prior session), classify items truly owner’s decide vs corollaries batch-ratify, stagger genuinely-dependent questions across AskUserQuestion calls, record outcome additively spec lives splitting discovered tracker error issue.

what: Learning 76 — Triaging “unused exports” is a coupling-and-provenance problem, not a per-function checklist: “app-unreachable ≠ dead code”, caller-edges must be proven REAL (not roxygen/@seealso/comment), and mutually-referencing unused sets form CLOSED ISLANDS whose keep/wire/retire decision is a unit (S78, triage #37)
title: nprcgenekeepr — Project-Specific Learnings
text: () [disposition axis wire-/ keep--public-API / retire — dual-purpose package DEFAULT keep, retire] #37 lists functions exported unreached Shiny app’s call graph; naïve reading “dead code delete.” CLAUDE.md’s Project Overview states package enhanced “expose functions use either interactively R scripts” — app-unreachable expected state deliberate script API. right framework three dispositions: wire-(clear app value + latent intent — built--unmounted module, open-issue mandate), keep--public-API (default export documented + tested + @examples/vignette/inst use, called another package function; retiring breaking change), retire (genuinely dead: tests/examples/vignette/callers, superseded — HIGH bar). Result #37: 2 wire-, 37 keep, 0 retire. Lesson: triaging “unused” exports, anchor package’s stated dual nature; “unused app” reachability fact, verdict — make retire earn breaking-change-level burden proof, treat keep--public-API default. (b) [“otherPkgCallers” claim worthless edge proven REAL call — roxygen/@seealso/comment references masquerade dependencies] investigator agents reported calcFE/calcFG “called calcFEFG/calcFounderContributions/calcRetention”; completeness critic re-grepped #'/comment lines stripped found called NOTHING — calcFEFG computes FE/FG via calcFounderContributions+calcRetention (NEW-13/NEW-23 refactor), calcFE(/calcFG( tokens R/ refactor comments. keep disposition survived (script-API grounds), retire-blocking dependency analysis built fabricated edge unsafe. verified firsthand recording. Lesson: caller-edge used justify keep/block-retire must verified function call, @seealso tag, @examples line, provenance comment; fan-reports “called X”, re-grep stripping roxygen/comments trusting . (Recompute-don’t-inherit — Learnings 70c/72c/74b/75a — applied dependency graph .) (c) [find CLOSED ISLANDS — maximal unused sets call reached nothing live — disposition COUPLED] Per-function dispositions hid real structure: two islands. obfuscation trio (obfuscatePed→obfuscateId/obfuscateDate, obfuscatePed callerless) logging/error/export trio (logModuleEvent called safeExecute+savePlotToFile, callerless). Neither reachable anything live, island’s keep/wire/retire decision must made unit — retire obfuscateId obfuscatePed lives, “wire logging standard” vs “retire island” one decision three functions. investigators’ uniform “high-confidence wire-” logging island -stated (“built--unmounted” “tried--rejected--favor--ad-hoc” observationally identical call graph alone — safeExecute zero callers ever; app deliberately uses raw ggsave 7 sites), critic correctly demoted owner decision. Lesson: triage unused exports must compute call graph among unused set surface connected components; closed island one decision, absent positive intent signal (open issue, TODO, partial wiring) unadopted-infra island owner roadmap call, high-confidence wire-. Right-size note: 39-export triage genuinely warranted Workflow (9 investigators + critic) — breadth surface (Learning 70’s heuristic, breadth side) — critic earned keep every axis (fabricated edge, closed islands, confidence calibration, #8-CLOSED/#10-OPEN roadmap correction). Reflexes: [app-unreachable≠dead-code][keep--public-API---default][retire-must-earn--breaking-change-burden][prove-caller-edges--real--roxygen][re-grep-stripping-comments][compute--call-graph-among--unused-set][closed-island--one-decision][-high-confidence-wire--without--positive-intent-signal][verify-critic-claims-firsthand][bind-clusters--VERIFIED-open-issues][surface-genuine-decisions-via-AskUserQuestion][file--issue---ratified-wire-][additive-comments--body-overwrites][right-size--surface-breadth][declare-N/-honestly][news-vs-changelog][macos-dupe-scan]. Apply: triage “unused/exported” code — anchor package’s stated script-vs-app duality (keep--public-API default; retire carries breaking-change burden); prove every caller-edge real call (strip roxygen/comments re-grep) using justify disposition; compute call graph among unused set treat closed island single coupled decision; require positive intent signal assigning high-confidence wire-; verify every critic claim firsthand; record dispositions additively, filing tracking issue ratified wire-.

what: Learning 77 — A “wire-in” (#37 integration) is not one shape: a built-but-unmounted module is a mount-only wire-in (no design step), but a never-surfaced exported function is a build-from-scratch wire-in whose FIRST session is a design-decisions step resolving the UX forks — don’t read a handoff’s “implement (Real TDD)” as license to code when the user-facing surface doesn’t exist yet (S79, resolve UX forks for the getPotentialParents wire-in → #48)
title: nprcgenekeepr — Project-Specific Learnings
text: () [classify wire-scoping — mount-vs build--scratch decides session count] #37’s two ratified wire-ins look alike issue list decompose differently. ORIP (#47) mount-wire-: modORIPReporting.R already exists complete+tested, whole job two edits (tabPanel + mod*Server call) — product decisions, one session. getPotentialParents (#48) build--scratch wire-: module, UI, render/export logic exists, app value gated genuine UX forks (maxGestationalPeriod come ; surface live; triggered exported) owner’s decide. honest decomposition two sessions — design-decisions session (one: AskUserQuestion forks, record tracking issue) TDD implementation session — one. Lesson: sizing wire-, check whether thing wired already exists built unit; , ’s mount (skip design, go straight TDD); must built, resolve product/UX forks first treat resolution deliverable. (b) [handoff’s “implement (Real TDD)” candidate label, license skip design gate] S78’s handoff pre-named “Implement getPotentialParents wire-… Real TDD.” Taken literally invites starting code; surface didn’t exist, load-bearing first move resolving forks (FM #18 — don’t bleed design implementation; FM #23 — owner’s “explain ” question, even “Yes, proceed” meant proceed design-step-first path ’d recommended, “start coding”). explained firsthand, recommended path, “Yes” claimed session (Phase 1B stub), declared TDD N/, asked three forks crux-first via AskUserQuestion (0 corrections), recorded additively new issue #48 + link comment umbrella #45, stopped code. Right-size note: correctly SOLO — three well-scoped product forks grounded ~4 files (getPotentialParents.R, appUI.R, appServer.R, fromCenter producers) focused read, breadth fan-; Workflow theater (Learning 70’s right-size heuristic, contained side — call S74/S75). Reflexes: [classify-wire--mount-vs-build][build--scratch-wire--needs--design-session-first][handoff-candidate-label≠skip--gate][question--instruction-FM23][resolve-UX-forks-via-AskUserQuestion-crux-first][file--issue---ratified-design][additive-comments--body-overwrites][right-size-SOLO---contained-read][declare-N/-honestly][news-vs-changelog][macos-dupe-scan]. Apply: handoff issue names “wire-,” first determine whether wired unit already exists (mount-→ go straight TDD implementation session) must built (build--scratch → first session resolves owner’s UX forks records tracking issue; implementation separate TDD session); never let inbound “implement” label skip design gate user-facing surface doesn’t yet exist.

what: Learning 78 — Executing a build-from-scratch Shiny wire-in under strict TDD: extract the module’s data logic into a PURE helper so the contract is pinned by deterministic tests (not trapped behind reactives), and the mandatory Phase-3E for a module-mount is a headless AppDriver boot — which closes the integration gap unit tests cannot, modulo three repo toolchain gotchas (S80, implement #48: getPotentialParents tab)
title: nprcgenekeepr — Project-Specific Learnings
text: () [find pure function hiding inside module test exhaustively; let testServer cover reactive glue] render/CSV mapping (getPotentialParents’s list--lists → flat data.frame) extracted flattenPotentialParents() — Shiny-free — mirroring existing makeFounderStatsTable/makeGeneticSummaryTable pattern. made 7 14 tests trivially deterministic (columns; NULL/empty → 0-row empty state; multi-animal flatten; empty-sires → ""/0; write.csv round-trip), helper feeds DT::renderDT downloadHandler, -screen table CSV diverge. reactive surface (shiny::testServer) prove glue: button → getPotentialParents → flatten → table, plus two empty-state degradations (fromCenter column; unknowns). Note testServer runs real reactive graph (mocks), happy-path test rhesus fixture genuine module-level integration evidence — remaining runtime unknown whether module actually mounted assembled app. Lesson: TDD-ing Shiny module, first ask “pure function hiding inside module?” — pull , test data-/data-, keep reactive tests thin. Honor ratified UI scope : owner ratified gestation numeric input, minParentAge stayed server param (default 2.0, QC value), second UI input — don’t let helper’s flexibility tempt extra surface. (b) [Phase-3E mount headless AppDriver boot — three gotchas decide whether runs whether trust logs] Build-clean + testServer-green prove module works isolation tabPanel/mod*Server wiring mounted shared$currentPedigree reaches ; integration gap exactly Phase-3E must close (FM #24). Booting inst/shinytest/app.R (= shinyApp(appUI(), appServer)) shinytest2::AppDriver closes : broken wiring ⇒ boot absent controls. Confirmed firsthand: app boots full server init, tab + four namespaced controls mount, default 210 set, navigation works, existing tabs survive, module’s outputs appear clean shiny:value potentialParents-* log entries. Three gotchas: (1) Rscript AppDriver aborts “Reason: CRAN” unless NOT_CRAN=true set (non-interactive ⇒ treated CRAN); (2) E2E app drives installed package — devtools::install() dev code first smoke tests stale bits; (3) shinyBS defined JS console errors pre-existing app-wide noise (shinyBS popovers used elsewhere) — separate regression baseline noise, grep captured logs module’s namespace, bare word “error”. e2e suite opt-(NPRC_RUN_E2E=true) skips default test()/check(), substitute actively running smoke session. Reflexes: [extract--pure-helper---module][test-pure-logic-exhaustively-reactive-glue-thinly][one-helper-feeds-table--CSV][testServer-runs--real-reactive-graph][honor--ratified-UI-scope--extra-inputs][phase3E---mount---headless-AppDriver-boot][NOT_CRAN=true--AppDriver--Rscript][install-dev-code--e2e][distinguish-preexisting-log-noise--namespace][declare-TDD-phase-every-response][gate-every-transition-via-AskUserQuestion][news--changelog---user-facing-feature][macos-dupe-scan]. Apply: implementing build--scratch Shiny wire-strict TDD — extract data transformation pure Shiny-free helper feeding every output, pin deterministic tests, use testServer reactive glue; run mandatory Phase-3E headless AppDriver boot assembled app (install dev code first, NOT_CRAN=true, separate namespace’s logs pre-existing app noise).

what: Learning 79 — Verifying a shipped feature with a live owner click-through: do the click-through FIRST (it catches integration defects headless checks bless), but the example data you stage must pass through the app’s EXACT ingest+validate path — a pre-flight that diverges from the app (reader na.strings, or processQcStudbookResult vs the raw errorLst the UI shows) ships a defective fixture to the owner (S81, owner-confirm close #48 via click-through)
title: nprcgenekeepr — Project-Specific Learnings
text: () [click--FIRST earns keep — caught defect headless pre-check blessed] owner ran live tab hit “Subject(s) listed sire dam” (offending id blank → “cell empty”); pre-flight pipeline run said CLEAN. Root cause: staged example CSV wrote unknown parents empty cells (write.csv(na="")), app’s text reader (modInput.R:274 = read.table(..., fill=TRUE, quote="\""), default na.strings="NA") reads "" empty string, NA, "" appeared sire dam columns → correctParentSex.R:71 intersect(sires,dams) flagged . pre-check used na.strings=c("","NA"), silently coercing ""→NA masking bug — pure FM #24 instance (verification diverged app, “headless-passes” blessed runtime defect). Fix: write unknown parents literal NA (matching ExamplePedigree.csv) re-verify app’s exact reader → clean + 50 candidates. Lesson: “click-first” (owner’s call ) ceremony — exercises real browser→reader→QC→reactive path unit/headless checks approximate; let run commit/close. (b) [match app’s EXACT verification surface, convenient proxy] Two divergences bit session. () reader’s na.strings (). (ii) judged “file clean?” processQcStudbookResult()$hasErrors, category-set excludes sireAndDam error — app’s Errors tab renders raw errorLst$sireAndDam (qcStudbook(reportErrors=TRUE)) directly. “0 errors” verdict read signal UI use. Lesson: pre-verify app-ingested data, read file way readDataFile inspect errorLst components UI displays — reuse app’s functions, don’t reimplement looser proxy. (c) [diagnose alarming--cosmetic warnings CODE, don’t guess fix] “Column name case changed: fromCenter → fromcenter” warning looked like break getPotentialParents (case-sensitive "fromCenter"). Reading fixColumnNames.R settled firsthand: :20 lowercases headers (logs caseChange), :61 restores fromcenter→fromCenter; cleaned studbook keeps fromCenter, feature works. Cosmetic (noise recordStatus/geographicOrigin). cure owner alarm source-grounded explanation, speculative “try X.” (d) [shipped example data may adversarial--design — stage purpose-built clean fixture, owner-chosen] package’s pedigree example files deliberately error-laden input-error QC fixtures; none reaches feature’s happy path. live demo new feature often needs purpose-built clean fixture — inst/extdata/rhesusPedigree_fromCenter.csv (rhesusPedigree + fromCenter=TRUE, unknowns literal NA), source chosen owner via AskUserQuestion (rhesus vs full-ExamplePedigree vs modify--place; new file avoids blast radius many tests/vignettes referencing ExamplePedigree.csv). Surface handoff next demo session doesn’t rediscover . Right-size note: correctly SOLO — contained diagnose--stage across ~10 files interactive owner round-trips breadth fan-; Workflow theater (Learning 70, contained side). what: Learning 80 — Backfilling a regression E2E test for ALREADY-SHIPPED behavior under strict TDD: the RED→GREEN cycle is degenerate (no production code), so map it honestly — RED authors assertions with TEETH that self-skip when opt-in is off, GREEN re-derives the baked regression value through the app’s EXACT pipeline BEFORE the browser run, and the browser E2E run itself IS the Phase-3E verification; preserve the sibling test idiom over DRY-extraction (S82, opt-in E2E test for the #48 Potential Parents tab)
title: nprcgenekeepr — Project-Specific Learnings
text: () [declare degenerate cycle front gate — don’t fake failing-first RED] deliverable durable opt-E2E test feature already shipped (S80) owner-verified (S81), production code write classic “RED fails, GREEN makes pass” literally apply. Rather perform fake failing-first cycle, declared honest classification PRE-RED→RED gate (regression/characterization backfill) mapped phases truthfully: RED = author test data assertion TEETH (passes shipped feature returns verified result; broken/empty feature renders empty-state fails match) self-skips cleanly opt-env var ; GREEN = run shipped feature confirm green; REFACTOR = lint/tidy. RED verification “run , watch self-skip correctly” (SSSS, 0 fail/error) — opt-equivalent “watch fail”. Lesson: production code already exists, don’t contort work fake RED→GREEN — name degenerate cycle gate define RED/GREEN/REFACTOR concretely mean test backfill (teeth + clean self-skip / run-green--shipped / lint), discipline stays honest instead theatrical. (b) [GREEN’s real work re-deriving regression value app’s EXACT object--test, expensive browser run] regression lock (PP_EXPECTED_CANDIDATES <- 50L) good number baked . browser run re-derived app’s exact pipeline — read.csv (CSV reader path, modInput.R:279) → runQcStudbook(minParentAge=2, reportChanges=TRUE)$cleaned → setPopulation → findPedigreeNumber/findGeneration (modPedigree.R:261-280) → getPotentialParents(_, 2.0, 210L) — looser raw-rhesusPedigree path unit test uses. Crucially confirmed object module actually feeds: exports pedigree = reactive(pedigreeData()) (modPedigree.R:344) — FILTERED pedigree (generated-unknowns removed), processedPedigree — computed count , getting 50 either way, browser E2E passed first try. Lesson: regression-locking test, independently re-derive locked value production object--test (trace reactive/return code actually consumes, convenient proxy) slow end--end run; distinction might matter (filtered vs full pedigree), compute PROVE ’s immaterial rather assume — recompute-don’t-inherit (Learnings 70c/72c/74b/75a) applied test’s expected value. (c) [browser E2E Phase-3E runtime verification, assertions must teeth; preserve sibling idiom DRY-extraction] opt-browser E2E actually runs (chromote present) strongest Phase-3E — real Chrome, real reactive graph, real upload→QC→pedigree→compute→DT-render→CSV-download — GREEN run doubles mandatory runtime smoke (FM #24 answered head-, “skipped/build-clean”). assertions deliberately teethy: “Found candidate parents 50 animal”, DT info text “50 entries”, get_download CSV exactly 50 rows + id,nSires,nDams,sires,dams header — fails feature broken (empty-state/warning renders instead), unlike grepl(keyword, get_html(app,"body")) tautology helper’s comments warn passes app boots regardless tab. REFACTOR extract repeated skip/AppDriver boilerplate helper: sibling test-e2e-*-module.R files deliberately repeat , DRY-extraction diverge established idiom — matching siblings beats local cleverness regression net. Right-size note: correctly SOLO — contained single-file test backfill interactive TDD gates breadth fan-; Workflow theater (Learning 70/77 right-size heuristic, contained side). held even ultracode “” — project methodology + learnings govern right-size call, “use Workflow every substantive task” yields “right-size breadth surface” surface one file. Reflexes: [declare--degenerate-RED→GREEN---test-backfill][RED=teeth+clean-self-skip][assertions-must--teeth--body-grepl][GREEN-re-derive--locked-value---exact-pipeline][trace--reactive--module-actually-feeds][compute--variants--prove-immaterial][browser-E2E---Phase-3E-verification][opt--via-NPRC_RUN_E2E+NOT_CRAN+install-first][preserve--sibling-test-idiom--DRY-extraction][right-size-SOLO-even--ultracode][declare-phase-every-response][gate-every-transition-via-AskUserQuestion][news-vs-changelog][macos-dupe-scan]. Apply: backfill regression test already-shipped behavior strict TDD — declare degenerate (-production-code) cycle PRE-RED→RED gate define RED/GREEN/REFACTOR concretely (teeth + clean self-skip / run-green--shipped + re-derive locked value exact production pipeline first / lint preserving sibling idiom); make every data assertion fail feature broken; let real browser E2E run Phase-3E runtime verification; right-size SOLO single-file test even “always use Workflow” directive force.

what: Learning 81 — Executing a MOUNT-ONLY Shiny wire-in (a built-but-unmounted module) under strict TDD is the smallest vertical slice: 2 production edits, RED is the wiring-grep idiom (NOT module unit tests — the module is already tested), and the deparse-grep server test’s teeth come from the Phase-3E AppDriver boot, not the grep; and a mid-session owner QUESTION that reveals new scope → answer firsthand + file an issue, don’t expand the deliverable (S83, wire in the ORIP module #47; ONPRC-gating deferred to #49)
title: nprcgenekeepr — Project-Specific Learnings
text: () [mount-wire-smallest TDD slice — 2 edits, RED wiring-grep idiom, module re-tests] Learning 77 predicted built--unmounted module mount-wire-(design step); #47 confirmed : exactly 2 production edits — appUI.R tabPanel appServer.R modXxxServer(...) call, mirroring 7 siblings. module already unit tests (test_modSiteConfig.R), RED needed WIRING tests, test_modGvAndBgDesc.R exact precedent: (1) .character(appUI()) must contain DISCRIMINATING marker present module mounts — oripReporting- namespace prefix (proves mount id) plus module’s unique body text “Office Research Infrastructure Programs” (proves right content, generic phrase sibling tab already emits); (2) deparse(appServer) must contain server-call name namespace. markers absent HEAD → tests fail ASSERTIONS (errors/undefined-functions) → present 2 edits. Lesson: mount-wire-don’t re-test module — RED net wiring grep idiom (appUI-render + appServer-deparse), choose marker can appear module mounted (namespace prefix + unique body text), one sibling already renders. (b) [deparse-grep server test structurally weak — real teeth Phase-3E AppDriver boot] honest limit: grepl("modORIPReportingServer", deparse(appServer)) confirms source TEXT contains call — near-tautological; catch wrong reactive runtime mount failure. teeth server wiring mandatory Phase-3E — headless AppDriver boot INSTALLED app (Learning 78’s recipe: NOT_CRAN=true + devtools::install() first) proves tab REACHABLE (navigate via app$set_inputs(mainNavbar="ORIP Reporting"), assert active pane shows module’s content) namespaced outputs register 0 module-namespaced JS errors (grep logs namespace, separating pre-existing app-wide shinyBS noise). Carry script gotcha: app$get_html(".tab-pane.active") returns MULTIPLE nodes (every nested module tabset active pane), collapse paste(collapse=" ") assert app$get_value(input="mainNavbar") instead &&-ing length-N vector (length-5 vector isTRUE/&& halts run). Lesson: mirror codebase’s deparse-grep wiring idiom RED net, treat smoke-alarm wire, proof — AppDriver Phase-3E actually verifies module mount (FM #24 answered head-). (c) [mid-session owner QUESTION reveals new scope → answer firsthand, file issue; don’t bleed deliverable (FM #23 + 1--done)] Mid-close-owner asked whether tab’s visibility config/ONPRC-dependent. answered FIRSTHAND code (— ’s static tabPanel, always mounted; displayed center label reflects config, defaulting “ONPRC” via getSiteInfo.R:66 absent) changed nothing. owner clarified tab ONPRC-gated “much session — put issue.” Correct handling: answer question, recognize clarification REAL new requirement, capture tracked issue (#49, evidence-based design options — dynamic insertTab/removeTab mirroring Error List pattern appServer.R:163-242, genuine “show hide config file → default ONPRC” product fork flagged) rather expanding current GREEN. #47 wire-stands built (always-visible); #49 tracks gating. Apply: mount-Shiny wire-(existing, tested, unmounted module) strict TDD — write 2 edits (UI tabPanel + server call) mirroring siblings; RED = wiring-grep tests (appUI-render discriminating mount marker + appServer-deparse call), module re-tests; treat deparse-grep smoke alarm make headless AppDriver Phase-3E real proof mount; mid-session owner question surfaces new requirement, answer firsthand file issue rather expanding session’s deliverable.

what: Learning 82 — Gating an existing UI element on DEPLOYMENT config under strict TDD: resolve the product fork AND the approach as a SEPARATE pre-RED AskUserQuestion (both change the test expectations); implement as a PURE predicate + parameterized-UI injection (maps onto the codebase’s own fast test idioms, no browser for core logic); and drive the REAL config path across all scenarios in Phase-3E — which is exactly where a pre-existing latent bug surfaces (flag-and-file, don’t fix) (S84, gate the ORIP tab to ONPRC-only #49; close #47; file #50)
title: nprcgenekeepr — Project-Specific Learnings
text: () [config-gating change TWO pre-RED forks — PRODUCT fork TECHNICAL-approach fork — alter RED expectations, pose SEPARATE pre-RED AskUserQuestion, RED gate] #49 carried product fork (config file exists, getSiteInfo() returns default fallback center="ONPRC" — show hide tab?) approach fork (build-time conditional tabPanel vs dynamic insertTab/removeTab). load-bearing tests: S83’s wiring test asserted ORIP tab ALWAYS present, owner’s chosen “hide unless real ONPRC config” assertion FLIPS absent dev/CI (config file). Per phase-gate contract author/owner decisions SEPARATE AskUserQuestion posed declaring RED (distinct PRE-RED→RED gate ). Recompute seam firsthand pick approach: appUI() evaluated shinyApp(appUI(), appServer) construction (runModularApp.R:40, inst/shinytest/app.R), deployment center fixed per server — tab’s presence per-deployment CONSTANT, per-session reactive. Build-time gating therefore semantically correct simpler dynamic insertTab pattern, exists DATA-driven tabs (Error List, appServer.R:163-242) genuinely toggle per-session user input. Lesson: gating change product fork approach fork move test expectations, surface ONE pre-RED AskUserQuestion (recommend + spell trade-offs), let actual evaluation model — verified firsthand (build-time-vs per-session-reactive) — drive approach, “consistent existing mechanism” reflex (existing dynamic-tab mechanism fits DIFFERENT trigger shape). (b) [implement PURE predicate + parameterized-UI INJECTS resolved config — maps onto codebase’s test idioms turns environment-dependent feature deterministic, browserless unit tests] sibling shouldShowChangedColsTab (exported, file, tested pure predicate + .character(appUI()) grepl + deparse(appServer) grepl) exact precedent. Mirror : NEW exported R/shouldShowOripTab.R = isTRUE(hasConfigFile) && isTRUE(center == "ONPRC") — prefer isTRUE(center == "ONPRC") identical(center, "ONPRC") ’s robust NAMED/attributed center (e.g. getParamDef return one), NA, NULL, length≠1, → FALSE. Parameterize appUI(siteInfo = getSiteInfo(expectConfigFile = FALSE)) integration tests INJECT siteInfo list (center + existing-vs-nonexistent configFile path → file.exists() discriminator) assert tab present/absent DETERMINISTICALLY — HOME/config-file mocking, browser. Gate appServer server mount predicate UI tab server module toggle together (UI tab whose server isn’t mounted empty, non-functional tab); deparse(appServer) grep shouldShowOripTab structural lock mount gated. Lesson: config-gated UI element, extract PURE predicate (unit-testable like siblings) make UI function accept resolved config DEFAULTED parameter — injection converts environment-dependent feature fast deterministic unit tests build-equivalent (full suite + lint) stays quick; reserve browser Phase-3E. (Watch lint false positive: object_usage_linter flags BRAND-NEW package function “visible global function” package re-installed — confirm re-linting devtools::install(), like already-installed siblings.) (c) [Phase-3E must drive REAL config path across gated scenarios — exactly pre-existing latent bug surfaces: flag--file, don’t fix; classify logs LEVEL namespace-mention] unit tests inject siteInfo, Phase-3E must prove gate works REAL getSiteInfo→config-file path. Bulletproof recipe: generate temp app dir whose app.R Sys.setenv(HOME=<temp dir containing .nprcgenekeepr_config>) shinyApp(appUI(), appServer), child process’s getConfigFileName reads controlled config regardless env inheritance; boot one AppDriver per scenario (ONPRC config → tab present + navigable + 5 outputs register values; SNPRC → absent; config → absent; siblings intact throughout). Driving real config path made FIRST app boot ever performed config file present — immediately crashed PRE-EXISTING bug: config-loading observer (appServer.R:63, 6457a3a3) uses read.table(sep="="), parse DOCUMENTED config format (comments, blank lines, multi-line quoted values) getSiteInfo’s tolerant tokenizer handles — latent dev/CI config file exists . Correct handling (FM #23 + scope discipline + 1--done): fix (unrelated #49); SIDESTEP smoke stripped single-line key=value config parsers accept; FILE (#50) root cause + repro + suggested fix; note handoff. Also: naive Phase-3E log metric (sum(grepl("oripReporting", msgs))) counted INFO-level shiny:value output registrations “errors” produced false FAIL — classify log LEVEL/text (genuine error-level, minus pre-existing app-wide shinyBS noise), namespace MENTION, declaring Phase-3E result. Lesson: verify config-gated feature driving REAL config path Phase-3E (HOME-override--app.R full control); expect “first boot config present” can expose pre-existing config-handling bugs — flag--file (don’t bleed fix deliverable), sidestep minimally complete smoke; judge runtime logs level/text, namespace mention. what: Learning 83 — Fixing a boot crash caused by a REDUNDANT parse path that diverged from the canonical one: the fix is to DELETE the redundancy and route through the single source of truth, not harden the wrong parser; before reshaping a reactive value grep its consumers (a passed-but-unused value is safe to retype); and since an observer isn’t unit-testable in isolation, extract its risky logic into a PURE helper the observer calls — unit-test the helper, lock the wiring with a deparse-grep, prove the integration in Phase-3E (S85, fix #50: documented-format config crashes the modular app on boot)
title: nprcgenekeepr — Project-Specific Learnings
text: () [crash REDUNDANT representation diverged canonical parser → consolidate single source truth; don’t harden wrong parser] artifact (site config file) parsed TWO ways: tolerant getSiteInfo() tokenizer (readLines→getTokenList→getParamDef, handles comments / blank lines / multi-line quoted / comma-separated values) , redundantly, appServer config observer’s read.table(configFile, header=TRUE, sep="="), assumes strict 2-column table stops “line N 2 elements” documented format (inst/extdata/example_nprcgenekeepr_config). bug latent dev/CI config file exists (file.exists(configFile) branch never runs). Lesson: two code paths parse artifact differently one crashes, fix make broken parser tolerant (perpetuates duplication) — DELETE redundant path route one canonical parser (issue #50’s suggested fix #1, owner-chosen minimal tryCatch-patch). “Two parsers one file format” smell; one source truth cure. Wrap canonical call tryCatch(→flog.warn+NULL) missing/malformed file fails SOFT (app must reach stable boot state regardless user’s config file), make loading actually WORK, merely -crash. (b) [changing reactive value’s TYPE/shape, grep consumers — “passed unused” value safe reshape] shared$config wired TWO module signatures (modInputServer("dataInput", config = reactive(shared$config)) modPedigreeServer(..., config = reactive(shared$config))) referenced NEITHER module body (declare config = NULL ignore — confirmed grep -n "config" R/modInput.R R/modPedigree.R). switching shared$config read.table data.frame getSiteInfo() named list ZERO runtime consumer impact. Lesson: recompute-don’t-inherit applies DATA-shape level — reshaping shared/reactive value, grep every consumer learn shape actually depend ; value plumbed--unused free retype, knowing converts “scary type change across reactive graph” safe local edit. (c) [observer/reactive isn’t unit-testable isolation (needs Shiny session) → extract risky logic PURE helper, unit-test helper, lock wiring deparse-grep, prove integration Phase-3E] crash lived observe({...}), can’t exercised fast testthat test without standing session. extract---test-seam move Learning 78 (pure helper module logic) 82 (pure predicate tab visibility), now applied crashing observer: NEW exported R/loadSiteConfig.R (getConfigFileName(Sys.info()) → NULL file, else tryCatch(getSiteInfo(expectConfigFile=FALSE), error→flog.warn+NULL)), observer collapses one-liner shared$config <- loadSiteConfig(). helper gets deterministic browserless tests via withr::local_tempdir() + withr::local_envvar(c(HOME=tmp)) (codebase’s env-override idiom; copy example config basename(getConfigFileName(Sys.info())[["configFile"]]) ’s OS-correct). Add characterization guard test asserting OLD broken call (read.table(sep="=")) errors documented file — green fix (’s RED driver; classify honestly), fails loudly anyone reintroduces strict parser. Lock wiring deparse(appServer) grep (loadSiteConfig present, read.table absent), prove integration Phase-3E booting installed app REAL documented config present (HOME-override--app.R, NOT_CRAN=true, install-first) — exact boot S84 SIDESTEP stripped single-line config now succeeds documented format. Lesson: fix crash inside reactive/observer strict TDD, push crashing logic pure exported helper (fast unit tests teeth), keep observer one-liner, lock call site structural deparse-grep, let Phase-3E’s real-config boot integration proof. Continuation note: designed payoff S84’s flag--file — S84 surfaced #50 first config-present boot, sidestepped , filed candidate (1) exact RED/GREEN/Phase-3E shape; S85 executed shape. flag--file → next-session-fix loop worked. Reflexes: [two parsers one file format smell → consolidate single source truth, don’t harden wrong one][fail-soft via tryCatch make loading actually work][grep reactive value’s consumers reshaping — passed--unused safe retype][observer isn’t unit-testable → extract PURE helper, unit-test , one-line observer][withr::local_tempdir + local_envvar(HOME) env-override test idiom; name config basename(getConfigFileName(…)) OS-correctness][characterization-guard test locks root cause green throughout → RED driver, classify honestly][deparse(appServer) grep locks call site][Phase-3E boots REAL documented config previously crashed — boot S84 sidestepped][object_usage_linter false-positives brand-new fn installed — re-lint install][owner picks single-source--truth vs minimal-patch via SEPARATE pre-RED AskUserQuestion][declare-phase-every-response][gate-every-transition][news-vs-changelog: startup-crash fix user-facing → NEWS+CHANGELOG][flag--file → next-session-fix loop compounding mechanism][right-size-SOLO-even--ultracode]. what: Learning 84 — A durable opt-in browser E2E for a DEPLOYMENT-CONFIG-GATED tab needs both polarities of teeth and a config-injecting app fixture: the POSITIVE case CANNOT use the stock test app (no config → tab hidden) so boot a generated app.R that HOME-overrides a real config before shinyApp() (S84’s Phase-3E recipe promoted to a reusable test fixture), while the NO-CONFIG negative case is FREE from that same stock create_test_app(); reuse the opt-in gate without growing the shared helper, and confirm every gate outcome in-process before the slow browser run (S86, durable opt-in E2E for the ORIP tab #47/#49)
title: nprcgenekeepr — Project-Specific Learnings
text: () [config-gated tab’s POSITIVE E2E must construct app REAL config — stock app hides — -CONFIG negative case FREE stock app, one E2E file mixes config-injecting builder stock app] ORIP tab build-time gated (appUI.R:17 showOrip = shouldShowOripTab(siteInfo$center, file.exists(siteInfo$configFile)), server mount gated identically appServer.R:283-292), siteInfo defaulting getSiteInfo(expectConfigFile = FALSE). standard installed app (inst/shinytest/app.R → appUI() config present) yields default fallback center="ONPRC" configFile path exist → tab HIDDEN. sibling test-e2e-potential-parents-module.R drives NON-gated tab via create_test_app() (stock inst/shinytest dir); config-gated tab’s POSITIVE case reuse . fixture: local build_config_app_dir(center) writes temp app.R Sys.setenv(HOME = <temp dir complete documented-format .nprcgenekeepr_config>) shinyApp(appUI(), appServer) — S84/S85’s HOME-override--app.R Phase-3E recipe, now promoted one-smoke script reusable TEST fixture (getConfigFileName.R:16 reads Sys.getenv("HOME"), child process’s gate reads controlled config). Conversely, -CONFIG NEGATIVE case FREE: stock create_test_app() app already config → gate correctly hides tab, block asserts absence unmodified installed app. Lesson: opt-E2E deployment-config-gated UI element, positive case needs config-injecting app fixture (HOME-override app.R), -config negative case rides stock app free — one self-contained E2E file uses . Embed HOME path absolute forward-slash literal (normalizePath(winslash="/")), name config basename(getConfigFileName(Sys.info())[["configFile"]]) OS-correctness, write 7 params (getSiteInfo/getParamDef stop()s missing one file exists), put config dir INSIDE app dir one unlink(recursive=TRUE) (registered app$stop()) cleans . (b) [reuse opt-gate without growing shared helper — call create_test_app() skip side-effect discard returned path] opt-gate lives one place (helper-shinytest2.R::create_test_app() skips unless NPRC_RUN_E2E="true"), new config-injecting builder must honor without duplicating gate string modifying helper 137 call-sites depend . move: build_config_app_dir() calls create_test_app() first line purely skip side-effect (confirm package installed), ignores stock-dir return builds config app instead. new test file thus adds ZERO shared-helper surface stays fully self-contained — preserving sibling “self-contained test-e2e-* file” idiom (Learning 80c: prefer matching established e2e idiom DRY-extraction regression net). Lesson: new opt-E2E needs gate different app dir, invoke existing gate helper side-effect discard path rather re-implementing gate widening shared helper — single source gate, zero blast radius shared test infrastructure. (c) [GATING teeth come TWO polarities, confirm every gate outcome -process browser run] gate E2E proves tab APPEARS+functions right config genuinely ABSENT otherwise — negative polarity one body-grepl tautology can’t fake. Positive teeth (ONPRC): gated namespace output #oripReporting-siteInfo renders ONPRC (true live config reached module, default-fallback path) plus DETERMINISTIC download — app$get_download("oripReporting-downloadORIPReport") always writes Site section (Category/Metric/Value, Center=ONPRC row) even pedigree loaded, CSV assertion needs upload. Negative teeth (-config SNPRC): grepl("oripReporting-", get_html(app,"body")) FALSE — absence namespace true tab genuinely unmounted (booted--wrong-tab app can’t fake , unlike grepl(keyword, body) tautology helper comments warn ). SNPRC block specifically proves gate keys center, mere config presence — discriminator -config case alone establish (config file present, center!="ONPRC" → still absent). applying Learning 80b’s “re-derive locked value first” PREDICATE rather count: slow browser run, confirm three gate outcomes -process (getSiteInfo() parse → shouldShowOripTab()): ONPRC→TRUE, SNPRC→FALSE, -config→FALSE — 4-block browser run passed first try. Right-size note: correctly SOLO — contained single-file test backfill interactive TDD gates breadth fan-; Workflow theater, held even ultracode “” (project methodology + learnings govern right-size call; “use Workflow every substantive task” yields “right-size breadth surface” surface one file — Learning 80c). degenerate RED→GREEN (already-shipped behavior, production code) declared honestly PRE-RED→RED gate (Learning 80a); RED verification = “run , watch 4 blocks self-skip” (SSSS, 0 fail/error). Reflexes: [config-gated tab’s POSITIVE E2E can’t use stock app — build HOME-override config-injecting app fixture][promote Phase-3E HOME-override recipe reusable test fixture][-CONFIG negative case free stock create_test_app() app][reuse opt-gate via create_test_app()’s skip side-effect, discard path — shared-helper change][self-contained e2e file, DRY-extraction][embed HOME normalizePath(winslash=“/”) absolute literal][name config basename(getConfigFileName(…)) OS-correctness][write 7 params — getParamDef stop()s missing one][config dir inside app dir → one unlink app$stop()][two-polarity teeth: positive namespace-renders-ONPRC + deterministic download-CSV row, negative grepl-namespace-ABSENT][SNPRC block proves gate keys center config-presence][confirm every gate outcome -process browser run (Learning 80b applied predicate)][browser E2E Phase-3E verification (FM #24)][opt-via NPRC_RUN_E2E + NOT_CRAN + install-first][declare degenerate RED→GREEN gate][RED=teeth+clean-self-skip (SSSS)][REFACTOR re-verifies parsing + fresh browser run touches config app reads][right-size-SOLO-even--ultracode][news-vs-changelog: test-→ CHANGELOG ][macos-dupe-scan]. Apply: write durable opt-browser E2E deployment-config-gated UI element strict TDD — build config-injecting app fixture (HOME-override app.R) positive case, ride stock app -config negative case, reuse opt-gate via existing helper’s skip side-effect (shared-helper change), assert polarities teeth (gated content + download right config; namespace ABSENT wrong/config, wrong-center block prove gate keys config value mere presence), confirm every gate outcome -process slow browser run, let real 4-block browser run Phase-3E runtime verification.
